1.1: Bienere sa dimounn ki pa ekout konsey bann ki fer lemal, ki pa swiv sime dimounn ki fer pese, ki pa asiz ar dimounn vantar.
1.2: Okontrer li gagn plezir dan lalwa LESEGNER, e lanwit-lizour li medit lor so lansegnman.
1.3: Li kouma enn pie ki pous dan bor dilo, ki raport so fri dapre so sezon e so fey res touletan ver. Sa dimounn ere la li touletan prospere.
1.4: Me bann dimounn move pa koumsa; zot kouma lasann lapay ki balie par divan.
1.5: Bann move dimounn pou kondane dan zizman, bann ki fer pese pa pou rant dan lasanble lepep Bondie.
1.6: LESEGNER protez e gid lavi dimounn ki zis, me bann ki fer move pou zwenn lapert ek lamor.

2.1: Kifer bann nasion pe rod deklans enn deboulman pou nanye? Kifer bann pep pe konplote dan vid?
2.2: Zot bann lerwa lor later pe prepar lager, zot bann dirizan pe vinn ansam kont LESEGNER e kont lerwa ki li finn konsakre.
2.3: Zot dir, “Anou kas lakord zot regn; plis ki sa, anou eklat zot lasenn.”
2.4: LESEGNER ki pe asiz lor so tronn lao dan lesiel pe riye e pran zot pou enn bann boufon.
2.5: Li averti zot dan so gran lakoler, e laflam so lakoler fer zot tranble.
2.6: Li dir zot, “Mwa ki finn swazir mo lerwa, mo finn instal li lor Sion, montagn sakre.”
2.7: Lerwa dir, “Les mo anons zot deklarasion LESEGNER. Li finn dir mwa, ‘Zordi, zour to kouronnman, to finn vinn mo garson e mwa mo finn vinn to Papa.
2.8: Nek dimann mwa e tou bann nasion pou vinn pou twa; nek dimande, e later antie pou vinn to rwayom.
2.9: Lerla to va diriz zot avek lafors ki ena dan enn feray e kas-kas zot kouma gargoulet ki fer ek later.’ ”
2.10: Alor, zot ki bann lerwa, servi lasazes; zot ki dirizan lor later, fer atansion.
2.11: Obeir LESEGNER ar boukou respe; exprim zot lazwa, avek tranbleman.
2.12: Met zot azenou divan li. Pa bliye so lakoler anflame vit e zot kapav zwenn lamor lor sime. Bienere tou dimounn ki mars ar li e ki gagn so proteksion.

3.1: SEGNER, mo ena lennmi partou! Zot boukou, ki pe lev kont mwa!
3.2: Zot koz enn ta lor mwa, zot dir, “Pena sime Bondie delivre li.”
3.3: Me twa, SEGNER, to touzour boukliye ki protez mwa; to sov mo loner, to relev mo latet.
3.4: Mo kriye osekour for for mem ver LESEGNER e li reponn mwa depi so montagn sakre.
3.5: Aswar mo alonze, mo dormi anpe; gramatin mo leve; LESEGNER la, li mo sekirite.
3.6: Mem si enn larme mil dimounn anserkle mwa sa pa fer mwa per.
3.7: O SEGNER, lev twa! Sov mwa, mo Bondie! Kalot mo bann lennmi, grenn ledan bann ki fer lemal.
3.8: O SEGNER, twa ki amenn delivrans. Devers to benediksion lor to pep.

4.1: Reponn mwa kan mo priye twa. Bondie tomem mo lazistis. Kan mo ti dan detres to finn liber mwa. Montre to bonte, ekout mo lapriyer.
4.2: E zot, dimounn inportan, komie letan ankor zot pou mepriz mo laglwar? Komie letan ankor zot pou atase ar mansonz, e galoup deryer bann kiksoz initil?
4.3: Pa bliye ki LESEGNER finn met apar pou limem dimounn ki fidel, e LESEGNER tann mwa kan mo dimann so led.
4.4: Pa les lakoler fer zot tom dan pese; aswar lor zot lili, reflesi lor la e gard silans.
4.5: Ofer LESEGNER sakrifis ki bizin e met tou zot konfians dan li.
4.6: Boukou dimounn pe dir, “Kisann-la kapav fer nou trouv nou boner?” SEGNER, fer lalimier to prezans briy lor nou.
4.7: To finn met dan mo leker plis lazwa ki bann-la ena kan zot rekolt ek zot divin finn depas kantite.
4.8: Mo dormi trankil, mo somey pezib, parski to tousel O SEGNER vey lor mo sekirite.

5.1: SEGNER, ekout mo lapriyer, e tann mo douler kriye.
5.2: Twa mo Bondie, mo Lerwa, ekout mwa kan mo kriye twa, se twa ki mo priye.
5.3: SEGNER, boner gramatin to tann mo lavwa; kouma soley leve mo prepar tou pou twa # 5:3 Enn lot posibilite: kouma soley leve mo ofer twa mo sakrifis; oubien, mo ofer twa mo lapriyer. e lerla mo atann.
5.4: To pa enn Bondie ki pran plezir dan lemal; seki fer lemal pena plas kot twa.
5.5: Bann vantar pa pou tini dibout divan twa; to deteste move dimounn.
5.6: To detrir bann manter, SEGNER, to ayir bann kriminel ek bann voler.
5.7: Akoz labondans to gran lamour infini mo pou kapav rant dan to lakaz, bes mo latet dan direksion to Tanp sakre, e avek gran respe mo pou azenou.
5.8: SEGNER, twa ki zis, gid mwa, ena boukou ki pe kasiet pou atak mwa. Tir tou bann obstak ki ena lor sime tonn montre mwa pou swiv.
5.9: Pa kapav fer konfians seki sorti dan labous mo lennmi; zot lespri ranpli ar destriksion; zot lagorz kouma tonbo ouver; zot lalang servi pou tronp dimounn.
5.10: Bondie, deklar zot koupab; fer ki zot prop konplo devir zot anba-lao; pous zot andeor to prezans akoz zot bann pese parski zot finn revolte kont twa.
5.11: Me tou ki konfie zot ar twa pou gagn to proteksion; zame zot pou fini sante ar sa lazwa la; protez bann ki kontan to nom, akoz twa zot kriye ar lazwa.
5.12: Wi, twa, SEGNER, to beni bann ki obeir twa, to gran lamour anvlop zot e protez zot parey kouma enn boukliye.

6.1: SEGNER, mem to ankoler, pa kondann mwa; malgre to gran koler, pa pini mwa.
6.2: Pitie mwa, SEGNER, parski mo finn deperi net; geri mwa SEGNER parski tou mo lezo pe tranble.
6.3: Mo lekor ek mo lespri dan tourman, ziska kan, O SEGNER, ziska kan?
6.4: Retourne, SEGNER, vinn sov mwa; akoz to lamour infini vinn sov mo lavi.
6.5: Dan lemond lemor, dimounn pa rapel; ki pou kapav selebre twa laba?
6.6: Soufrans ek lapenn pe fini mwa; touleswar mo dra tranpe e mo lili inonde ar mo larm.
6.7: Mo lizie finn vinn feb telman sagrin finn gonfle li; mo nepli trouv kler telman mo ena adverser.
6.8: Tire ale, zot ki bann trafikan lemal! Mo SEGNER finn tann mo soufrans;
6.9: LESEGNER finn ekout mo siplikasion, LESEGNER finn akeyir mo lapriyer.
6.10: Mo lennmi pou zwenn defet ek imiliasion; enn sel kou zot pou rekile, kouver ar laont.

7.1: SEGNER mo Bondie, mo vinn ver twa pou gagn to proteksion; bann persekiter pe pourswiv mwa; sov mwa, delivre mwa.
7.2: Sinon, kouma lion, zot pou desir-desir mwa, trenn-trenn mwa, e personn pa pou vinn delivre mwa.
7.3: SEGNER mo Bondie, si mo finn mal azir, si mo lame finn komet enn krim;
7.4: si mo finn trayir enn kamarad; si mo finn fer ditor mo lennmi san rezon;
7.5: alor, les mo lennmi pourswiv mwa e may mwa, les li zet mwa ater, pil lor mwa, e les mo kadav pouri dan lapousier.
7.6: Lev twa, SEGNER, montre to koler! Dres kont violans mo lennmi; Revey twa, twa ki finn etabli drwatir.
7.7: Rasanble bann pep otour twa e depi lor to tronn lao diriz ek ziz zot.
7.8: SEGNER, twa ki ziz lor tou dimounn, ziz mwa dapre mo drwatir, ziz mwa dapre mo lintegrite.
7.9: O Bondie, twa ki lasours drwatir, twa ki konn ziz nou panse ek nou santiman, detrir lemal bann move dimounn e fer bann dimounn ki drwat vinn pli for.
7.10: Bondie mo boukliye protekter e li sov seki obeir li.
7.11: Bondie enn ziz ki fer zistis, enn Bondie ki montre so koler kont lemal toulezour.
7.12: Si move dimounn pa repantir Bondie pou fit so lepe e redi difil so lark;
7.13: li finn arm so fles pou li vize, li finn prepar so bann zarm mortel, bann fles anflame.
7.14: Gete kouma move dimounn akous lemal; zot met ba dezord e fer lelvaz desepsion.
7.15: Zot fouy enn trou, zot fer li bien fon; zot tom pik tet dan trou ki zot finn fouye zotmem.
7.16: Zot move lintansion vinn zot prop pwazon; dan zot prop figir, zot zarm malsin eklate.
7.17: Mo pou rann gras LESEGNER pou so drwatir. Mo sant grander nom LESEGNER Pli Lao.

8.1: SEGNER, twa ki nou Segner, To nom li manifik partou lor later! To plas to laglwar pli ot ki lesiel.
8.2: Par labous bann zanfan ek ti-baba to finn batir to lafors kont to bann lennmi, pou ferm labous bann adverser e seki rod lit kont twa.
8.3: Kan mo admir lesiel, travay ki to lame finn fer, kan mo get avek admirasion lalinn ek zetwal ki to finn met anplas,
8.4: ki valer imin ena pou ki li dan to panse? Ki enn sinp kreatir imin ete, pou to pran li otan kont?
8.5: Pourtan to finn fer li inpe mwins ki Bondie. To finn kouronn li ar laglwar ek loner.
8.6: To fer li gouvern lor travay to lame; to finn fer li siperyer ki lezot kreatir:
8.7: troupo bef ek mouton, e mem bann zanimo sovaz,
8.8: zwazo dan ler, pwason dan dilo, tou seki ale vini dan losean.
8.9: SEGNER, twa ki nou Segner, to nom li bien gran partou lor later!

9.1: Mo pou loue to grander, SEGNER, ar tou mo leker; mo pou rakont tou mervey ki to finn fer.
9.2: Akoz twa mo pou dan lazwa. Mo pou sant to gran nom, Bondie Pli Lao.
9.3: Mo lennmi kapitile ek rekile; zot tom sek, zot mor divan twa.
9.4: To finn defann mo drwa, finn fer zistis pou mwa; depi to tronn to donn zizman ki drwat.
9.5: To finn kraz bann nasion infidel; e to finn detrir bann move dimounn, zot nom finn efase pou touletan.
9.6: Nou lennmi nepli existe; to finn plati zot lavil e personn pa pou rapel zot.
9.7: Me LESEGNER pou regne pou touletan; depi so tronn bien ferm li pou pronons zizman.
9.8: E li ziz lemond antie dapre drwatir; e li garanti lazistis pou tou bann pep.
9.9: LESEGNER protez bann ki pe soufer dominasion; li donn sekirite kan maler pe tape.
9.10: Bann ki konn to nom, SEGNER, met tou zot konfians an twa parski zame to abandonn seki rod to sekour.
9.11: Anou sant louanz pou LESEGNER ki regne depi Zerizalem. Anou rakont so bann mervey parmi bann pep!
9.12: Bondie ki galoup deryer bann asasin, li rapel zot viktim; li pa bliye lavwa ki exprim soufrans bann malere.
9.13: SEGNER, ena pitie! Gete kouma mo soufer akoz mesanste mo lennmi! Twa ki tir mwa dan latrap lamor, SEGNER,
9.14: e ki permet mwa dibout divan lepep Zerizalem pou rakont zot kifer mo sant to louanz. Mo lazwa li gran parski to finn sov mwa.
9.15: Bann nasion finn tom dan trou ki zot finn fouye zotmem; zot finn dres enn latrap e zotmem ki finn rant ladan.
9.16: LESEGNER finn revel limem par zizman ki li finn fer; e move dimounn finn tas dan zot prop piez.
9.17: Bann move dimounn e bann nasion ki bliye Bondie zot tou finn fini dan lemond bann mor.
9.18: Bann ki dan bezwin pa pou touletan pas mizer; e bann ki soufer povrete, zot lespwar pa pou tom dan dilo.
9.19: Lev twa, SEGNER! Pa les personn gagn laviktwar! Fer amenn bann nasion infidel divan to tronn e donn to zizman kont zot.
9.20: Fer zot per e respe twa, SEGNER; Fer zot tou bien konpran ki zot zis bann imin.

10.1: Kifer to res lwin ar nou, SEGNER? Kifer pa trouv twa dan moman detres?
10.2: Avek arogans move dimounn persekit bann pov; zot may bann-la dan zot latrap.
10.3: Move dimounn li fier so prop move dezir; dimounn gourman li modi LESEGNER e li pena respe pou li.
10.4: Dan so arogans move dimounn pa pran Bondie kont; dan so panse pena plas pou Bondie.
10.5: Move dimounn reisi tou seki li fer. Li pa konpran lazistis divinn, sa tro lwin pou li e li mepriz so lennmi.
10.6: Li dir ar limem, “Pena nanye ki kapav bouz mwa! Problem ek traka? Zame zot pa pou tous mwa!”
10.7: So labous ranpli ar malediksion; li modi, li koz manti, li menase; anba so lalang ena parol blesan ek mesanste.
10.8: Li kasiet pre ar bann vilaz san defans e atann so ler pou touy inosan; dan kasiet li espionn so viktim;
10.9: li res dan kasiet parey enn lion, li vey so ler pou atake; li ris bann pov, li trenn zot dan so piez.
10.10: Bann viktim san defans pa sape e zot tom dan so pouvwar.
10.11: Dan so panse move dimounn dir, “Bondie pa pran kont; so figir tourn lot kote, zame li pou trouve.”
10.12: Lev twa, SEGNER! Lev to lame pou pini zot, Bondie; pa bliye bann ki pe soufer!
10.13: Kifer move dimounn mepriz Bondie? Li dir, “Bondie pa pou demann mwa rann kont.”
10.14: Tousala pa vre! To bien trouv tou. To kone ena problem ek soufrans e to pran tou dan to lame. Bann ki feb ek san defans zot remet zotmem dan to lame. To finn touletan vinn osekour orfelin.
10.15: Kas lerin move dimounn ki viv dan pese; grenn zot mesanste ziska pa res nanye.
10.16: LESEGNER, limem Lerwa pou leternite. Bann ki priye lezot bondie pa pou ena plas dan pei LESEGNER.
10.17: SEGNER, to tann dezir bann ti dimounn, to pou ekout bann feb e donn zot kouraz.
10.18: To pou rann zistis an faver bann ki pe gagn kraze kouma orfelin; koumsa bann zans ordiner pou aret sem terer.

11.1: LESEGNER, limem mo sekirite! Abe kouma to kapav dir mwa, “Anvole kouma zwazo, al kasiet lor montagn
11.2: parski move dimounn pe prepar zot zarm, zot finn plas zot fles dan ark, zot kasiet dan nwar, zot pe viz leker bon dimounn.
11.3: Kan fondasion lasosiete pe vir anba-lao, dimounn ki viv drwat, ki li kapav fer?”
11.4: LESEGNER li dan so Tanp sakre; LESEGNER so tronn li dan lesiel. Li sirvey tou bann imin partou e li examinn zot.
11.5: LESEGNER teste tou dimounn, so bon kouma so move. Li deteste bann ki servi violans.
11.6: Lor bann move dimounn li pou vers labrez ek souf anflame; enn labriz kouma dife, samem ki li pou gard pou zot.
11.7: Parski LESEGNER limem drwatir, li kontan bann aksion ki zis, bann ki viv drwat pou viv dan so prezans.

12.1: Vinn sekour nou, SEGNER! To bann dimounn lwayal finn disparet; dimounn onet ek fidel, pa trouv zot mem.
12.2: Dimounn partou nek koz manti; zot flate ar doub langaz pou tronp zot prosin.
12.3: Ki LESEGNER bous zot labous ki ranpli ar flatri! Atas zot lalang arogan ki dir,
12.4: “Ar parol dimiel nou lalang, nou gagn seki nou le. Nou labous dir seki nou anvi, e personn pa kapav aret nou.”
12.5: LESEGNER dir, “Parski bann pov pe soufer; bann oprime pe plor zot maler, Mwa mo pou leve, mo pou donn zot proteksion ki zot bizin.”
12.6: Nou fer konfians promes LESEGNER, so parol kler ek prop kouma larzan, enn metal presie ki finn pirifie set fwa dan dife laforz.
12.7: Twa, SEGNER, to gard to parol, protez nou touzour kont sa kalite move dimounn la.
12.8: Bann move dimounn pe rode partou, e partou koripsion pe gagn plis valer.

13.1: SEGNER, komie letan ankor to pou bliye mwa? Pou touzour? Komie letan ankor to pou tourn ledo ar mwa?
13.2: Komie letan ankor mo pou kourbe ar traka? Komie letan ankor lapenn pou nway mo leker lanwit-lizour? Komie letan ankor mo lennmi pou dominn lor mwa?
13.3: O SEGNER mo Bondie, reponn mo lapel! Refer mo lizie briye ar lasante; sinon zot pou ferme ar somey lamor;
13.4: sinon mo lennmi pou dir, “Mo pli for ki li,” mo bann adverser pou dan lazwa si mo tonbe.
13.5: Mwa mo fer konfians to gran lamour fidel pou mwa; mo leker ranpli ar lazwa parski to finn sov mwa.
13.6: Mo pou kontinie sant pou LESEGNER parski li finn touletan bon anver mwa.

14.1: Bann inbesil panse dan zot leker, “Pou mwa, pena Bondie!” Zot koronpi; zot fer bann krim orib; pena enn osi ki fer dibien.
14.2: LESEGNER depi lesiel lao pe obzerv limanite anba pou gete si ena dimounn ki posed lasazes; si ena dimounn ki pe rod ador Bondie.
14.3: Me zot tou finn perdi sime; zot tou zot dan koripsion. Pena enn sel ki mars dapre drwatir, mem pa enn sel.
14.4: Bann ki fer lemal, zot pa konpran? Zot devor mo bann fidel kouma zot devor manze, e zot pa invok nom LESEGNER?
14.5: Me biento zot pou tranble ar freyer parski Bondie li avek seki obeir li.
14.6: Bann move dimounn, zot rod devir plan ti-dimounn pov me zot bliye ki LESEGNER limem protekter bann pov.
14.7: Mo priye ki liberasion Izrael pou vinn depi oter Sion. Desandan Zakob, lepep Izrael pou dan gran lazwa kan LESEGNER fer zot retrouv zot dibien.

15.1: SEGNER, kisann-la gagn drwa rant dan to Tanp? Kisann-la gagn drwa viv lor Sion, to Montagn Sakre?
15.2: Dimounn ki san repros, ki fer seki drwat, ki koz vre depi enn leker sinser,
15.3: ki pa difam personn, li pa fer so kamarad ditor e li pa fann rimer lor so prosin;
15.4: li mepriz bann ki fer lemal, me li onor seki respekte LESEGNER; li gard so parol mem si sa kapav kout li bien ser.
15.5: Li pa pret larzan lor lintere; e zame li pa pran gous pou akiz bann inosan. Bann ki viv onet koumsa zame pa pou tonbe.

16.1: Protez mwa, Bondie; tomem mo sekirite.
16.2: Mo dir LESEGNER, “Tomem mo Segner; mo pena pli gran boner ki twa.”
16.3: Dan sa pei la, bann ki swiv Bondie zot nob ek bon! Mo ena afeksion pou bann dimounn koumsa.
16.4: Bann ki galoup deryer lot bondie, zot pou miltipliye zot traka; Mo pa pou partisip dan zot sakrifis disan; mo refiz pronons zot nom.
16.5: SEGNER, tomem mo pli gran partaz, mo destin; mo lavenir an sekirite dan to lame.
16.6: Kado to donn mwa parey enn terin manifik; li enn par ki fer mwa gran plezir.
16.7: Mo loue LESEGNER parski li konsey mwa; mem aswar mo leker averti mwa.
16.8: LESEGNER li touletan dan mo lespri; li touletan la koste ar mwa, mo pa pou konn defet.
16.9: Akoz tousa mo leker ranpli ar gratitid ek boner e mo viv dan lape ek sekirite.
16.10: To pa abandonn mwa dan lamor. To pa les lamor aval to fidel.
16.11: To touletan montre mwa bon sime lavi; kan to la, mo lavi ranpli ar lazwa; dan to prezans ena boner pou touzour.

17.1: SEGNER, ekout mo lapriyer ki demann lazistis; tann mwa ki pe apel osekour; pa ignor enn lapriyer onet.
17.2: Ki mo zizman li sorti kot twa, parski to trouv ki bon, ki drwat.
17.3: Si to examinn fon mo leker; si pandan lanwit to vey mwa, si to teste mwa, to pa pou trouv okenn blam kont mwa. Mo labous zame dir move kiksoz
17.4: kouma lezot fer; mo prefer ekout to konsey ek evit sime violans.
17.5: Mo finn touletan mars lor sime ki to finn trase e zame mo pa finn derape.
17.6: Mo apel twa O Bondie parski mo kone to pou reponn mwa; mo sipliy twa ekout mwa ar pasians, ekout parol ki mo pe dir twa.
17.7: Montre mwa to gran lamour fidel, twa ki ofer proteksion bann ki rod sekour kot twa; zot sap dan lame bann agreser.
17.8: Protez mwa kouma trezor pli presie devan to lizie; kasiet mwa dan lonbraz to lezel
17.9: kont move dimounn ki rod fer mwa dimal, kont lennmi ki pe antour mwa.
17.10: Zot leker ros, san okenn pitie, e zot labous ranpli ar larogans.
17.11: Zot lasas mwa; kot mo bouze zot otour mwa; zot pe vey lokazion pou fer mwa manz lapousier.
17.12: Kouma lion zot pare pou desir-desir mwa. Parey enn zenn lion zot pe atann dan kasiet pou sot lor mwa.
17.13: O SEGNER, lev twa! Dibout divan zot, ranvers zot! Servi to lepe kont move dimounn pou sap mo lavi.
17.14: Protez mwa kont sa kalite dimounn la, ki rasazie ar ramas dibien olie fer lebien; fer ki zot zanfan ek ti zanfan ranpli zot vant ziska zot rasazie.
17.15: Mwa, akoz lazistis, mo pou trouv twa divan mwa; e kan soley leve, to prezans ranpli mwa ar lazwa.

18.1: Mo kontan twa, SEGNER! Tomem mo lafors.
18.2: LESEGNER, limem mo sitadel, mo veritab fortres, mo liberater, mo Bondie, sitadel kot mo santi mwa an sekirite, boukliye ki protez mwa, ki defann mwa, ki sov mwa.
18.3: Mo apel LESEGNER osekour, ki merit tou louanz! E li delivre mwa kont mo lennmi.
18.4: Danze lamor ti pe fer mo letour; gro vag destriksion ti pe roul ver mwa.
18.5: Danze lamor ti antour mwa, bann tom ti pare pou aval mwa.
18.6: Dan mo detres mo kriye LESEGNER, mo ti dimann mo Bondie vinn ed mwa. Depi dan so Tanp li ti tann mo soufrans; mo lavwa finn ariv ziska li.
18.7: Lerla later ti tranble ek bouze; fondasion montagn sakouye ek vibre parski Bondie ti bien ankoler.
18.8: Lafime ti pe sorti par so nene; depi so labous, laflam ki griy partou, ti akonpagne par labrez anflame.
18.9: Li ti deroul lesiel kouma enn tapi, e li desann lor later lor enn gro niaz nwar.
18.10: Li ti mont lor enn seribin, li ti anvole, li ti plane lor lezel divan.
18.11: Enn lanvlop marenwar ti kasiet li e bann niaz nwar epe gonfle ar dilo ti kouver li.
18.12: Enn lalimier bien for ti divan li, lagrel ek labrez anflame ki ti pers bann niaz.
18.13: Lavwa LESEGNER ti eklate kouma loraz e lavwa Bondie Pli Lao ti rezone partou.
18.14: Li lans so bann fles e so bann lennmi sove, ar enn filwar zekler li ti fer zot galoup an-dezord, disparet.
18.15: SEGNER, to koler kouma siklonn, ler to exprim to menas e to laraz li fer fon lamer paret, li met fondasion later touni.
18.16: LESEGNER ti desann net depi lao e ti tir mwa depi kot mo ti pe nwaye.
18.17: Li ti liber mwa, kas mo lasenn, parski mo lennmi ti tro for, mo adverser tro pwisan.
18.18: Zot ti profit mo maler pou atak mwa me LESEGNER ti vinn defann mwa.
18.19: Li ti tir mwa dan danze, ti liber mwa, e ti sov mwa parski li ti kontan mwa.
18.20: LESEGNER rekonpans mwa dapre mo drwatir; li beni mwa parski mo lame prop.
18.21: Mo finn touzour swiv sime LESEGNER e zame mo pa finn tourn mo ledo ar mo Bondie.
18.22: So bann lalwa touletan divan mwa, e mo pa finn dezobeir so bann instriksion.
18.23: Li kone ki pena okenn blam kont mwa, e ki mo pran boukou prekosion pou pa fer pese.
18.24: Li rekonpans mwa dapre mo drwatir me osi parski li trouve ki mo lame prop.
18.25: SEGNER to fidel ar seki montre limem fidel; to montre to san repros ar seki san repros;
18.26: Ar seki sinser, to montre ki to sinser, me ar move dimounn to montre to pli malin.
18.27: To sov ti-dimounn ki konn imiliasion, to abes bann ki ranpli ar lorgey.
18.28: SEGNER mo Bondie, to lalimier mo lavi, to ekler mwa dan teneb.
18.29: Gras-a twa mo kapav fer fas enn latroup gerye; ar to lafors mo kapav fransi enn miray.
18.30: Sa Bondie la, li plis ki parfe; LESEGNER so parol ena valer e kouma enn boukliye li protez seki rod so proteksion.
18.31: LESEGNER tousel ki Bondie! Bondie tousel kapav defann nou.
18.32: Limem ki donn mwa lafors e montre mwa sime ki sir.
18.33: Kouma serf dan kaskad ek lor montagn li montre mwa galoupe san tonbe.
18.34: Li antrenn mwa pou konba, mo lebra kapav redi enn ark an-bronz.
18.35: To finn donn mwa to boukliye ki sov mwa; to lame drwat finn soutenir mwa; to bonte finn rann mwa for.
18.36: To finn donn mwa plis lespas pou mo kapav avanse, sa finn anpes mwa tonbe.
18.37: Mo finn pourswiv mo lennmi ziska mo finn zwenn zot; mo finn lager ar zot ziska mo finn fini zot;
18.38: mo finn koup-koup zot, fors zot larg lekor; e kot mo lipie, zot tonbe dan ladefet.
18.39: To nouri mo kouraz pou konba, pou fer mo lennmi pliye devan mwa.
18.40: To fer mo lennmi sove ale; mo finn detrir mo bann adverser.
18.41: Zot dimann sekour me personn pa tann zot; zot rod koudme LESEGNER me li pa reponn zot;
18.42: mo kraz zot ziska zot vinn lapousier ki divan sarye ale; mo kraz zot kouma labou lor sime.
18.43: To finn protez mwa kont dimounn rebel, e to finn swazir mwa kouma lerwa diferan nasion; dimounn ki mo pa ti kone, zordi form parti lepep ki mo pe dirize.
18.44: Pep etranze akeyir mwa kouma zot lerwa; kouma zot tann mo koze, zot aksepte obeir mwa;
18.45: zot kouraz fonn; zot tranble letan zot kit zot fortres.
18.46: Mo SEGNER li vivan! Mo loue mo Bondie solid! Mo loue Bondie ki finn sov mwa!
18.47: Limem ki donn mwa laviktwar kont mo lennmi; Limem ki fors bann lezot nasion aksepte mo regn;
18.48: tomem ki protez mwa kont lennmi. To finn ed mwa ena viktwar lor bann adverser, e to finn delivre mwa kont dimounn violan.
18.49: Pou tousala, SEGNER, mo pou dir to grander parmi bann nasion ki pa konn twa; e for-for mo pou sant to louanz.
18.50: Bondie donn laviktwar lerwa ki li finn swazir; li montre so gran lamour infini pou lerwa ki li finn konsakre, pou David ek so desandan pou touletan.

19.1: Lesiel revel klerman laglwar Bondie! Travay so lame proklame par zetwal lao dan lesiel.
19.2: Sak zour rakont sa lot zour ki vini; lanwit deklar lot lanwit sa nouvel-la.
19.3: Pena diskour, pena parol pou dir, pa tann okenn lavwa.
19.4: Malgre sa zot mesaz travers partou; zot lavwa vwayaz ziska finfon later. Dan lesiel Bondie finn ranz enn lakaz pou soley;
19.5: kouma nouvo marye, li leve, li sorti dan lasam, kouma enn atlet anform li galoup so parkour ziska aswar.
19.6: Li koumans depi les, li al ziska lwes, so saler sof partou.
19.7: Lalwa LESEGNER li parfe; li donn nouvo lafors pou viv. Temwaniaz LESEGNER li valab touletan, li donn sazes bann dimounn sinp.
19.8: Instriksion LESEGNER li drwat ek zis, li ranpli leker ar lazwa. Komannman LESEGNER bien kler li ouver nou lizie.
19.9: Respe pou LESEGNER li bien bon, li valab pou touletan. Zizman ki LESEGNER rande li vre, e zot touzour zis.
19.10: Zot pli presie ki lor, ki boukou lor rafine; li ena plis douser ki dimiel pli dou ki dimiel ki fek koule.
19.11: Zot donn mwa, to serviter, gran konesans e kan mo obeir zot mo gagn rekonpans.
19.12: Kisann-la kapav trouv so prop febles? Pardonn mwa bann erer ki mo pa pe trouve.
19.13: Protez mwa to serviter kont larogans; ki sa pa dominn mwa. Lerla mo pou san repros, e inosan konsernan bann move ditor.
19.14: Fer ki parol mo labous e meditasion mo leker zot akseptab devan twa, O SEGNER, tomem mo protekter ek mo liberater.

20.1: Mo priye ki LESEGNER reponn ou kan ou dan lapenn! Ki Bondie, ki nou anset Zakob ti priye, protez ou.
20.2: Mo priye ki li avoy ou so led depi Tanp sakre e beni ou depi montagn Sion.
20.3: Ki li aksepte tou ou bann ofrand e ki ou sakrifis fer li plezir.
20.4: Mo priye ki li donn ou seki ou bizin e ki li fer ou bann plan realize.
20.5: Nou pou kriy nou lazwa pou partaz ou laviktwar, nou pou loue nou Bondie ar bann banier pou selebre ou triyonf. Mo priye ki LESEGNER realiz tou ou dezir.
20.6: Mo sir aster ki LESEGNER pou donn laviktwar so lerwa ki li finn konsakre; Bondie pou reponn lerwa depi so sanktier dan lesiel e par so pwisans pou donn li laviktwar.
20.7: Ena ki krwar dan saryo ki servi pou lager; ena ki krwar dan pwisans so seval, me nou, nou fer konfians LESEGNER nou Bondie.
20.8: Bann ki krwar dan saryo ek dan seval pou pliye ek pou tonbe me nou, nou pou leve e nou pou tini dibout.
20.9: SEGNER, donn lerwa laviktwar. Reponn nou letan nou apel twa!

21.1: SEGNER, lerwa dan lazwa parski to finn donn li lafors; li pe selebre parski to finn donn li laviktwar.
21.2: To finn satisfer dezir so leker, to pa finn refiz seki li finn dimande.
21.3: To finn beni so lavi ar boukou benediksion, e lor so latet to finn plas enn kouronn lor fin.
21.4: Li ti dimann twa lavi e to finn donn li lavi ki dire pou touzour.
21.5: So laglwar li gran parski ena to lame laviktwar ladan; to finn donn li repitasion ek mazeste.
21.6: To finn beni li pou touletan; e to prezans ranpli li ar lazwa.
21.7: Lerwa finn met so konfians dan LESEGNER, e akoz lamour infini Bondie Pli Lao nanye pa pou bouz lerwa kot li ete.
21.8: To lame pou sezi tou to bann lennmi; to pwisans pou sezi bann ki ayir twa.
21.9: Kan to aparet to pou anflam zot kouma dibwa sek dan four; LESEGNER so lakoler pou anglouti zot e dife pou devor zot.
21.10: Okenn zot desandan pa pou sape; zot zanfan pou efase parmi limanite.
21.11: Mem si zot konplot lemal kont twa e prepar enn move kou, zot pa pou reisi
21.12: parski to zarm ki viz zot li redoutab e li pou fer zot zet zarm, sove ale.
21.13: Lev twa SEGNER, montre to pwisans! Nou, nou pou sante ek nou pou loue to pouvwar.

22.1: Bondie, mo Bondie, kifer to finn abandonn mwa? Dan dezespwar mo kriye osekour, me to sekour pa vini.
22.2: Mo Bondie, lizour mo sipliy twa ed mwa, me san repons; lanwit mo kriye, mo pa gagn okenn repo.
22.3: Pourtan tomem sel Bondie ki Sin; to lor to tronn, omilie louanz lepep Izrael.
22.4: Nou anset ti met zot konfians total dan twa; zot ti fer twa konfians e to ti delivre zot.
22.5: Zot ti sipliy twa vinn ed zot, e to ti sov zot; zot lafwa ti dan twa e zame zot ti regrete.
22.6: Me mwa, pa kapav dir mo enn imin; mo kouma enn lever; bann dimounn insilte mwa, lepep rezet mwa.
22.7: Tou dimounn mepriz mwa, mok mwa; zot boufonn mwa, zot fer grimas.
22.8: Zot dir, “Get li! Li fer konfians LESEGNER! Kifer to Bondie pa vinn delivre twa? Si li kontan twa kifer li pa vinn ed twa?”
22.9: Pourtan Bondie, twa ki ti ed mwa travers lakousman; twa ki ti poz mwa an sekirite pre kot leker mo mama.
22.10: Depi mo nesans finn konfie mwa dan to lame; depi dan vant mo mama tomem mo Bondie.
22.11: Bondie, pa res lwin ar mwa. Traka ek danze pe koste. To tousel kapav ed mwa.
22.12: Mo lennmi pe antour mwa kouma toro feros; kouma toro ki sorti Basann zot pe fons otour mwa.
22.13: Zot mizo ouver kouma lion afame ki pou desir mwa bout par bout.
22.14: Mo lafors pe ale, pe koule kouma dilo; tou bann lezo dan mo lekor finn disloke net, e mo leker kouma lasir, li pe fonn dan mwa.
22.15: Mo labous sek; mo lalang tas ar mo pale; mo lagorz amare. Koumadir to finn larg mwa dan lapousier lamor!
22.16: Bann lisien pe tom lor mwa; enn group kriminel finn anserkle mwa, zot pers mo lame mo lipie.
22.17: Mo finn vinn lapo-lezo, tou mo lezo deor; dimounn fixe zot regar lor mwa;
22.18: mo lennmi pe lager pou gagn mo linz; zot tir lakourtpay.
22.19: Me twa, SEGNER, pa res lwin ar mwa! Vini vit, vinn sov mwa, twa mo lafors!
22.20: Anpes lepe mo lennmi pran mo lavi; sov mwa dan grif bann lisien;
22.21: anpes lion devor mwa; protez mwa kont korn bann toro sovaz. To finn reponn mwa!
22.22: Mo pou rakont tou dimounn tou seki to finn fer; dan nou lasanble mo pou sant to louanz.
22.23: Zot tou ki respekte ek ador LESEGNER, donn li laglwar! Zot tou desandan Zakob, donn li tou loner! Zot tou pep Izrael, ador li avek reverans!
22.24: Li pa abandonn ni mepriz bann malere; zame li pa bliye zot douler. Li pa detourn so regar, li touletan reponn lapel dimounn pov ki dimann led.
22.25: Tomem lasours mo louanz dan gran lasanble bann fidel; mo pou akonplir mo promes devan tou bann ki ador twa.
22.26: Pou ena boukou manze pou bann pov; bann ki pe rod LESEGNER pou loue li. Ki LESEGNER donn zot tou boner ek prosperite pou touletan.
22.27: Ziska finfon later, zot tou pou rapel e zot tou pou retourn ver LESEGNER. Bann fami diferan tribi ek nasion pou prostern devan li ek ador li.
22.28: Limem SEGNER lerwa ki diriz liniver.
22.29: Tou bann ki ris pou fer fet e pou ador Lesegner; seki pe desann dan lapousier lamor, seki pa kapav gard lavi, pou bes latet divan so grander.
22.30: Zenerasion fitir pou servi li; enn zenerasion pou rakont enn lot grander nou Segner.
22.31: Zanfan ki pa finn ankor ne enn zour pou tann dir, “Lesegner ti defann e protez so pep.”

23.1: LESEGNER limem mo berze; akoz sa mo pa mank nanye.
23.2: Li amenn mwa repoze dan patiraz lerb tann; li gid mwa kot rwiso dilo trankil,
23.3: pou mo regagn lavi; li kondir mwa lor bon sime pou loner so nom.
23.4: Mem kan mo travers vale bien som, parey lamor nanye pa fer mwa per parski to touletan la koste ar mwa, ar to baton berze to protez mwa.
23.5: To dres latab pou mwa divan mo bann adverser. To vers delwil parfime lor mo latet pou resevwar mwa ar loner, e to plin mo koup ziska li deborde.
23.6: Mo kone ki to bonte ek to lamour pou akonpagn mwa toulezour mo lavi, e mo pou res dan lakaz mo SEGNER osi lontan ki mo viv.

24.1: Lemond ek tou seki ena ladan zot pou LESEGNER; later ek tou seki viv lor la zot osi pou li.
24.2: Li finn konstrir tousala lor lak souterin; li finn etabli fondasion dan lili losean.
24.3: Kisann-la gagn drwa mont lor montagn LESEGNER? Kisann-la gagn drwa rant dan so Tanp sakre?
24.4: Bann ki zot lame prop ek zot leker kler, ki pa priye idol e ki pa fer promes dan vid.
24.5: Dimounn prop gagn benediksion LESEGNER; Bondie so Sover pou rekonet ki li zis.
24.6: Sa bann bon dimounn la zot mars ver Bondie e zot viv dan prezans Bondie ki Zakob adore.
24.7: Bann portay! Ouver an gran zot batan. Ouver bann batan laport ansien, pou les Lerwa dan tou so laglwar rantre.
24.8: Kisann-la sa gran Lerwa-la? LESEGNER, for ek pwisan, Limem SEGNER ki vinker dan konba.
24.9: Bann portay! Ouver an gran zot batan. Ouver bann batan laport ansien, pou les Lerwa vinker rantre.
24.10: Kisann-la sa gran Lerwa-la? LESEGNER, ki pli pwisan ki tou. Limem Lerwa ki ena tou laglwar!

25.1: O SEGNER, mo ofer twa lapriyer e adorasion.
25.2: Mo Bondie, mo met mo konfians an twa. Pa les mwa gagn laont; pa les mo lennmi gagn laviktwar lor mwa.
25.3: Bann ki kont lor twa pa pou tom dan laont; Zot pou tom dan laont, bann ki trayir san okenn rezon.
25.4: SEGNER, montre mwa to bon sime; ansegn mwa swiv to parkour.
25.5: Gid mwa dan to laverite e ansegn mwa parski tomem Bondie ki sov mwa. Mo kont lor twa toulezour mo lavi.
25.6: Pa bliye, SEGNER, konpasion ek lamour infini ki to finn donn nou depi koumansman.
25.7: Pa rapel mo bann erer ek bann pese zenes; me dapre to lamour infini, rapel mwa akoz to bonte, SEGNER.
25.8: Parski LESEGNER li bon ek li drwat, li ansegn bann peser ki sime ki bon.
25.9: Ar li dimounn pa vantar zot aprann seki drwat parski li montre zot so bon sime.
25.10: Ar lamour infini ek fidelite li gid dimounn ki gard so lalians e ki obeir so instriksion.
25.11: Akoz to nom, SEGNER, pardonn mo bann tor, zot grav.
25.12: Bann ki ena reverans pou LESEGNER li pou montre zot ki sime bizin swiv.
25.13: Zot pou viv dan prosperite e zot zanfan pou posed later.
25.14: LESEGNER ena lamitie pou seki obeir li e li konfirm so lalians ar so bann fidel.
25.15: Mo tourn ver LESEGNER pou gagn so led e li touletan sap mwa dan bann piez.
25.16: Tourn ver mwa, SEGNER, ena pitie pou mwa, parski mo tousel ek mo dan lapenn.
25.17: Langwas finn miltipliye dan mo leker, liber mwa dan mo detres.
25.18: Pran kont mo detres ek mo soufrans, efas tou mo bann pese.
25.19: Nek gete ki kantite lennmi ki otour mwa e gete kouma zot ayir mwa avek violans.
25.20: Protez mwa, sov mwa; anpes mwa tom dan laont. Zis to tousel ki kapav garanti mo sekirite.
25.21: Fer ki lonette ek drwatir prezerv mwa parski ar lesperans mo kont lor twa.
25.22: Bondie, liber lepep Izrael dan so tourman!

26.1: SEGNER proklam mo inosans parski mo finn viv enn lavi san repros, e mo finn met mo konfians dan LESEGNER, konfians ki pa bouze.
26.2: Examinn mwa, teste mwa, SEGNER, examinn mo lespri ek mo santiman.
26.3: To lamour infini gid mo pa, to fidelite diriz mo lavi.
26.4: Mo pa frekant dimounn malonet, ni mars ar bann ipokrit;
26.5: mo deteste bann ki viv dan pese e mo evit koste ar bann move dimounn.
26.6: Mo lav mo lame pou montre mo inosans; mo mars dan lapriyer otour to lotel, SEGNER.
26.7: Mo sant sante remersiman e rakont for-for tou bann mervey ki to finn fer.
26.8: O SEGNER, mo kontan lakaz kot to viv; e landrwa kot to laglwar li prezan.
26.9: Pa tret mwa parey dimounn ki dan pese; pa pran mo lavi kouma pran lavi bann kriminel;
26.10: zot lame ranpli ar trafik malprop; zot lame drwat pare pou aksepte gous.
26.11: Me mwa, mo viv enn lavi san repros; ena pitie, delivre mwa!
26.12: Mo lipie repoz lor fondasion solid; dan bann gran lasanble mo pou loue LESEGNER.

27.1: LESEGNER, limem mo lalimier; limem mo sover. Mo pena pou per personn. LESEGNER protez mwa kont tou danze; mo pena pou tranble devan personn.
27.2: Kan move dimounn atak mwa pou fer mwa ditor, mo bann adverser e bann lennmi zot ki kogne; zot ki tonbe.
27.3: Mem kan enn larme antour mwa mo leker pa per nanye; mem si lager deklare kont mwa mo lafwa res ferm.
27.4: Mo finn dimann LESEGNER enn sel zafer; zis enn zafer, pa plis: permet mwa viv dan lakaz LESEGNER pou touzour; permet mwa get avek admirasion magnifisans LESEGNER; e dimann li gid mwa.
27.5: Kan letan dir vini li pou gard mwa an sekirite dan so Tanp; li pou kasiet mwa anba so latant; li pou plas mwa an sekirite dan enn landrwa bien ot.
27.6: Lerla mo pou gagn laviktwar lor mo lennmi; dan lazwa san limit mo pou ofer sakrifis dan so Tanp e mo pou sant louanz e zwe lamizik pou LESEGNER.
27.7: Ekout mwa SEGNER, letan mo apel twa; ena pitie pou mwa, reponn mwa.
27.8: Mo leker dir, “Tourn twa ver LESEGNER!” Ver tomem ki mo tourne pou adore, SEGNER.
27.9: Pa tourn to ledo ar mwa! Pa abandonn to serviter fidel avek koler; to finn touletan soutenir mwa; pa rezet mwa, pa abandonn mwa, Bondie mo Sover.
27.10: Mama papa kapav abandonn zanfan me LESEGNER li pou touletan akeyir mwa, so zanfan.
27.11: Montre mwa SEGNER, seki bizin fer; ed mwa pran bon sime ki pena obstak, parski mo ena boukou lennmi.
27.12: Pa larg mwa dan grif mo lennmi ki servi mansonz bann fos temwin pou menas mwa avek violans.
27.13: Mwa mo sir mo pou trouv bonte LESEGNER isi dan sa lavi la.
27.14: Fer konfians LESEGNER. Gard lafwa, pa perdi kouraz. Atann LESEGNER ar konfians.

28.1: Ver twa, SEGNER, mo apel osekour! Tomem mo sitadel, pa refiz ekout mwa. Si to gard silans mo pou kouma bann ki desann dan trou lamor.
28.2: Pran mwa kont ler mo apel osekour; tann mo detres ler mo lev lame lao dan lapriyer ver to Tanp ki sin.
28.3: Pa met mwa dan mem panie ar move dimounn ki viv dan lemal, bann ki ena disik dan labous me fiel dan leker.
28.4: Pini zot pou zot move aksion, e dapre lemal ki zot finn fer; pini zot pou tou malpropte ki zot fer; e dapre seki zot merite.
28.5: Zot pa pran okenn kont travay LESEGNER, ni aksion ki so lame finn fer. Akoz samem li pou demolir zot e zame li pou re-batir zot.
28.6: Mo loue to nom SEGNER! LESEGNER finn tann mo lapriyer.
28.7: LESEGNER protez mwa, li defann mwa; mo finn met mo konfians dan li. Li ed mwa e li met lazwa dan mo leker. Ala kifer mo sant kantik pou dir li mersi.
28.8: LESEGNER limem lafors so pep; li fortres ki sov lerwa ki li finn konsakre.
28.9: SEGNER sov to pep e beni to dibien personel. Vinn zot berze e pran zot swin aster, pli divan e touletan.

29.1: Donn LESEGNER, zot bann kreatir lesiel, donn LESEGNER so laglwar ek so pouvwar.
29.2: Donn LESEGNER laglwar ki so nom merite, ador LESEGNER ki sin, ler li paret dan so mazeste.
29.3: Lavwa LESEGNER rezone lor lamer; Bondie laglwar rezone kouma toner, LESEGNER rezone lor tou bann losean.
29.4: Lavwa LESEGNER ranpli ar pwisans. Lavwa LESEGNER ranpli ar mazeste.
29.5: Lavwa LESEGNER frakas bann pie, pie pli for ki ena dan Liban;
29.6: Li fer montagn Liban sot-sote kouma ti vo; e montagn Ermon sot-sote kouma ti toro.
29.8: Lavwa LESEGNER fer dezer tranble, mem dezer dan Kades tranble.
29.9: Bann gran pie tranble ar lavwa LESEGNER; tou fey dan lafore grene. Lerla adorater LESEGNER kriye, “Laglwar pou Twa Bondie.”
29.10: LESEGNER lor so tronn dominn tou bann losean. LESEGNER limem lerwa eternel.
29.11: LESEGNER donn lafors so pep, ki LESEGNER beni so pep e donn li lape.

30.1: Mo proklam to grander, SEGNER, parski to finn sov mwa e to finn anpes mo lennmi imilie mwa.
30.2: O SEGNER, mo Bondie, mo ti kriye osekour e to ti geri mwa;
30.3: SEGNER to remont mwa pou lamor pa anglouti mwa. Mo ti pe al ver trou lamor me to ti re-donn mwa lavi.
30.4: Zot tou bann fidel sant louanz LESEGNER! Selebre so nom ki sin, e dir li mersi.
30.5: So koler tengn vit me so bonte li permanan. Si aswar larm kapav koule gramatin lazwa briye.
30.6: Mo ti santi momem an sekirite e mo ti dir, “Mo pa pou konn defet.”
30.7: SEGNER, to ti bien bon anver mwa; to proteksion ti kouma enn sitadel lor montagn. Me ler to ti tourn to ledo ar mwa mo ti gagn bien per.
30.8: Ver twa mo ti kriye osekour, SEGNER; mo ti sipliy lesegner,
30.9: “Ki lavantaz ena dan mo lamor, si mo desann dan lafos lamor? Eski lapousier pou sant to laglwar? Eski zot kapav proklam to fidelite?
30.10: SEGNER, ekout mwa! Pran mwa kont! Ed mwa SEGNER!”
30.11: To finn fer mo tristes vinn enn ladans ki exprim lazwa; to finn efas mo sagrin e plonz mwa dan boner,
30.12: pou ki mo leker loue twa, e pa gard silans! Bizin sant to grander. SEGNER, twa ki mo Bondie, mo pa pou aret dir twa mersi.

31.1: Mo vinn ver twa, SEGNER, pou dimann proteksion; pa les mwa tom dan laont; dan to fidelite, delivre mwa.
31.2: Ekout mo lapriyer; vinn delivre mwa vit. Tomem sitadel ki protez mwa; tomem fortres ki sov mwa.
31.3: Twa ki mo sitadel ek mo fortres gid mwa e montre mwa bon sime.
31.4: Anpes mwa tom dan piez ki finn plase pou mwa, parski tomem mo proteksion kont danze.
31.5: Mo finn met mo lavi dan to lame; to delivre mwa, SEGNER, Bondie fidel.
31.6: To ayir bann ki ador fos bondie; mwa, mo met tou mo konfians dan LESEGNER.
31.7: Mo selebre lazwa ek boner dan to lamour infini parski to konn mo soufrans ek traka ki pe kraz mwa.
31.8: To finn anpes mo lennmi may mwa; to finn kas mo lasenn, to finn donn mwa laliberte.
31.9: SEGNER, ena pitie pou mwa parski mo dan tourman; mo lizie bien fay parski mo larm finn bril li; mo lekor antie feb ek mo fatige;
31.10: Gro sagrin finn rwinn mo lasante e larm pe ris mwa ver lamor. Mo bann tor finn afebli mwa e mo lezo pe deperi.
31.11: Mo lennmi, sirtou mo prop vwazin mepriz mwa; bann ki konn mwa zot per mwa; kan zot trouv mwa, zot sove al kasiet.
31.12: Dimounn finn fini bliye mwa, koumadir mo finn fini mor; mo initil kouma lasiet ki finn brize.
31.13: Mo tann mo lennmi pe mirmire; dife lor mwa partou kote. Zot pe tir plan kont mwa; zot pe konplote pou touy mwa.
31.14: Me mo met tou mo konfians an twa, O SEGNER; mo dir, “Twa ki mo Bondie.”
31.15: Mo bann zour dan to lame; protez mwa kont mo lennmi; ed mwa kont seki pe persekit mwa.
31.16: Ki lalimier to prezans briy lor mwa, to serviter; sov mwa dan to lamour infini.
31.17: Pa les mwa tom dan laont, SEGNER, parski mo finn kriye ver twa; me ki move dimounn konn laont, les zot koule an silans dan trou lamor.
31.18: Ferm zot labous dan silans lamor! Zot ki bann gran manter insolan ek arogan ki zet labou lor dimounn ki viv drwat.
31.19: Li vreman gran sa bonte ki to rezerve pou dimounn ki ena respe pou twa! Devan lizie tou dimounn to montre to bonte pou bann ki fer twa konfians.
31.20: To prezans garanti zot sekirite e anpes zot tom dan piez bann maniganser; dan labri kot to finn kasiet zot, insilt zot lennmi pa pe reisi fer zot dimal.
31.21: Tou louanz pou LESEGNER! Li merveye, manier li ti donn mwa so lamour infini ler lennmi ti pe anserkle mwa pou atake!
31.22: Mo ti dezanpare ek trouble, mo ti krwar Bondie ti finn abandonn mwa. Me li ti tann mwa ler mo kriye osekour.
31.23: Ador LESEGNER zot so bann fidel! LESEGNER protez bann krwayan; Li pini bann vantar, ki pou pey doub.
31.24: Pa bes lebra; pa perdi kouraz zot tou ki finn met zot lesperans dan LESEGNER.

32.1: Bienere sa dimounn ki so ofans efase, ki so pese pardone!
32.2: Bienere bann dimounn lor ki LESEGNER pa met okenn sarz, e LESEGNER deklare ki pena frod dan so leker.
32.3: Kan mo pa ti konfes mo pese sa ti ronz mwa lanwit-lizour, mo ti deperi.
32.4: Lanwit-lizour to lame ti koriz mwa; mo lafors koumans fonn kouma laroze ler soley leve.
32.5: Lerla mo ti desid pou konfes mo pese ar twa; pa ti kasiet okenn fot. Mo dir, “Mo bizin konfes mo pese avek LESEGNER.” E twa to ti pardonn mwa.
32.6: Akoz sa tou to bann serviter fidel bizin priye twa kan problem leve; kan inondasion pe fons lor zot, zot kone zot ena to proteksion.
32.7: Tomem mo labri; twa ki protez mwa ler siklonn pe tape, e bann sante lor to delivrans pou partou otour mwa.
32.8: Mo pou ansegn twa e montre twa ki sime bizin pran; Mo pou gid twa e konsey twa.
32.9: Pa fer teti kouma seval ek bourik ki zis konpran kravas ek brid; lerla nanye pa pou ariv twa.
32.10: Lasoufrans pe atann bann ki fer lemal me bann ki met zot konfians dan LESEGNER zot proteze par so lamour infini.
32.11: Zot ki viv dan drwatir, dans avek lazwa dan LESEGNER! Kriye zot lazwa, zot ki ena leker drwat.

33.1: Tou ki viv dan drwatir sant for-for zot lazwa dan LESEGNER. Li bon sant so louanz tou dimounn ki obeir li.
33.2: Dir mersi LESEGNER ar lagitar; selebre li ar lamizik lor sitar.
33.3: Sant sante ki zorey pa finn ankor tande; zwe bann instriman ar talan e kriy zot lazwa.
33.4: Parol LESEGNER zot vre; tou seki li fer, zot parfe dan so fidelite.
33.5: LESEGNER kontan tou seki drwat ek zis; So lamour infini prezan partou lor later.
33.6: LESEGNER ti kree liniver par so parol; par souf so labous li ti donn nesans soley, lalinn ek zetwal.
33.7: Li ramas tou dilo dan enn sel plas; li met tou bann losean dan enn ladig imans.
33.8: Later antie bizin ador LESEGNER! Tou bann abitan dan lemond bizin ena gran respe divan li!
33.9: Li pronons parol, li kree lemond; Li donn lord, liniver pran nesans.
33.10: LESEGNER kas plan bann diferan popilasion; Li anpes zot realiz zot bann proze.
33.11: Me LESEGNER so plan li res valab touletan; so proze li res vivan eternelman.
33.12: Enn nasion li ere kan LESEGNER limem so Bondie, enn pep li bienere si LESEGNER finn swazir li kouma so prop dibien.
33.13: Depi lesiel LESEGNER get limanite anba;
33.14: depi so tronn lao li obzerv tou bann abitan lor later.
33.15: Limem ki ti form zot leker e li kone tou seki zot fer.
33.16: Enn lerwa pa gagn lager zis parski so larme gran ek for; enn solda pa gagn laviktwar zis parski li fizikman for;
33.17: bon seval pa ase pou amenn laviktwar; zis so lafors pa ase pou sov so kavalie.
33.18: LESEGNER vey lor bann ki ena respe pou li; bann ki fer konfians so lamour infini.
33.19: Li anpes lamor koste e li nouri zot, mem kan lafaminn pe fer ravaz.
33.20: Avek lespwar nou atann lor LESEGNER; li protez nou e li ed nou.
33.21: Limem ki donn lazwa ki dan nou leker, nou ena konfians dan Bondie ki sin.
33.22: SEGNER, donn nou touletan to lamour infini parski nou lespwar li zis dan twa.

34.1: Touletan mo pou remersie LESEGNER; zame mo pa pou aret sant so louanz.
34.2: Mo pou loue li pou tou seki li finn fer; bann ki dan soufrans, ekout mwa e ki lazwa ranpli zot leker.
34.3: Ansam ar mwa anou proklam grander LESEGNER; anou sant ansam laglwar LESEGNER.
34.4: Mo ti dimann LESEGNER vinn ed mwa e li ti reponn, li ti balie prop tou mo bann angwas.
34.5: Bann ki fer li konfians zot dan bien; zot pena laont lor zot figir.
34.6: Enn malere kriy osekour; LESEGNER finn tann li, e finn sov li dan tou so detres.
34.7: So bann anz kanp otour bann ki respekte LESEGNER, e li sov zot.
34.8: Goute e gete kouma LESEGNER li bon. Bienere bann ki swazir so proteksion.
34.9: Zot tou zot bizin onor LESEGNER parski bann ki obeir so instriksion zame pa pou mank nanye.
34.10: Bann dimounn pwisan kapav konn lafin ek laswaf, me bann ki obeir LESEGNER pou touletan gagn seki zot bizin.
34.11: Vini zenes, koste kot mwa; les mo montre zot kouma respekte LESEGNER.
34.12: To anvi viv bien? To anvi viv lontan dan lazwa?
34.13: Alor aret koz lemal; aret koz manti.
34.14: Evit lemal e fer dibien; fer zefor pou ki lape fleri partou.
34.15: LESEGNER protez bann ki dan bon sime e li ekout zot douler;
34.16: LESEGNER deteste bann ki dan lemal e ler zot mor zot disparet dan memwar bann dimounn.
34.17: Bann ki dan bon sime apel osekour, LESEGNER tann zot, li tir zot dan zot langwas.
34.18: LESEGNER li touletan pre ar seki pe perdi kouraz; li replant lespwar kot lespwar finn mor.
34.19: Dimounn ki obeir Bondie fer fas boukou traka me LESEGNER delivre li dan tousala;
34.20: li vey lor tou lezo dimounn-la, pa enn sel pou brize.
34.21: Lemal li detrir bann ki fer lemal; bann ki ayir bon dimounn zame zot pou sape.
34.22: LESEGNER pou touletan sov so pep; bann ki al ver li pou gagn so proteksion e pa pou gagn kondanasion.

35.1: SEGNER, atak bann ki pe atak mwa; lager ar seki lager ar mwa.
35.2: Met to larmir e pran to lepe pou vinn ed mwa.
35.3: Servi to lans ek to lars kont lennmi ki pe pourswiv mwa. Dir mwa, “Momem ki pou sov twa.”
35.4: Fer bann ki rod touy mwa zwenn defet ek laont; fer bann ki konplote kont mwa oblize sove dan konfizion;
35.5: fer ki divan balie zot kouma lapay ler mesaze LESEGNER tay deryer zot;
35.6: fer zot sime vinn nwar ek glisan ler mesaze LESEGNER tay deryer zot.
35.7: San okenn rezon zot finn met latrap pou may mwa; San okenn rezon zot finn fouy trou profon pou piez mwa.
35.8: Me larwinn pou kraz zot avan zot realize; zot pou may dan zot prop piez e fini dan trou ki zot finn fouye.
35.9: Lerla mo pou dan lazwa akoz LESEGNER, e dan gran boner, parski LESEGNER finn sov mwa.
35.10: Ar lazwa dan leker mo pou dir for-for, “SEGNER, pena to segon! To anpes seki for fer dominer ar seki feb; To anpes bann ris kraz seki pov.”
35.11: Bann fos temwin leve kont mwa; zot interoz mwa lor zafer ki zame mo finn fer.
35.12: Pou dibien ki mo fer, zot rann mwa lemal; zot tou abandonn mwa.
35.13: Me kan zot ti dan douler, mo ti met linz dey; mo ti zene ek priye. Mo ti azenou pou priye,
35.14: kouma mo ti pou fer pou enn kamarad ouswa enn frer. Mo ti kourbe ar sagrin koumadir mo mama ti mor.
35.15: Me kan mwa mo kogne mo tonbe, zot bien riy mwa, dan lazwa zot rasanble kont mwa; bann vwayou ki mo mem pa rekonet maltret mwa san pitie.
35.16: San pitie zot boufonn mwa kouma bann ti-lespri; zot grins zot ledan pou montre zot laenn.
35.17: Komie letan ankor to pou les zot fer mwa mizer? Defann mwa e sov mo lavi; aras mo lavi dan grif lion.
35.18: Mo pou remersie twa dan gran lasanble; mo pou dir to louanz omilie lafoul.
35.19: Pa les mo lennmi selebre laviktwar lor mwa, Pa les bann ki ena zis laenn dan leker gagn lamizman dan mo maler.
35.20: Zot pena okenn koze lor lape, zot pas zot letan fer fos akizasion lor dimounn ki viv trankil dan pei.
35.21: Zot ouver zot labous an gran, zot dir, “Nou kone ki to ti fer!”
35.22: O SEGNER, to finn bien trouv tousala; pa gard silans. Pa res lwin ar mwa, Segner!
35.23: Lev twa, Bondie, pou fer zistis pou mwa; Revey twa, Segner, pou defann mwa mo drwa!
35.24: Twa ki vre drwatir, SEGNER, mo Bondie, proklam mo inosans; pa les mo lennmi pran plezir dan mo soufrans.
35.25: Pa donn zot porte pou dir, “Aster nou finn avoy li manze pou touletan. Samem nou ti le.”
35.26: Bann ki kontan kan mwa mo soufer ki zot konn laont ek konfizion; Bann ki reklam viktwar lor mwa ki zot antoure ar laont ek dezoner.
35.27: Bann ki dezir trouv lazistis dan mo faver ki zot kriye ar boner ek lazwa; zot pou dir ek re-dir, “LESEGNER, limem pli gran. Li trouv plezir dan boner so serviter!”
35.28: E mwa mo pou proklam to drwatir e sant to louanz tout lazourne.

36.1: Dan mo leker mo mazinn koze move dimounn ki dir, “Mo pa trouve kifer bizin tranble divan Bondie.”
36.2: Zot telman flat zotmem ki zot pa rekonet zot fot, ni deteste zot pese.
36.3: So labous plin ar kalomni ek mansonz; li tourn so ledo ar lasazes, li aret fer dibien.
36.4: Li tir plan pou fer ditor kan li pe alonze lor so lili; li angaz limem pou swiv move sime, li pa rezet lemal.
36.5: SEGNER, to lamour infini al tous lesiel, to fidelite mont ziska bann niaz.
36.6: To drwatir li pli ot ki montagn pli ot; to lazistis gran ek profon kouma losean. SEGNER, to prezerv dimounn ek zanimo.
36.7: Bondie, to lamour infini samem nou pli gran trezor; anba to lezel tou dimounn santi zot an sekirite;
36.8: dan labondans to lakaz, to konble zot ar manze, zot bwar dan larivier to bonte.
36.9: Tomem lasours lavi e to lalimier ekler nou lavi.
36.10: Donn to lamour dimounn ki rekonet to grander e lazistis bann ki ena leker drwat.
36.11: Pa permet bann fezer kraz mwa anba zot lipie, e pa les lame move dimounn sas mwa.
36.12: Get laba! Bann move dimounn pe manz lapousier. Pena zot releve.

37.1: Pa les move dimounn fatig to latet; pa bizin zalou dimounn malonet.
37.2: Vit-vit zot pou sek kouma lerb ki griye ar soley; kouma fey ver vit-vit zot fletri.
37.3: Fer konfians LESEGNER e fer dibien; viv an sekirite lor later ki LESEGNER finn donn twa.
37.4: Si to rod to boner dan LESEGNER li pou donn twa dezir ki ena dan to leker.
37.5: Donn LESEGNER to lavi, met to konfians dan li, e li pou ed twa;
37.6: to drwatir pou briye kouma soley levan, e to lazistis kouma soley midi.
37.7: Gard silans divan LESEGNER, atann avek pasians; pa fatig to lespri ar sikse bann move dimounn ki paret pe reisi ar zot move plan.
37.8: Pa les lakoler oubien traka fatig twa; sinon to kapav mal fini.
37.9: Bann ki pratik lemal pou elimine, bann ki finn met zot konfians dan LESEGNER zot pou posed later.
37.10: Ankor enn tigit letan bann ki fer lemal pou disparet; rode kouma ou rode, ou pa pou trouv zot.
37.11: Bon dimounn pou erit later e zot pou viv enn lavi prosper ek pezib.
37.12: Bann move dimounn fer konplo kont bon dimounn e zot grins zot ledan ar laenn.
37.13: Sa fer LESEGNER riy zot, li kone zot pou zwenn zot lafin vit-vit.
37.14: Bann move dimounn fit kouto, prepar zarm pou touy bann pov e bann malere; pou asasinn bann ki viv lavi drwat;
37.15: me zot prop zarm pou fini zot e zot zarm pou kas bout par bout.
37.16: Sa ti trezor ki enn bon dimounn posede la, li vo plis ki tou larises ki tou bann modi posede.
37.17: Zarm bann ki fer lemal pou brize, me LESEGNER soutenir bann ki viv drwat.
37.18: LESEGNER konn lavi bann ki obeir li e zot pou posed sa pei-la pou touzour.
37.19: Kan move sezon vini, zot pa pou soufer; kan lafaminn rantre, zot pa pou mordefin.
37.20: Me bann ki fer lemal pou mor; lennmi LESEGNER pou mor kouma fler sovaz dan soley; zot pou disparet kouma lafime dan koudvan.
37.21: Move dimounn kontan pran prete me zame li ranbourse; bon dimounn li zenere e li kontan partaze.
37.22: Kan LESEGNER beni ou, ou pou okip later; me si li modi ou, pa pou ena plas pou ou okenn plas.
37.23: LESEGNER gid nou lor bon sime e li protez bann ki swiv drwatir.
37.24: Si zame enn bon dimounn tonbe vit-vit LESEGNER pou ed li leve.
37.25: Aster mo vie; mo finn viv bien lontan; e zame, ou tande, zame mo finn zwenn enn fidel ki LESEGNER finn abandone; zame mo finn trouv so bann zanfan mandie dipin.
37.26: Touletan li zenere e li ed lezot e so zanfan zot enn benediksion pou li.
37.27: Rezet lemal e fer dibien, zot pou kontinie viv lor later promiz
37.28: parski LESEGNER kontan drwatir e li pa abandonn so serviter fidel. Zot gagn so proteksion touletan me desandan move dimounn pou perdi tou.
37.29: Bann ki swiv bon sime pou posed later e viv lor la pou touletan.
37.30: Parol ki bon dimounn koze li ena sazes ek zistis.
37.31: Dan profon so leker li gard lalwa Bondie e nanye pa kapav fer li tonbe.
37.32: Move dimounn vey bon dimounn dan kwin lizie e vey moman pou touy inosan;
37.33: me LESEGNER pa pou les lemal fer ravaz ouswa les bann inosan pey pou koupab dan zizman.
37.34: Met lespwar dan LESEGNER e ekout so konsey; li pou donn ou loner vinn proprieter ou later; parkont bann move dimounn pou perdi tou.
37.35: Mo ti konn enn move dimounn ki ti enn dominer; li ti dominn lezot, koumadir enn gro pie lafours.
37.36: Inpe pli tar ler mo ti pas dan mem landrwa so bout pa ti trouve. Rod li partou. Introuvab!
37.37: Pran kont bon dimounn; get konportman dimounn drwat. Dimounn ki travay pou lape li ena desandan;
37.38: bann ki dan pese, enn zour pa enn zour, zot fini net. Zot pa kit nanye deryer zot.
37.39: LESEGNER sov bann dimounn drwat e li protez zot kan zot dan difikilte.
37.40: Li ed zot, li delivre zot. Li delivre zot dan grif bann ki fer lemal, li sov zot, parski zot finn al rod sekour kot li.

38.1: SEGNER, mem to ankoler, pa kondann mwa; malgre to gran koler, pa pini mwa.
38.2: To bann fles finn pers-pers mwa, to lame finn abat lor mwa.
38.3: Akoz to koler, mo ena douler partou; akoz mo pese, maladi fann dan tou mo lezo.
38.4: Mo pe nwaye dan kaskad pese; fardo-la tro lour pou sarye.
38.5: Akoz mo prop betiz mo blesir santi pi, pe fer infeksion;
38.6: mo korde ar douler, tout lazourne mo dan lapenn.
38.7: Lafiev pe bril mwa; pena lasante dan mo lekor.
38.8: Mo pena lafors. Mo kas-kase. Mo leker pe soufer, mo nek plengne.
38.9: Segner, to kone ki mo bann dezir ete. To tann mwa plengne ar douler;
38.10: mo leker bat for-for; mo gagn febles e mo trouv som.
38.11: Kamarad ek vwazin pa koste ar mwa akoz mo infeksion; mem mo fami pa frekant mwa.
38.12: Seki anvi touy mwa, pe met piez partou; bann ki pe rod fer mwa ditor, menas pou kas-kas mwa; zot pas zot letan konplote.
38.13: Mo kouma bann sourd, nepli tann bien; mo lalang amare, pa kapav koze.
38.14: Mo kouma enn dimounn ki nepli tande, mo pa kone ki pou reponn.
38.15: Mo finn met mo lespwar an twa, SEGNER; twa Segner, mo Bondie, to pou exos mo lapriyer.
38.16: Mo priye, “Pa les mo lennmi gagn lokazion riy mwa; pa les zot pran plezir trouv mwa glise ek tonbe.”
38.17: Mo lafin bien pre; douler fer mwa korde.
38.18: Mo konfes mo fot mo regret mo pese.
38.19: Mo bann lennmi paret bien for. Parmi, boukou ayir mwa san rezon.
38.20: Bann ki retourn lemal pou lebien akiz mwa parski mwa mo finn swazir bon sime.
38.21: Pa abandonn mwa, SEGNER; Mo Bondie pa res lwin ar mwa.
38.22: Pa tarde pou ed mwa, Segner, mo Sover.

39.1: Mo ti dir, “Mo pou fer atansion seki mo fer; atansion mo fer pese ar seki mo dir; dan prezans move dimounn mo pa pou dir nanye.”
39.2: Mo ti ferm mo labous mem kan ti ena bon kiksoz pou dir. Me mo douler ti ogmante
39.3: e traka ti touf mwa. Plis mo reflesi, plis mo lespri trouble; mo oblize dimande,
39.4: “SEGNER, komie letan mo pou viv? Dir mwa komie letan reste. Lerla mo pou kone ki lavi bien kourt.”
39.5: Bann zour ki ena pou viv larzer lame. Mo lavi antie pa reprezant gran soz pou twa. Lavi dimounn li zis enn ti labriz,
39.6: dimounn ale vini kouma enn lonbraz. Tou seki nou fer pa vo nanye; nou ramas enn fortinn me pa kone kisann-la pou erite.
39.7: Aster-la, SEGNER, ki ena pou mo atann? Mo finn met mo lesperans an twa.
39.8: Delivre mwa dan tou mo bann pese, pa les bann ti-lespri sikann mwa.
39.9: Mo ferm mo labous! Refiz koze! Mo kone ki twa ki finn azir koumsa.
39.10: Aret tap lor mwa! To bann kou pe tir mo lavi.
39.11: To koriz ek disiplinn bann imin pou zot pese, to ronz zot trezor kouma enn insek ronz enn fri. Lavi dimounn li zis enn ti labriz.
39.12: Ekout mo lapriyer, SEGNER; tann mo douler kriye; vinn ed enn malere ki pe soufer. Kouma tou mo bann anset, mo enn etranze, mo vizit kot twa li bien kourt.
39.13: Donn mwa inpe repi, pou mo regagn enn sourir, avan mo gran depar.

40.1: Mo ti atann, atann mem, sekour LESEGNER; Li ti ekout mwa e li ti tann mwa kriye.
40.2: Li ti tir mwa depi dan trou lamor; fer mwa sap dan marekaz san fon, li ti poz mo lipie lor enn baz solid, danze napa koste, la kot mo marse.
40.3: Li ti montre mwa enn nouvo sante; montre mwa sant louanz Bondie. Boukou pou konpran, pou montre respe, e pou met zot konfians dan LESEGNER.
40.4: Bienere bann ki fer konfians LESEGNER, zot ki rezet idolatri ou ki refiz swiv bann fos bondie.
40.5: Zot vremem boukou, SEGNER, mo Bondie, bann mirak ek bann mervey ki to finn fer pou nou. Pena to segon! Mo anvi rakonte, rakonte mem, me konte fini, ankor ena mervey pou rakonte.
40.6: To pa bizin ofrand ek sakrifis; to finn donn mwa zorey pou tande. To pa bizin sakrifis ki bril zanimo ouswa sakrifis pou lav pese.
40.7: Lerla mo dir, “Ala mo la Bondie! Dan liv sakre mo trouv seki finn ekrir pou mwa.
40.8: Mo ena boukou plezir obeir to volonte, Bondie. Mo finn grav to lalwa dan mo leker.”
40.9: Dan lasanble kot to pep ti reini mo ti fer deklarasion ki LESEGNER finn sov nou. Nanye pa pou fer mwa aret proklam for-for sa laverite-la;
40.10: mo pa finn gard nouvel to delivrans la zis pou mwa. Mo finn koz ki to fidel e ki to sov nou, mo pa finn kasiet to lamour infini e to lwayote dan lasanble tou bann fidel.
40.11: Pa refiz mwa to konpasion, SEGNER, ki to lamour infini ek to laverite touletan protez mwa.
40.12: Traka partou otour mwa, tro boukou pou konte. Mo bann pese finn anvayir mwa, zot anpes mwa trouv kler. Zot plis ki seve lor mo latet zot fer mwa perdi kouraz.
40.13: Sov mwa, SEGNER, SEGNER, degaze ed mwa.
40.14: Ki bann ki pe rod mo lamor plonz dan laont ek konfizion; bann ki dezir trouv mo maler, fer zot konn defet ek imiliasion;
40.15: bann ki sikane ek moke fer zot gout defet e zot labous ferme.
40.16: Bann ki vinn ver twa, donn zot lazwa ek boner! Bann ki kontan twa kouma zot Sover, pou touletan dir, “LESEGNER pli gran ki tou!”
40.17: Mo feb ek pov, Segner, me zame to finn bliye mwa. Tomem mo sover, mo liberater, mo Bondie, pa tarde pou ed mwa!

41.1: Bienere dimounn ki pran kont ek ed bann pov kan zot dan difikilte, LESEGNER pou delivre zot.
41.2: LESEGNER protez ek gard zot vivan; zot ere lor later. To pa abandonn zot dan lame zot lennmi.
41.3: LESEGNER pou pran zot swin ler zot malad e refer zot vinn fringan.
41.4: Mo ti konfese, “Mo finn fer pese kont twa SEGNER; pardonn mwa e donn mwa gerizon.”
41.5: Bann ki deteste mwa zot kalomnie mwa; zot swete ki mo mor e ki mo nom disparet.
41.6: Mem bann ki rann mwa vizit zot pa sinser; zot vinn tir linformasion e lerla zot fann rimer.
41.7: Tann zot pe mirmire dan zorey zot vwazin! Zot pe priye ki mo fini mal.
41.8: Zot dir, “Li pa pou sape ar sa maladi-la! Pena li sape sann-fwa la!”
41.9: Mem mo meyer kamarad, mo ti kapav met lame dan dife pou li; nou ti partaz tou li mars ar bann-la aster.
41.10: Me twa, SEGNER, par pitie re-donn mwa lasante e lerla mo fer mo lennmi peye.
41.11: Mo kone ki to ena afeksion pou mwa, parski mo lennmi pa finn gagn viktwar lor mwa.
41.12: To finn relev mwa akoz mo lintegrite, to pou gard mwa dan to prezans eternelman.
41.13: Laglwar pou Twa SEGNER, Bondie Izrael, aster, pli divan ek touletan. Amen! Amen!

42.1: Parey kouma serf rod dilo kler larivier, mwa mo rod to prezans, mo Bondie.
42.2: Mo swaf pou Bondie, Bondie vivan. Kan mo pou kapav rant dan to lakaz pou prezant mwa devan twa, pou ador twa?
42.3: Lanwit-lizour mo plore; zis larm ki plin mo vant. Letansa mo bann lennmi persiste dir, “Kot to Bondie ete?”
42.4: Mo leker segne ler mo rapel lepase kan ansam dan lafoul nou ti al ver lakaz Bondie; kan mo ti pe gid laprosesion lor bon sime. Nou ti telman ere letan nou ti pe sant for-for nou rekonesans ek nou lazwa!
42.5: Kifer mo tris koumsa? Kifer traka touf mwa? Mo bizin met mo lesperans dan Bondie parski mo pou loue li ankor, mo Protekter e mo Sover.
42.6: La kot mo ete an-exil, mo leker soufer alor mo re-pans twa,
42.7: la kot kouran, vag ek kaskad dilo depi Montagn Ermon ek Mizar devers dan Larivier Zourdin e vir-vir mwa anba-lao.
42.8: Lizour LESEGNER donn mwa so lamour infini touletan pou ki aswar mo kapav sant louanz mo Bondie e priye li, limem mo lavi.
42.9: Mo dir Bondie, mo protekter, “Kifer to finn abandonn mwa? Kifer mo bizin kontinie soufer persekision mo lennmi?”
42.10: Mo soufer ziska mo lezo fermal, kan bann adverser insilte mwa, kan zot persiste dir, “Kot to Bondie ete?”
42.11: Kifer mo tris koumsa? Kifer traka touf mwa? Mo bizin met mo lesperans dan Bondie parski mo pou loue li ankor, mo Sover e mo Bondie.

43.1: O Bondie, pran mo par; proklam mo inosans, defann mwa kont bann dimounn infidel; delivre mwa dan grif bann manter ek move dimounn.
43.2: Tomem Bondie ki mo protekter! Kifer to finn abandonn mwa? Kifer mo bizin kontinie soufer persekision mo lennmi?
43.3: Avoy to lalimier ek to laverite; fer zot gid mwa lor sime ki amenn nou ver Sion, montagn sakre, e dan to Tanp kot to reste.
43.4: Lerla mo pou al divan to lotel, O Bondie, twa ki lasours mo boner. Ar sitar mo pou sant to louanz, O Bondie, mo Bondie!
43.5: Kifer mo tris koumsa? Kifer traka touf mwa? Mo bizin met mo lesperans dan Bondie e kontinie loue li, mo Sover e mo Bondie.

44.1: Ar nou prop zorey nou finn tande, Bondie, nou gran-dimounn finn rakont bann gran mirak ki to ti fer dan zot lepok, letan lontan:
44.2: ki manier to ti depouy bann nasion ki swiv idol pou donn to pep zot later; ki manier to ti pini bann pep infidel pou fer pep ki ti swiv twa epanouir.
44.3: Pa kapav dir ki to pep ti gagn pei ar lafors zot lepe; zot pa ti gagne akoz zot larme ti for. Zot ti gagne gras-a to pwisans ek to lafors; zot ti gagne par lalimier to prezans, parski to kontan zot.
44.4: Tomem mo lerwa e mo Bondie; se twa ki donn laviktwar to pep;
44.5: gras-a twa nou lennmi gagn defet; gras-a twa nou kraz nou adverser.
44.6: Mo pa fer konfians mo zarm; pa mo lepe ki pou donn mwa laviktwar.
44.7: Me to kraz nou lennmi; to kouver nou adverser ar laont.
44.8: Akoz sa nou pou sant to louanz e nou touzour pou dir twa mersi.
44.9: Pourtan to finn rezet nou ek imilie nou; to nepli mars ar nou bann larme.
44.10: To les bann-la bat nou; to les nou lennmi depouy nou.
44.11: To les nou kouma mouton dan labatwar; to les zot dispers nou lwin, parmi lezot nasion.
44.12: To finn vann nou pou dipin-diber, koumadir nou pa vo nanye.
44.13: Nou enn size insilt parmi lezot nasion. Ala zot sikane! Ala zot riye!
44.14: Partou nou enn size ki fer riye; nou lennmi boufonn nou, mepriz nou.
44.15: Lanwit-lizour mo maler li divan mwa, ek laont kouver mo fron
44.16: letan mo tann insilt e blasfem parski bann lennmi pe rod tir vanzans.
44.17: Tousala finn ariv nou. Pourtan nou pa finn bliye twa! Pourtan nou pa finn kas lalians ki existe ant twa ek nou!
44.18: Nou leker pa finn bliye twa, nou pa finn kit larout ki to finn trase.
44.19: To finn kraz nou dan dezer, pei zanimo sovaz; to abandonn nou dan marenwar.
44.20: Si koumadir nou ti bliye nou Bondie e priye enn bondie etranze
44.21: to ti pou may nou anplin parski to konn nou panse profon.
44.22: Akoz nou lamour pou twa, pe trenn nou kouma mouton, pe amenn nou labatwar.
44.23: Ayo Segner, leve! Kifer to pe dormi? Leve! Pa abandonn nou!
44.24: Pa zwe kasiet ar nou! Pran kont nou soufrans ek nou douler!
44.25: Nou finn tom an gran dan lapousier; nou pe ranpe dan later.
44.26: Lev twa, vinn ed nou! Sov nou akoz to lamour infini.

45.1: Mo leker deborde ar zoli parol ler mo konpoz sa poem-la pou mo lerwa. Parol poetik koule kouma lank dan plim enn ekrivin ki konn so metie.
45.2: Parmi tou bann zom, ala ou gayar Segner! Ou stil koze ena elegans. Alor Bondie finn touletan beni ou.
45.3: O lerwa pwisan, met lepe dan sintir e montre ou grander ek ou pouvwar.
45.4: Kouma enn gran lerwa, mars ver laviktwar pou defann laverite, limilite e lazistis. Ou pwisans pou demontre bann gran aksion.
45.5: Ou fles pwint transpers leker ou lennmi; bann tribi tom dan ou lipie.
45.6: Rwayom ki Bondie finn donn ou li pou regne pou touletan. Ou diriz ou pep dan lazistis;
45.7: ou kontan lazistis; ou deteste seki move. Akoz sa Bondie, ou Bondie, finn swazir ou, e finn aroz lor ou latet delwil benediksion, lonksion ki okenn lezot lerwa pa finn resevwar.
45.8: Ou linz parfime ar parfin rar, lalwes e kanel; bann artis diverti ou dan sato dekore ar lor ek ivwar.
45.9: Bann fidoner ki dan lakour rwayal zot bann prinses renome; adrwat ou tronn ou bieneme pe diboute; so linz ek so bizou garni ar meyer lor ki existe.
45.10: Nouvel marye, ekout mwa bien! Bliye ou nasion ek ou fami.
45.11: Lerwa atire par ou bote; akoz li ou segner, rann li loner e obeir li.
45.12: Lepep Tir pou donn ou boukou kado; bann ki ena fortinn pou fer tou pou fer ou plezir.
45.13: Laprinses dan sato! Get kouma li zoli! So manto brode ar difil lor.
45.14: Bann fidoner finn akonpagn li, amenn li kot lerwa; so manto manifik li kouler larkansiel.
45.15: Lazwa ek boner akonpagn prosesion rwayal.
45.16: O segner lerwa, ou bann garson pou kontinie ou regn; ou pou fer zot vinn bann prins lor antie later.
45.17: Mo sante pou fer ou nom seleb zenerasion apre zenerasion, ziska lafin letan tou bann pep pou sant ou laglwar.

46.1: Bondie, limem nou protekter, lasours nou lafors; kan difikilte pe kraze partou Li touzour la pou ed nou.
46.2: Akoz sa nou pa per kan later tranble ouswa kan montagn al fonn dan fon lamer;
46.3: nou pena pou per mem kan lamer leve ek kime e li sakouy montagn avek violans.
46.4: Ena enn larivier ki amenn lazwa dan lavil Bondie, dan lakaz ki pli sin, lakaz Bondie Pli Lao.
46.5: Bondie omilie so lavil ki pa pou konn destriksion; letan soley leve, li fini la pou donn sekour.
46.6: Bann tribi tranble; bann rwayom degringole; Bondie koze kouma toner, later fonn.
46.7: LESEGNER Toupwisan li touletan ar nou! Bondie ki Zakob ti priye limem nou protekter.
46.8: Vini, vinn get avek admirasion grander LESEGNER; vinn get ravaz ki li finn fer lor later.
46.9: Li finn aret lager ki ena partou dan lemond; kas-kas bann zarm an morso e bril lekipman militer dan enn gran dife.
46.10: “Arete “li dir” e rekonet ki momem Bondie; pa bliye, mo regn lor tou nasion; mo regn lor liniver.”
46.11: LESEGNER Toupwisan Li touletan ar nou! Bondie ki Zakob ti priye limem nou fortres.

47.1: Tou dimounn lemond antie tap lame for-for! For-for anou sant louanz Bondie avek lazwa!
47.2: LESEGNER, Bondie Pli Lao li redoutab li enn gran lerwa lor later antie.
47.3: Li soumet bann pep anba nou pouvwar, li met bann nasion anba nou kontrol.
47.4: Li finn swazir enn patrimwann pou nou, parski li kontan nou, fierte Zakob.
47.5: Bondie monte parmi aklamasion, LESEGNER monte ar son tronpet.
47.6: Sant louanz Bondie, sante! Sant louanz nou lerwa, sante!
47.7: Bondie lerwa antie later; sant enn psom pou loue li.
47.8: Bondie regn lor tou bann nasion; li asiz lor so tronn sakre.
47.9: Tou bann dirizan lezot nasion rasanble avek lepep Bondie ki Abraam ti priye. Tou pouvwar lor later pou Bondie limem ki pli lao ki tou.

48.1: LESEGNER li gran, e li merit louanz dan lavil nou Bondie, lor montagn sakre.
48.2: Li bien ot e inpresionan, li donn lazwa dan lemond antie, montagn Sion, dan extrem Nor, lavil gran lerwa.
48.3: Bondie parmi bann sitadel dan lavil finn montre limem enn sekirite garanti.
48.4: Bann sef tribi ansam ar zot larme fer lalians pou atak montagn Sion
48.5: me ler zot trouv li dres divan zot, zot sezi, zot panike, zot sove-ale.
48.6: Lerla tranbleman trap zot, enn douler kouma madam ki pe gagn ti-baba;
48.7: parey kouma pirog balote dan siklonn.
48.8: Nou finn deza tande aster nou finn trouve ar nou de lizie, dan lavil LESEGNER Toupwisan, dan lavil nou Bondie, ki li finn etabli pou touzour.
48.9: Andan to Tanp, Bondie, nou medit lor to lamour infini.
48.10: Nou tann to louanz, parey kouma to nom, partou lor later. To lotorite ranpli ar zistis.
48.11: Montagn Sion viv dan lazwa; bann vilaz dan Zide konn enn gran boner akoz to bann zizman.
48.12: Fer letour Zerizalem kont so bann tour,
48.13: admir so ranpar, mars atraver so sitadel, pou zot kapav rakont zot zanfan ek ti zanfan.
48.14: Bondie, li nou Bondie pou touletan, li pou gid nou pou touzour.

49.1: Ekout sa tou dimounn! Ouver zorey zot tou, abitan later!
49.2: Ki ou gran, ki ou piti; ki ou ris, ki ou pov.
49.3: Mo pou dir zot klerman parol lour ar sazes; anplis, mo leker pou exprim bann konesans profon.
49.4: Mo pou bien ekout proverb, mo pou devwal explikasion zedmo ar sitar.
49.5: Kifer mo bizin trakase letan traka leve, ler mo lennmi antour mwa,
49.6: sa bann ki fer konfians zot trezor, e fer fezer parski zot ris?
49.7: Personn pa kapav pey ase pou sov lavi enn lot; pena pri ki kapav donn Bondie kouma ranson pou lavi,
49.8: lavi, ofet, li pena pri, personn pa kapav peye pou sov so lavi;
49.9: personn pena ase kas pou evit lamor, oubien evit trou lamor.
49.10: Get bann saz. Lamor pa kit zot. Mem zafer pou so inbesil kouma so idio. Oblize kit fortinn deryer.
49.11: Se zot tom ki vinn zot lakaz permanan; se laba ki zot pou pas leres letan malgre kan zot ti vivan zot ti ena terin par arpan.
49.12: Grander, fortinn, pa anpes dimounn zwenn lamor. Kouma ninport ki zanimo, kan nou ler vini bizin ale.
49.13: Get ki ariv bann fezer ki krwar dan zot prop lafors! E ki trouv plezir dan zot prop diskour.
49.14: Zot al ver lamor kouma mouton. Lamor pou diriz zot kouma zot berze. Bann vantar koumsa desann dan trou lamor lor vites e laba zimaz ki zot ti ena li disparet, lemond lamor ki vinn zot lakaz.
49.15: Me mo Bondie pou sov mwa dan pouvwar lamor, wi, li pou delivre mwa pou limem.
49.16: Kan enn dimounn vinn ris, kan fortinn so fami grosi, pa les sa fatig ou latet.
49.17: Kan li mor li pou oblize les so trezor par deryer li pa pou sarye so fortinn ar li letan li ale.
49.18: Mem si dan sa lavi-la enn dimounn ziz limem ere, apre tou, dimounn felisit twa kan to prospere,
49.19: li oblize al rezwenn so bann anset ki pa pou trouv lalimier ankor.
49.20: Grander, fortinn, pa anpes dimounn zwenn lamor. Kouma ninport ki zanimo, kan nou ler vini bizin ale.

50.1: LESEGNER, Bondie Toupwisan, ouver so labous pou koze; Li koz ar lemond antie, depi soley leve ziska soley kouse.
50.2: Bondie briye depi Sion, so gran lavil parfe ki bengn dan bote.
50.3: Nou Bondie pe vini, pa krwar so demars trankil! Divan li enn gran laflam ki devor tou; otour li enn siklonn violan pe balie tou.
50.4: Li ordonn later ek lesiel vinn dibout temwin pou get kouma li ziz so pep.
50.5: Li dir, “Rasanble mo pep fidel; rasanble bann ki finn fer enn lalians ar mwa atraver ofrand ek sakrifis.”
50.6: Liniver pe proklame ki Bondie Li bon ek zis e limem pli gran ziz.
50.7: “Mo pep, ouver zorey parski Mo ena zafer inportan pou dir zot; Mo pou denons Izrael! Mwa ki Bondie, zot Bondie,
50.8: Mo pa pe kritik zot akoz zot sakrifis oubien akoz zot ofrand ki devan mwa toulezour.
50.9: Pa krwar mo bizin gro-gro toro ouswa bouk bien-bien gra.
50.10: Pa bliye ki tou zanimo dan karo, dan patiraz ouswa dan lafore zot tou pou mwa;
50.11: zanimo dan lezer kouma lor later zot tou pou mwa.
50.12: Ler mo fin mo pa bizin zot manze. Tou seki ena dan lemond zot pou mwa!
50.13: Zot krwar mwa mo bizin laviann toro ouswa disan kabri?
50.14: Ofer Bondie enn sakrifis aksiondegras. Onor zot promes ki zot finn fer ar Bondie Toupwisan.
50.15: Kan zot dan dife, apel mwa e mo pou vinn sov zot. Lerla zot sant mo louanz.”
50.16: Lerla Bondie koz ar bann move dimounn, “Ki serti zot resit mo instriksion? Ki serti zot koz lor mo lalians?
50.17: Kan zot refiz mo konsey; e zot rezet mo parol.
50.18: Kan zot zwenn voler, zot fer kamarad ar li; zot frekant dimounn ki komet adilter.
50.19: Zot parol pese koule fasilman; zot koz boukou manti.
50.20: Zot dir foste lor zot prop frer; zot trenn garson zot mama dan labou.
50.21: Ler zot ti fer tousala mo pa ti dir nanye. Akoz sa zot ti krwar mo parey kouma zot. Aster mo pou akiz zot, e zot pou konn laverite.
50.22: Ekout mwa bien, bann ki bliye Bondie, sinon mo desir zot an morso. Pa krwar ki pou ena kikenn pou tir zot dan dife!
50.23: Mo bizin zis zot rekonesans. Sel sakrifis ki ena valer pou mwa. Obeir mwa e mo pou sov zot.”

51.1: Ena pitie pou mwa, Bondie, dan to gran lamour infini. Dan to gran mizerikord efas tou mo pese.
51.2: Lav mwa, retir tou mo bann fot, pirifie mwa, retir mo bann pese.
51.3: Mo rekonet mo bann tor; mo bann pese touzour divan mo lizie.
51.4: Kont twa, kont to tousel ki mo finn fer pese, e mo finn al fer seki to konsider lemal. To ena rezon trouv mwa koupab santans ki to prononse, li zis.
51.5: Mo finn ne dan pese; depi dan vant mama mo dan pese.
51.6: To kontan laverite dan profon nou leker; ansegn mwa to sazes dan profon mo panse.
51.7: Efas mo pese e mo pou vinn prop; netway mwa e mo pou vinn pli blan ki lanez.
51.8: Fer mwa regagn lazwa ek boner; e ki lezo ki finn kas-kase retrouv zot lazwa.
51.9: Aret get mo bann pese efas tou bann fot dan mwa.
51.10: Bondie, kree an mwa enn leker pir ek prop renouvel an mwa enn lespri nouvo ek lwayal.
51.11: Pa avoy mwa lwin ar twa; pa ras to lespri sin ki dan mwa.
51.12: Re-donn mwa lazwa ki enn peser gagne kan to sov li; donn mwa enn lespri obeisans, pou soutenir mwa.
51.13: Alor mo pou ansegn bann peser to bon sime e zot pou retourn ver twa.
51.14: Kot ena disan verse, sov mwa, Bondie, Bondie mo liberater, e mo pou dir for-for ki tomem vre drwatir.
51.15: Segner, rann mwa laparol pou ki mo kapav sant to louanz.
51.16: Mo kone ki to pa pe rod sakrifis; pa mem enn sakrifis zanimo ki nou brile net.
51.17: Sakrifis ki Bondie oule, li enn leker brize. Bondie akeyir enn peser leker brize ki finn repanti.
51.18: Sion bizin to bonte; ed li e re-konstrir miray Zerizalem.
51.19: Apre sa to pou aksepte vre sakrifis, nou ofrand e nou bann sakrifis konple, lerla pou kapav sakrifie bann toro lor lotel dan to Tanp.

52.1: Kifer to fer vantar, gran misie? Enn zourne to vantar mem lor bann mesanste.
52.2: To tir plan pou fer ditor; to lalang fite kouma razwar. To invant fos koze
52.3: e li kler to prefer lemal olie lebien; to prefer mansonz plis ki laverite.
52.4: To servi parol pou bles dimounn! To kontan tronp dimounn.
52.5: To pa pou sape ar Bondie; li pou detrir twa pou touletan; li pou tir twa par kole depi to lakaz li pou derasinn twa depi later bann vivan.
52.6: Ler dimounn ki viv drwat trouv sa, zot pou gagn per; apre ki zot pou koumans gagn riye.
52.7: Zot pou dir, “Get li do! Li pa ti pe dir ki li pa bizin proteksion Bondie? Li pa ti pe dir ki se so fortinn ki ti pou sov li? Li pa ti krwar ki so boner li dan mesanste?”
52.8: Me mwa mo kouma enn pie zoliv dan Tanp Bondie; mo finn fer konfians so lamour infini pou leternite.
52.9: Bondie, mo pou touzour dir twa mersi pou tou seki to finn fer; dan lasanble bann fidel mo proklam to grander parski to vreman bon.

53.1: Bann inbesil panse dan zot leker, “Pou mwa, pena Bondie!” Zot koronpi; zot fer bann krim orib; pena enn osi ki fer dibien.
53.2: Bondie depi lesiel lao pe obzerv limanite anba pou gete si ena dimounn ki posed lasazes; si ena dimounn ki pe rod ador Bondie.
53.3: Me zot tou finn perdi sime; zot tou zot dan koripsion. Pena enn sel ki mars dapre drwatir, mem pa enn sel.
53.4: Bann ki fer linzistis, zot pa konpran? Zot devor mo bann fidel kouma zot devor manze, e zot pa invok nom Bondie?
53.5: Me zot pou tranble ar enn gran freyer, enn freyer ki zame pa finn kone. Lennmi ki antour twa, Bondie pou eparpiy zot lezo partou kote; zot pou konn laont, parski Bondie finn rezet zot.
53.6: Mo priye ki liberasion Izrael pou vinn depi oter Sion. Desandan Zakob, lepep Izrael pou dan gran lazwa kan Bondie fer zot retrouv zot dibien.

54.1: Bondie, sov mwa par to nom; rann zistis dan mo faver par to pwisans.
54.2: Ekout mo lapriyer, Bondie; tann parol ki mo pe dir.
54.3: Enn group dimounn insolan pe atak mwa; bann dimounn swaf disan pe vinn pou touye. Zot pa pran Bondie kont ditou.
54.4: Bondie limem mo sekour; LESEGNER limem mo soutien.
54.5: Li pou tourn zot lemal kont zotmem. Dan to fidelite, fini zot.
54.6: SEGNER, avek enn bon leker mo pou ofer sakrifis; mo pou dir twa mersi parski sa li bon.
54.7: Parski li finn delivre mwa dan mo detres. Dan laviktwar mo get defet mo bann lennmi.

55.1: Bondie, ekout mo lapriyer! Pa tourn ledo ar mo siplikasion!
55.2: Tann mo petision e donn mwa enn repons; mo bann traka pe fini mwa.
55.3: Mo lennmi pe kriye for kont mwa, bann ki fer lemal pe insilte mwa. Zot vers tourman lor mwa; zot atak mwa ar zot lakoler.
55.4: Mo leker finn sere andan, lafreyer lamor finn tom lor mwa.
55.5: Lafreyer ek tranbleman anvayir mwa, gro frison pe trap mwa.
55.6: Alor mo dir, “Si mo ti ena lezel kouma zwazo mo ti pou anvole pou rod lape dan enn landrwa trankil;
55.7: mo ti pou bat mo lezel pou al kasiet lwin dan dezer.
55.8: Lor vites mo ti pou al rod refiz kot rafal siklonn pa ti pou tous mwa.”
55.9: Segner met konfizion dan langaz mo lennmi, brouy zot; parski mo trouv violans ek konfli dan lavil.
55.10: Lanwit kouma lizour zot fer so letour lor so miray; partou dan pei ena violans ek dezord;
55.11: krim ek masak rant partou; dominer ek koripsion pa kit laplas piblik.
55.12: Si enn lennmi ti pe insilte mwa, mo ti pou siporte; si enn rival ti lev kont mwa, mo ti kapav evit li;
55.13: me twa, ki mo egal, ki azir koumsa, mo konpagnon, mo prop kamarad,
55.14: nou ki ti partaz lamitie ansam, nou ti al Tanp ansam pou priye Bondie.
55.15: Ki lamor tom lor mo bann lennmi par sirpriz; ki zot desann vivan dan trou lamor, akoz zot lakaz ek zot leker plin ar pese ek mesanste.
55.16: Mo kriye Bondie osekour, e LESEGNER vinn sov mwa.
55.17: Gramatin, midi, aswar mo rakont mo douler ek mo soufrans. Li pa pou fer sourd ar mo lapriyer.
55.18: Li liber mwa, mo sin e sof dan mo lalit kont mo lennmi, mem si zot enn lafoul kont mwa.
55.19: Bondie, ki lerwa dan leternite, pou tann mwa e li pou imilie mo lennmi parski zot refiz sanze e zot pena respe pou Bondie.
55.20: Seki yer ti mo kamarad intim finn atak so kamarad, li pa finn konn gard so promes.
55.21: So parol ti dou kouma dimiel me ti ena fiel dan so leker pou lager. So parol ki ti paret kouma lapomad ti an-verite enn kouto ki bien fite.
55.22: Depoz to fardo lor LESEGNER e li pou rekonfort twa parski zame li abandonn dimounn ki viv drwat.
55.23: Twa Bondie, to pou pini asasin ek manter e zot pou rant dan trou lamor kan zot ankor zenn. Mwa, mo finn met mo konfians an twa.

56.1: Pran pitie, O mo Bondie, dimounn pe pourswiv mwa; toulezour mo lennmi pe atake, pe kraz mwa;
56.2: bann ki kont mwa persekit mwa touletan; zot enn kantite sa bann arogan ki pe atake la.
56.3: Kan mo gagn per, mo met mo konfians dan twa.
56.4: Mo sant louanz Bondie parski li gard so parol; mo met mo konfians dan Bondie; mo pena okenn freyer. Ki enn imin ordiner kapav fer kont mwa?
56.5: Gramatin-tanto zot parol bles mwa; zot nek panse kouma pou fer mwa ditor.
56.6: Zot vinn ansam, dan kasiet zot louk mwa, zot vey mo bann mouvman, e zot atann pou touy mwa.
56.7: Bondie, pa les zot sape pou zot krim, ar to lakoler zet zot anba.
56.8: Twa to kone komie mo finn soufer; To finn gard enn kont mo sagrin ek mo larm. Dan to gran liv to pa finn gard enn kont?
56.9: Zour mo dimann to led mo lennmi oblize kile. Mo kone ki LESEGNER li ar mwa, li lor mo kote.
56.10: Dan Bondie - mo loue so parol - dan LESEGNER - mo loue so parol -
56.11: dan Bondie mo met konfians; mo pena lafreyer. Ki enn imin ordiner kapav fer kont mwa?
56.12: Bondie, mo pou ofer twa seki mo ti promet; mo pou ofer mo sakrifis remersiman
