56.13: parski to finn anpes lamor kokin mwa ale e to finn anpes mwa tonbe, pou ki mo kontign mars divan Bondie dan so lalimier ki donn lavi.

57.1: Pran pitie, Bondie, pran pitie. Mo vinn rod proteksion kot twa. Anba to lezel mo an sekirite ziska ki maler kouma siklonn pase.
57.2: Mo sipliy Bondie Pli Lao, Bondie, ki donn mwa tou.
57.3: Depi so tronn dan lesiel li pou ekout mwa e li pou sov mwa e bann ki persekit mwa pou kouver ar laont. Bondie pou montre so lamour infini ek so fidelite.
57.4: Kouma lion feros mo lennmi finn antour mwa; mo antoure ar zanimo sovaz; zot ledan fite kouma zarm destriksion; zot lalang fite kouma razwar.
57.5: Bondie, montre to grander ki depas lesiel; montre to laglwar partou lor later.
57.6: Mo lennmi finn instal enn file; dezespwar fer mwa pliye; zot finn met enn piez lor mo sime me gras-a twa zot finn tom ladan zotmem.
57.7: Avek lasirans dan mo leker, Bondie, avek lasirans dan mo leker, mo pou zwe lamizik, mo pou sant to louanz.
57.8: Leve, revey twa, mo leker! Leve sitar ek lagitar! Mo sante pou fer soley leve.
57.9: Mo pou remersie twa, Segner, parmi lepep; mo pou dir to grander parmi bann nasion.
57.10: To lamour infini li mont ziska lesiel; to fidelite al ziska bann niaz.
57.11: Bondie, montre to grander ki depas lesiel; montre to laglwar partou lor later.

58.1: E zot bann kreatir dan lesiel eski zot zizman li korek? Eski zot ziz dimounn ar zistis?
58.2: Non. Zot lespri ranpli ar lemal e zot responsab violans ek krim dan lemond.
58.3: Move dimounn lor lapant pese depi dan vant mama; e depi zot nesans zot nek konn koz manti.
58.4: Kouma serpan zot lalang plin ar venin; kouma kobra zot zwe sourd
58.5: pou pa tann lavwa donter serpan, pou pa ipnotize par zot lamizik.
58.6: Bondie, grenn zot ledan, aras ledan bann zenn lion, O SEGNER;
58.7: fer zot disparet kouma dilo dan kanal; kraz zot kouma move lerb dan lale.
58.8: Kouma kourpa, zot disparet dan lagli; kouma mor-ne ki zame trouv soley.
58.9: Avan mem ki dife lapay sof zot marmit, lakoler Bondie pou fer zot anvole kouma lapousier.
58.10: Dimounn ki viv drwat pou aplodi ler bann dan pese pe pey ser. Zot lipie pou tranp dan disan bann kriminel.
58.11: Dimounn pou dir for-for, “Vremem, dimounn ki viv drwat pe gagn rekonpans; vremem, ena enn Bondie ki zize lor later!”

59.1: Bondie, delivre mwa dan lame mo lennmi; protez mwa kont bann ki atak mwa.
59.2: Delivre mwa kont bann ki pratik lemal; sov mwa dan lame bann asasin.
59.3: Get zot laba! Zot fite pou touy mwa; dimounn danzere finn konplote kont mwa, san ki mo finn fer okenn pese, SEGNER,
59.4: mo pena okenn tor, me zot prese pou atak mwa. Pa ferm lizie lor mo detres; vinn ed mwa.
59.5: SEGNER Bondie Toupwisan, tomem Bondie Izrael, leve pou to pini bann nasion; pena pitie pou bann tret ki amenn maler.
59.6: Touletanto zot vinn an group; zot irle kouma lisien anraze e zot rode partou dan landrwa.
59.7: Tann zot zoure! Tann zot menase! Zot lalang kouma razwar; zot krwar personn pa tande.
59.8: Me twa, SEGNER, to riy zot; to trouv tou bann nasion ridikil.
59.9: Tomem mo lafors, mo regar tourn ver twa. Tomem mo sitadel, gran Bondie.
59.10: Mo Bondie dan so lamour infini pou mars ar mwa; li pou permet mwa trouv defet mo lennmi.
59.11: Pa touy zot parski sinon mo pep pou bliye vit. Fer zot balote par to pouvwar ek abes zot, Segner nou boukliye.
59.12: Sak fwa zot koze, zot labous ranpli ar pese; les zot tom dan latrap zot prop vantardiz. Parski zot zoure, modi, koz manti,
59.13: bril zot ar to lakoler; exterminn zot net. Lerla lemond antie pou konpran ki Bondie gouvern Izrael.
59.14: Touletanto mo lennmi retourne, kouma lisien zot zape, zot rode partou dan lavil.
59.15: Kouma lisien afame zot rant partou pou kokin manze e ler zot pa gagn ase zot grogne, zot irle.
59.16: Mwa mo pou kontinie loue to lafors; toule gramatin mo pou sant to lamour infini bien for. Tomem mo protekter, mo refiz kan difikilte pe rod touf mwa;
59.17: Twa ki mo lafors mo pou sant pou twa. Tomem mo Bondie, mo sitadel, ki ena lamour infini pou mwa.

60.1: Bondie, to finn abandonn nou, e nou finn disloke. To ankoler ar nou; aster-la, relev nou latet.
60.2: To finn fer later tranble e partou vant later finn ouver; nou sipliy twa konble bann fant ek fose parski tou pe grene.
60.3: To pe fer to pep soufer gran douler; nou pe balote kouma soular ar divin.
60.4: To finn donn bann fidel enn banier kouma enn signal pou ki zot sove divan bann fles ki atake.
60.5: Servi to pouvwar pou sov nou; exos nou lapriyer pou ki pep ki to kontan gagn delivrans.
60.6: Depi so Tanp sakre Bondie ti dir, “Ar mo pouvwar mo pou diviz Sikem e partaz vale Soukot.
60.7: Galaad li pou mwa, Manase osi; Efraim samem mo elmet; Zide li sinbol mo pouvwar rwayal.
60.8: Mo pou servi Moab kouma mo kivet; Mo pou zet mo savat lor Edom pou fer kone mo dibien sa. Mo kriye laviktwar lor bann Filistin.”
60.9: Kisann-la pou amenn mwa dan lavil bien proteze? Kisann-la pou gid mwa lor sime Edom?
60.10: Vremem to finn abandonn nou? To pa pou mars ar nou ver laviktwar?
60.11: Twa, Bondie, ed nou kont nou lennmi! Lafors imin pena gran valer.
60.12: Kan Bondie mars ar nou laviktwar li dan nou lame parski li pou kraz nou lennmi.

61.1: Ekout mwa kriye twa, O Bondie; tann mo lapriyer!
61.2: Depi dan bout later mo kriye twa, mo dekouraze, mo dezespere. Kondir mwa lao, dan enn oter, ki tro ot pou mwa.
61.3: Tomem mo protekter, enn latour solid kont mo adverser.
61.4: Les mo viv dan to lakaz pou touletan; donn mwa proteksion anba to lezel.
61.5: Bondie, to finn tann promes ki mo finn fer e to finn donn mwa enn par dan benediksion ki to donn bann ki onor twa.
61.6: Azout boukou lane dan lavi nou lerwa; fer ki li viv bien lontan.
61.7: Fer ki so regn dire pandan lontan ankor parski to finn beni li. Ki to fidelite ek to lamour prezerv li.
61.8: Mo pou selebre to louanz touletan, sak zour mo pou onor mo promes.

62.1: Zis kot Bondie tousel ki mo trouv trankilite. Zis li tousel kapav sov mwa.
62.2: Li tousel mo protekter ek mo sover; li mo fortres; nanye pa pou sekwe mwa.
62.3: Pandan komie letan ankor zot pou atak enn dimounn, zot sey zet li anba, kouma enn miray feb, enn baraz ki so poto kase?
62.4: Zot anvi zet li depi so plas doner kot li finn asize; zot kontan invant koze mansonz; ar zot labous zot donn benediksion, dan fon zot leker nek ena malediksion.
62.5: Zis kot Bondie ki mo trouv trankilite; li tousel kapav donn mwa mo lespwar.
62.6: Li tousel mo protekter ek mo sover; li mo fortres; nanye pa pou sekwe mwa.
62.7: Mo delivrans ek mo loner zot dan lame Bondie; Limem mo gran protekter ek mo refiz.
62.8: Zot ki la, fer Bondie konfians touletan; dir li seki ena lor zot leker. Bondie enn labri pou protez nou.
62.9: Nou, dimounn, nou zis enn ti souf respirasion; ki nou gran ki nou tipti nou pa vo gransoz; met nou lor balans e nou pa pez nanye ditou; nou pli leze ki enn ti labriz.
62.10: Pa met konfians dan violans; pa met lespwar dan lamone kokin; mem kan larises pe ogmante pa met konfians ladan.
62.11: Enn koze ki Bondie finn dir, Plis ki enn fwa mo finn tande, ki tou pouvwar pou li.
62.12: Segner, to osi enn Bondie damour, ki rekonpans sakenn dapre so aksion.

63.1: Bondie, tomem mo Bondie, kouma soley leve, mo leker rod twa. Mo dezir to prezans. Mo lekor an-antie ena swaf to prezans; kouma later desese rod dilo.
63.2: Pandan lontan mo finn get twa dan sanktier pou ki mo kapav admir to pouvwar ek to laglwar.
63.3: To lamour infini ena plis valer ki lavi mem; akoz sa mo pou sant to louanz.
63.4: Tanki mo ena lavi mo pou loue twa; mo lev lame lao pou glorifie to nom.
63.5: Kouma dan enn gran fet avek pli bon repa, mo pou rasazie. Avek lazwa mo sante pou selebre to grander.
63.6: Kan mo pe alonze lor lili mo pa aret pans twa; tout lanwit mo medit lor twa
63.7: parski twa to finn touletan ed mwa. Dan lonbraz to lezel mo sante, ranpli ar lazwa.
63.8: Mo may ar twa ar tou mo leker e to lame pwisan protez mwa.
63.9: Bann ki pe rod mo lamor pou fini dan profonder later.
63.10: Zot pou zwenn lamor dan lager e zanimo feros pou devor zot kadav.
63.11: Lerwa pou trouv so lazwa dan Bondie. Bann ki fer serman dan nom Bondie, zot pou loue li; bann ki kontan koz manti pou oblize ferm labous.

64.1: Bondie! Ekout mo lapriyer! Mo bann lennmi teroriz mwa; sov mwa!
64.2: Protez mwa kont konplo ki move dimounn fer an sekre e kont bann ki fer lemal ki rasanble kont mwa.
64.3: Zot fit zot lalang kouma razwar e zot langaz blesan li kouma fles ki touye.
64.4: Depi dan kasiet zot tir lor bann inosan, zot tire san averti, san okenn freyer.
64.5: Zot ankouraz zot kamwad pou fer vilin travay; zot bien kalkile kot zot pou kasiet zot lak e zot dir, “Personn pa pou kone.”
64.6: Zot prepar enn move kou e zot dir, “Nou krim li pou parfe!” Difisil pou konpran leker ek lespri dimounn!
64.7: Me Bondie larg so fles lor zot e enn par enn zot tonbe.
64.8: Li pou detrir zot akoz zot koz gra. Bann ki trouv sa pou sakouy latet, pou mok zot.
64.9: Lafreyer pou trap tou par lagorz; zot pou rakont gran travay Bondie e medit lor aksion ki li fer.
64.10: Bon dimounn pou dan lazwa LESEGNER. Dimounn drwat pou rod zot refiz kot li e zot pa pou aret sant so louanz.

65.1: O Bondie, li nou devwar sant to grander dan Sion e pa bliye nou promes
65.2: parski to exos nou lapriyer. Dimounn sorti partou vinn ver twa.
65.3: Nou bann fot pez lour lor nou, me twa to pardonn tou.
65.4: Bienere seki to finn swazir, seki to finn akeyir dan to sanktier. Nou pou rasazie ar bon kiksoz dan to lakaz, ki nou gagne dan to Tanp sakre.
65.5: Par bann aksion manifik to reponn nou ar delivrans, Bondie nou Sover, tomem lespwar dimounn lor antie later, ziska dimounn lot kote dilo.
65.6: Ar to lafors to plas montagn kot bizin. To deborde ar pwisans.
65.7: To kalme laraz lamer, to apez tapaz vag; to tengn lakoler lepep.
65.8: Bann dan bout later res bet par to travay grandioz. Tou dimounn lor later kriye zot lazwa depi enn kwin ziska lot.
65.9: To montre to lamour pou later e to aroz li. To nouri later, to fer li vinn fertil. Larivier Bondie ranpli ar dilo; to fer later raport manze. Ala kouma to fer sa:
65.10: To aroz later laboure ar bon kantite dilo; to aplati bann boul later, to fer later respire pou ki zenn pous kapav pouse.
65.11: Tout long lane to bonte ranpli nou gardmanze; kot to pase ena labondans.
65.12: Patiraz ranpli ar zanimo; flan kolinn ranpli ar lazwa;
65.13: laplenn kouver ar mouton; karo plin ar dible. Partou lanatir sante ar lazwa dan leker.

66.1: Sant louanz Bondie avek lazwa tou dimounn ki lor later;
66.2: sant laglwar so nom; donn li laglwar.
66.3: Dir Bondie, “Tou seki to fer, zot extraordiner. To lafors sitan gran ki to lennmi kapitile e tranble divan twa.
66.4: Tou dimounn lor later tom azenou divan twa; zot sant to louanz, zot beni to nom.”
66.5: Vinn gete seki Bondie finn fer! Vinn admir so explwa pou bann dimounn!
66.6: Li ti fer lamer sek pou ki nou bann anset kapav traverse. Anou selebre so explwa.
66.7: Par so pwisans so regn eternel e li vey lor tou nasion. So lennmi pa pou kapav dres kont li.
66.8: Tou dimounn, zot bizin dir mersi nou Bondie. Sant so louanz for-for!
66.9: Li finn prezerv nou lavi e li pa finn les nou tonbe.
66.10: To finn teste nou, Bondie; parey kouma bizoutie pirifie larzan ar dife.
66.11: To ti les nou rant dan piez; to ti met gro fardo lor nou ledo.
66.12: To ti les nou lennmi pil lor nou; to ti les nou travers dife ek debordman me to finn met nou dan enn landrwa an abondans.
66.13: Mo pou ofer sakrifis konple dan to Tanp; mo pou donn ofrand kouma mo ti promet.
66.14: Mo pa pou bliye promes mo ti dir ler mo ti dan detres.
66.15: Mo pou ofer sakrifis zanimo gra! Ler mouton, toro ek bouk brile lafime pou mont ziska lesiel.
66.16: Vinn ekout mwa zot tou ki ena lakrint Bondie e mo pou dir zot seki Bondie finn fer pou mwa.
66.17: Mo ti sipliy li vinn ed mwa; mo ti sant so louanz.
66.18: Si mo ti gard pese dan mo leker, Lesegner pa ti pou vinn ed mwa.
66.19: Me Bondie ti ekoute, li ti tann mwa e li ti exos mo lapriyer.
66.20: Mo loue Bondie parski li pa ti rezet mo siplikasion; li pa ti repran so lamour infini.

67.1: Bondie, akord nou so lagras, e beni nou; ki lalimier so prezans briy lor nou,
67.2: pou ki partou lor later zot konn to sime pou ki tou bann nasion rekonet ki tomem Sover.
67.3: Ki bann pep loue twa, O Bondie! Ki tou bann pep loue twa!
67.4: Ki tou bann nasion sant lazwa dan zot leker parski to gouvern bann pep avek lazistis e to gid tou bann nasion lor bon sime.
67.5: Ki bann pep loue twa, O Bondie! Ki tou bann pep loue twa!
67.6: Later finn raport plin rekolt; Bondie, nou Bondie, finn beni nou.
67.7: Bondie pou kontign beni nou; e tou bann pep partou lor later pou onor li.

68.1: Ler Bondie drese so lennmi fane; bann adverser tire, zot sove divan li.
68.2: Kouma lafime voltize dan divan, zot fonn parey; parey kouma lasir fonn dan dife bann infidel disparet dan prezans Bondie.
68.3: Dimounn drwat dan lazwa; zot selebre zot lazwa dan prezans Bondie, zot ranpli ar boner.
68.4: Sant louanz Bondie; ar bann kantik prepar so larive; pa bliye ki li vwayaz lor enn niaz. So nom: LESEGNER anou selebre nou lazwa divan li.
68.5: Bondie ki viv dan so Tanp sakre li okip orfelin kouma enn papa, e li protez bann vev.
68.6: Bann ki pena personn, li donn zot enn fami; li permet prizonie regagn liberte. Me bann ki dan pese pou touletan zwenn tase dan karo brile.
68.7: Bondie, kan to ti gid to pep to ti mars divan li atraver dezer
68.8: later ti tranble e lesiel ti aroz partou pou anons larive Bondie ki ti aparet lor Sinai, pou prepar lantre triyonfal Bondie Izrael.
68.9: Ler lapli toransiel tonbe later koumans reviv;
68.10: to lepep ti konstrir zot vilaz. To bonte zenere ti donn bann pov zot neseser.
68.11: Lesegner ti donn so instriksion enn lafoul bann fam ti transmet so mesaz:
68.12: “Bann lerwa ek zot larme pe sove! Zot pe sove!” Bann fam dan vilaz ti partaz dibien ki finn sezi:
68.13: ti ena kolonb fabrike ar larzan; zot lezel briye ar lor. (Kifer bann kapon ti kasiet dan lekiri olie lager kont lennmi?)
68.14: Kan Bondie Toupwisan ti derout bann lerwa lanez ti tom lor Montagn Zalmon.
68.15: Get kouma li gran Montagn Basann, enn gran montagn ar so plizier some!
68.16: Kifer depi oter sa bann some-la to get ar mepri Montagn Sion kot Bondie finn desid pou konstrir so pale sakre? Samem rezidans LESEGNER pou leternite.
68.17: Ar mil milie saryo pwisan, milie lor milie, Lesegner desann depi Sinai ziska landrwa sakre.
68.18: To mont dan oter; to ti amenn bann prizonie ar twa; to resevwar don bann dimounn, mem bann ki rebel kont twa, SEGNER Bondie.
68.19: Nou loue Lesegner ki sarye nou fardo lanwit-lizour; Limem Bondie ki sov nou.
68.20: Nou Bondie, li enn Bondie ki donn delivrans; BONDIE # 68:20 Yahweh BONDIE Lesegner Lesegner, ki sap nou dan lamor.
68.21: Bondie pou sirman kraz latet so lennmi; pini bann long seve ki persiste viv dan zot krim.
68.22: Lesegner finn dir, “Mo pou al sers zot lennmi depi oter Basann; Mo pou al tir zot depi dan profonder losean
68.23: pou ki zot lipie tranp dan bann-la zot disan; e mem lalang bann lisien pou gagn zot par.”
68.24: O Bondie, tou dimounn finn trouv to lamars triyonfal; nou tou temwin laprosesion mo Bondie mo Lerwa ler li rant dan so Tanp.
68.25: Santer divan, mizisien deryer, bann tifi ki zwe tanbourin omilie:
68.26: “Remersie Bondie dan gran lasanble. Remersie LESEGNER zot ki zot rasinn dan Izrael.”
68.27: Dabor Benzamin rantre ar so ti tribi; apre bann dirizan Zide, sakenn ar so group; lerla bann sef Zeboulon ek Naftali.
68.28: Montre nou to pwisans, Bondie, pouvwar ki to servi pou ed nou.
68.29: To Tanp dominn Zerizalem laba mem kot bann lerwa depoz kado kot to lipie.
68.30: Met Lezip dan so plas, zanimo sovaz omilie rozo. Menas sa bann nasion ki parey troupo toro ar zot zenis. Fer zot bes latet e rekonet to grander, e depoz zot bann don larzan. Bann ki nek rod lager, exil zot dan rekwin lwintin.
68.31: Lerla anbasader pou vinn ver twa depi Lezip; bann Etiopien pou lev lame lao pou priye twa.
68.32: Sant for-for grander Bondie, zot tou, bann diferan pep dan lemond; sant louanz Lesegner.
68.33: Limem ki travers lesiel depi koumansman ziska aster. Tann so lavwa pli for ki loraz.
68.34: Proklam partou grander Bondie; li regne dan Izrael; li ena pouvwar ziska lesiel.
68.35: Nou tou inpresione ler Bondie sorti andeor so Tanp. Limem Bondie Izrael! Li donn lafors ek pouvwar so pep. Nou loue Bondie!

69.1: Bondie, sov mwa! Dilo pe tous mo manton;
69.2: mo lipie pe fons dan labou parski dan fon tou finn vinn mou; mo pe perdi pie e bann vag ot pe vinn nway mwa.
69.3: Mo finn fatige kriye osekour e mo lagorz sek ek amare. Mo lizie finn vinn feb afors mo pe atann Bondie.
69.4: Bann ki ayir mwa san rezon zot pli boukou ki seve lor latet. Mo lennmi koz manti lor mwa; zot for, e zot pe konplote pou touy mwa. Zot ti oule mo rann seki zame mo ti kokin.
69.5: To konn bien, Bondie, tou erer ki mo finn fer; to konn bien kouma mo ti bet.
69.6: Pa les mo erer fer dimounn ki esper dan twa gagn laont, O Segner BONDIE Toupwisan! Pa les mo febles fer dimounn ki ador twa perdi loner, O Bondie, Souvrin Izrael!
69.7: Mo finn aksepte insilt ek kalomni akoz twa; laont ek imiliasion kouver mwa.
69.8: Personn pa konn mwa parmi mo bann frer dan vilaz; mo enn etranze parmi garson mo mama dan mo prop lakaz.
69.9: Lamour pou to lakaz devor mwa kouma laflam; bann insilt ki avoy lor twa tom lor mwa.
69.10: Ler mo plore ek zene la osi zot insilte mwa.
69.11: Mo met linz dey bann la rakont zistwar foutan lor mwa.
69.12: Bann ki asiz dan lantre vilaz koz kont mwa, e bann soular sant sante boufon lor mwa.
69.13: Me mwa, SEGNER, mo priye twa. Bondie, dan letan ki twa to trouv bon, reponn mwa, dan labondans to lamour infini, twa ki fidel pou sov nou.
69.14: Anpes mwa koul dan labou; protez mwa kont mo lennmi; pa les dilo bwar mwa.
69.15: Pa les debordman nway mwa, ris mwa dan fon ouswa may mwa dan trou lamor.
69.16: Reponn mwa, SEGNER, dan to lamour infini; dan to mizerikord tourn ver mwa.
69.17: Pa kasiet to figir, get to serviter, mo dan gran lapenn, reponn mwa!
69.18: Koste pre ar mwa, sov mwa, liber mwa, mo ena lennmi.
69.19: To kone kouma zot pe insilte mwa; kouma zot zet labou lor mwa, dezonor mwa. To bien konn mo bann lennmi.
69.20: Kalomni kas mo leker, dezespwar trap mwa par lagorz. Mo ti rod sinpati, pena personn! Mo ti rod konsolasion me dan vid!
69.21: Ler mo ti fin mo ti gagn pwazon pou manze; ler mo ti gagn swaf zot ti donn mwa vineg pou bwar.
69.22: Letan zot dres latab divan zot ar bon repa, ki sa vinn zot piez, e seremoni ansam ar zot invite vinn enn latrap.
69.23: Tengn lalimier dan zot lizie! Kabos zot ledo ar douler!
69.24: Vers to koler lor zot; fer to malediksion pini zot.
69.25: Devid zot vilaz net e pa les personn res vivan dan zot lakaz.
69.26: Zot martiriz bann ki to finn pini; zot tortir bann ki finn blese.
69.27: Gard enn kont tou zot pese; pena okenn pitie pou zot.
69.28: Efas zot nom dan liv lavi. Pa kont zot parmi bann zis.
69.29: Mo pe soufer, mo dan lapenn; par to sekour, Bondie, sov mwa.
69.30: Mo pou loue nom Bondie par enn kantik; mo pou proklam so grander avek aksiondegras.
69.31: LESEGNER pou plis kontan sa ki bann sakrifis zanimo, plis ki enn toro ar so korn ek so sabo.
69.32: Kan bann ki pe soufer trouv sa zot pou kontan; bann ki zot leker pe rod Bondie pou regagn kouraz.
69.33: LESEGNER ekout dimounn ki bizin led e li pa bliye so pep ki dan prizon.
69.34: Zot tou, bann kreatir lesiel, later, lamer, loue Bondie.
69.35: Li pou sov Zerizalem e re-konstrir bann lavil dan Zide. So pep pou viv laba, zot pou pran posesion later la.
69.36: Desandan so bann serviter fidel pou erit sa later la e bann ki kontan LESEGNER pou viv ere laba.

70.1: Sov mwa Bondie! Ed mwa SEGNER!
70.2: Ki bann ki pe rod mo lamor plonz dan laont ek konfizion; bann ki dezir trouv mo maler, fer zot konn defet ek imiliasion;
70.3: bann ki sikane ek moke fer zot gout defet e zot labous ferme.
70.4: Bann ki vinn ver twa, donn zot lazwa ek boner! Bann ki kontan twa kouma zot Sover, pou touletan dir, “Bondie pli gran ki tou!”
70.5: Mwa mo feb ek pov; donn mwa to sekour Bondie! Tomem mo sekour, mo liberater; SEGNER, pa tarde pou ed mwa!

71.1: SEGNER, mo finn vinn ver twa pou gagn to proteksion; pa les mwa zame konn laont.
71.2: Parski tomem ki drwatir ed mwa, sekour mwa. Ekout mo lapriyer e sov mwa.
71.3: Tomem refiz ek fortres landrwa kot mo touletan kapav vini; to finn desid pou sov mwa, tomem mo proteksion, mo sitadel.
71.4: Bondie, anpes move dimounn fer mwa ditor; anpes kriote ek lemal fer mwa soufer.
71.5: Segner, tomem mo lespwar; depi ki mo zenn, mo konfians li an twa.
71.6: Depi mo nesans mo depann lor twa, twa ki ti tir mwa dan vant mo mama. Touletan mo pou sant to louanz.
71.7: Boukou dimounn finn vey kouma mo viv parski to finn touletan protez mwa.
71.8: Toutlazourne mo loue twa e mo proklam to laglwar.
71.9: Pa rezet mwa aster ki mo finn vinn vie; pa abandonn mwa aster ki mo nepli for.
71.10: Mo bann lennmi pe koz kont mwa; bann ki vey mwa pe konplote.
71.11: Zot dir, “Bondie finn abandonn li; anou lasas li, may li; personn pa pou donn li koudme.”
71.12: Bondie, pa res lwin ar mwa. Mo Bondie, vit-vit vinn ed mwa.
71.13: Fer dimounn ki akiz mwa tom dan laont; bann ki rod bles mwa tom dan dezoner ek imiliasion.
71.14: Mo pou touletan met mo lespwar dan to pouvwar; mo pou loue twa plizanpli for.
71.15: Mo pou rakont to drwatir, tout lazourne mo pou koz lor tou seki to finn fer pou sov nou mem si mo pa bien konpran tou.
71.16: Mo pou vinn rakont to bann explwa, Segner BONDIE, e mo pou proklam to lazistis, zis lor twa tousel.
71.17: Depi mo zanfan to finn ansegn mwa e malgre mo laz mo kontinie rakont tou to bienfe.
71.18: Aster ki mo finn vinn vie, ki mo seve finn vinn blan pa abandonn mwa Bondie. Les mwa proklam to lafors ar zenerasion ki pe vini, e rakont to pwisans ar bann zenerasion fitir.
71.19: To drwatir, Bondie, mont lao dan lesiel. To finn fer bann gran mirak; pena to segon, Bondie.
71.20: Mem si to finn avoy traka ek soufrans lor mwa mo kone to pou re-donn mwa lavi. Mo kone to pou relev mwa, remont mwa depi profonder later.
71.21: To pou ogmant mo loner, e to pou re-konsol mwa.
71.22: Mo pou sant to louanz ar laarp; mo pou sant to fidelite, mo Bondie. Ar mo sitar mo pou sant to louanz, Bondie ki Sin, ki Izrael adore.
71.23: Mo pou kriye mo lazwa ler mo zwe pou twa; avek tou seki mo ete, mo pou sant to grander parski to finn sov mwa.
71.24: Touletan mo pou koz lor to drwatir parski bann ki ti rod fer mwa ditor finn kouver ar laont ek dezoner.

72.1: Bondie, montre lerwa kouma zize dan drwatir; fer garson rwayal konpran ki to lazistis ete
72.2: pou ki li regne lor lepep dan lazistis e gouvern bann oprime dan ladrwatir.
72.3: Fer ki bann montagn raport prosperite e bann kolinn amenn lazistis tou dimounn.
72.4: Montre lerwa kouma pas zizman pou ki bann pov pa soufer; edik li pou ki li ed bann feb e anpes explwater fer dominer.
72.5: Ki lerwa viv lontan, zenerasion apre zenerasion, tanki soley briye, tanki lalinn ekler nou aswar.
72.6: Fer lerwa vinn parey kouma lapli ki rafresi later, parey kouma gro lapli ki fer karo vinn fertil.
72.7: Ed li pou ki drwatir fleri pandan so regn e ki ena prosperite tanki lalinn eklere.
72.8: Li pou regn lor enn lamer ziska enn lot, li pou gouvern depi Efrat ziska dernie bout later.
72.9: Bann tribi dan dezer pou rekonet so pouvwar; so lennmi pou depoz zarm dan zot defet.
72.10: Lerwa dan Lespagn ek alantour pou montre respe ar bann kado, lerwa Seba ek Saba pou rekonet so lotorite par bann prezan.
72.11: Tou bann lerwa pou prostern divan li, tou bann tribi pou servi li.
72.12: Lerwa donn sekour bann pov ki vinn get li ek bann malere gagn so led.
72.13: Li pitie bann pov ek bann feb; li sap lavi bann ki bizin led.
72.14: Li anpes dominer fer bann feb ek pov pas mizer parski pou lerwa tou lavi imin ena valer.
72.15: Bondie, donn lerwa enn long lavi! Fer li gagn lor ki sorti Seba; fer ki dimounn fer lapriyer pou li touletan; fer ki benediksion Bondie touletan lor li.
72.16: Fer ki so rwayom gagn lakoup rekor; fer ki karo ek vale donn manze an kantite kouma lor bann montagn Liban. Fer ki bann lavil ranpli ar dimounn kouma karo ranpli ar lerb.
72.17: Fer ki lerwa so nom res dan nou memwar; fer ki so repitasion dire osi lontan ki lalimier soley. Tou bann pep pou konn benediksion par li, e zot pou deklar li bienere.
72.18: Nou tou, anou loue LESEGNER, Bondie Izrael! Li tousel kapav fer mirak extraordiner.
72.19: Anou sant so laglwar eternelman! Ki so laglwar ranpli liniver. Amen! Amen!

73.1: Vremem Bondie touletan bon ar Izrael e ar bann dimounn ki ena leker kler.
73.2: Me mwa, mo ti manke glise; mo ti pou perdi lekilib ek tonbe,
73.3: parski mo ti anvi pran plas bann vantar letan mo trouv bann move dimounn pe prospere.
73.4: Zot pa konn douler; zot for, zot bien portan.
73.5: Zot pa soufer kouma nou soufer; zot pa gagn traka kouma lezot.
73.6: Akoz sa zot expoz zot vantardiz koumadir enn bizou; zot violans anpandan lor zot kouma enn manto;
73.7: zot boufi ar lagres, zot lizie sorti gro, e zot latet plin ar plan mesanste.
73.8: Zot sikann dimounn e koz move koze; zot fezer e zot tir plan pou fer dominer.
73.9: Zot labous insilte Bondie dan lesiel e zot lalang kritik tou lor later.
73.10: Akoz sa lepep tourn ver zot, ek bwar parol ki zot verse an abondans.
73.11: Zot dir koumsa, “Kot Bondie pou kone? Eski Pli Lao la konn kiksoz li?”
73.12: Ala kouma bann dan lemal ete. Trankil-trankil zot pe ogmant zot rises.
73.13: Savedir pou nanye mo finn res prop. Pou nanye mo finn lav mo lame pou montre mo inosans.
73.14: Mo finn soufer tout lazourne; toule gramatin mo konn pinision.
73.15: Si mo ti vremem pans koumsa, e azir kouma bann-la mo pa ti pou to serviter fidel, mo ti pou trayir fami Bondie.
73.16: Mo ti sey konpran problem-la me pa ti fasil.
73.17: Fode mo ti rant dan to Tanp, lerla mo ti konpran ki pou ariv bann ki dan pese.
73.18: To met zot lor terin glisan; zot glise, tonbe, destriksion atann zot.
73.19: Enn sel kout, fini! Enn gran ravaz! Zot fini bien mal, zot lafin orib.
73.20: Kouma enn rev ki fonn ar soley gramatin, zot volatilize ler to dres divan zot, O Segner.
73.21: Ler mo ti ena leker dan lapenn, ler mo santiman ti blese,
73.22: mo ti enn veritab inbesil ki pa ti pe konpran twa, Bondie.
73.23: Me mo pou touletan res koste ar twa e mo kone to pou trap mo lame.
73.24: To pou gid mwa ar bon konsey e alafin to pou akeyir mwa ar boukou loner.
73.25: Apart twa mo pena personn dan lesiel! Si mo ena twa ki lezot mo bizin lor later?
73.26: Mo lekor ek mo lespri kapav febli me mo vre lafors se mo Bondie. Apart li, mo trezor eternel, mo pa bizin personn.
73.27: Bann ki abandonn twa pou fini mal; To pou detrir bann ki fer tret ar twa.
73.28: Mwa mo kone kouma li bon kan nou pre ar Bondie; Mo finn swazir Lesegner BONDIE # 73:28 Lesegner Yahweh pou protez mwa; mo pou proklam tou to bann bienfe.

74.1: Ayo Bondie, kifer to abandonn nou pou touletan? Kifer to ankoler kont nou, troupo dan to patiraz?
74.2: Rapel to pep ki tomem to ti swazir lontan, bien lontan. To ti kas zot lasenn lesklavaz pou fer zot vinn to prop posesion. Rapel Montagn Sion kot lontan to ti viv.
74.3: Vinn get demolision partou; nou lennmi finn kraz tou dan to Tanp.
74.4: Andan to Tanp to lennmi finn kriye laviktwar; zot finn met zot pavion pou fer twa vwar.
74.5: Zot finn netway partou koumadir bisron pe koup pie dan lafore.
74.6: Zot finn defons travay artistik dan pano dibwa ar lars ek teti;
74.7: zot finn kraz tou dan Tanp e zot finn alim dife. Zot finn profann landrwa sakre kot nou priye twa.
74.8: Zot ti anvi fini nou net; zot ti bril tou bann landrwa lapriyer dan nou pei, landrwa sakre kot ti zwenn ar Bondie.
74.9: Bann sinbol sakre finn elimine; inn nepli ena okenn profet. Personn pa kone komie letan sa pou dire.
74.10: Pandan komie letan ankor nou bann lennmi pou boufonn twa, nou Bondie? To pou les zot insilte twa eternelman?
74.11: Kifer to pa oule ed nou? Kifer to gard to lebra krwaze?
74.12: Me depi koumansman letan se twa Bondie ki finn nou Lerwa, e ki finn touletan sov nou dan detres.
74.13: Ar to lafors sirnatirel To ti separ lamer pou fer sime; To ti kraz latet bann mons losean;
74.14: To ti eklat latet Leviatan, mons malefik, e donn zanimo dezer manz so lekor.
74.15: To ti fer dilo sourse e koule dan larivier; To ti fer bann flev profon vinn sek enn kou.
74.16: To ti kree lizour ek lanwit; To ti plas soley ek lalinn dan zot plas;
74.17: To ti desinn frontier later; To ti fer lete ek liver.
74.18: Me pa bliye, SEGNER, ki to lennmi pe boufonn twa; pa bliye zot pena lafwa e ki zot mepriz to nom.
74.19: Pa abandonn to kolonb dan grif bann zanimo sovaz, sirtou pa zame bliye to pep ki pe soufer.
74.20: Pa bliye to lalians ki to ti fer ar nou! Violans ranpli dan tou kwin ek rekwin nwar.
74.21: Pa les bann oprime soufer imiliasion; permet bann dimounn pov e bann ki bizin led loue twa.
74.22: Bondie, lev twa! Defann to lintere! Pa bliye! Bann ki pena lafwa kritike e boufonn twa gramatin-tanto.
74.23: Pa bliye e rapel bien! To lennmi fer enn ta tapaz, to adverser pe touzour kriye mem.

75.1: Mersi Bondie, mersi! Nou selebre to nom, parski li pros ar nou. Dimounn rakonte touletan bann mirak extraordiner ki to finn fer.
75.2: Bondie dir, “Ler zizman, mwa ki deside. Mo zizman pou baze lor drwatir.
75.3: Mem si tou kreatir vivan pou tranble, mem si later pou sakouye, Mo pou tini so bann kolonn anplas.
75.4: Mo averti bann fezer, “Aret fer zot fezer.” Mo dir bann move dimounn, “Aret fer vantar.
75.5: Aret fer fanor, e koz ar linsolans!”
75.6: Grander pa sorti dan les ou dan lwes; dan lenor ou dan Lesid.
75.7: Bondie, limem ki ziz; li kondann enn, li relev enn lot.
75.8: LESEGNER tini dan so lame enn koup ranpli ar divin bouyant, bien melanze ar zepis. Li devid li dan lagorz bann move dimounn, fors zot aval tou ziska dernie gout.
75.9: Mwa mo pa pou aret koz lor grander Bondie ki Zakob ti adore; mo pa pou aret sant so louanz.
75.10: Li pou detrir pouvwar bann ki pratik lemal e grandi pouvwar bann ki pratik lebien.

76.1: Tou dimounn dan Zide konn Bondie; dan Izrael, ena gran respe pou so nom.
76.2: So lakaz li dan Zerizalem; Li viv lor Montagn Sion.
76.3: Dan so Tanp li detrir zarm ek larsenal so lennmi.
76.4: Get kouma to gran, Bondie, get kouma to inpresionan ler to desann montagn kot to finn konkerir to adverser.
76.5: Bann brav solda lennmi finn perdi tou e aster zot finn rant dan zot dernie somey. Mem pa enn parmi zot pou kapav servi so lafors.
76.6: Ler to ti menas zot O Bondie ki Zakob ti adore, seval ek kavalie ti tom sek.
76.7: Twa, to redoutab, twa. Kisann-la kapav res insansib kan to lakoler exploze?
76.8: Depi dan lesiel to ti pronons to zizman; lemond ti tranble; silans ti konple
76.9: ler, twa Bondie, to ti dibout pou etablir zizman pou ed bann ki ti pe sibir dominasion.
76.10: Mem lakoler dimounn pou fer to laglwar pli gran, bann ki sap dan sa lakoler la pou vinn antour twa.
76.11: Donn LESEGNER to Bondie seki to ti promet li; tou dimounn dan tou nasion ofer li zot ofrand, pou sa Bondie pou ki zot ena lakrint la.
76.12: Li fer bann prins vantar bes latet; li terifie bann gran lerwa lor later.

77.1: Mo kriye for, “Bondie ed mwa!” Mo kriye for e Bondie tann mwa.
77.2: Kan lavi pa fasil mo priye e rod sekour Lesegner; tout lanwit mo lev lame lao pou priye; me mo pa gagn rekonfor.
77.3: Ler mo pans Bondie, mo soupire; ler mo fer meditasion, dekourazman sezi mwa.
77.4: Aswar to pa les mo lizie ferme; traka anpes mwa koze.
77.5: Mo mazinn lepase; souvenir letan lontan.
77.6: Tout lanwit mo reflesi; mo medite e ala seki vinn dan mo latet:
77.7: “Eski Lesegner finn rezet nou pou touletan? Eski zame li pa pou favorab anver nou ankor?
77.8: Eski so lamour infini pou nou finn mor? Eski li finn ramas so promes pou debon?
77.9: Eski Bondie finn aret montre konpasion? Eski so lakoler finn ferm so leker?”
77.10: Apre mo dir momem, “Seki fer mwa plis dimal se kikfwa Bondie Pli Lao nepli servi so pouvwar dan nou faver.”
77.11: Mo pou rapel bann gran explwa LESEGNER; mo pou rapel tou bann mirak to ti fer;
77.12: mo pou medit lor tou seki to finn fer; mo pou reflesi lor tou to bann gran explwa.
77.13: Tou seki to fer Bondie, li sin. Eski ena lot bondie osi gran ki nou Bondie?
77.14: To tousel Bondie ki fer bann aksion etonan, ki ti montre tou bann tribi to gran pouvwar
77.15: ki to ti servi pou sov to pep, desandan Zakob ek Zozef.
77.16: Ler lamer ti trouv twa, Bondie, ler lamer trouv twa, li ti krake; profonder losean ti tranble.
77.17: Bann niaz ti devers lapli kouma toran partou; loraz ti kraz baraz dan lesiel; zekler kouma fles ti alim partou.
77.18: Loraz ti roule ar enn son asourdisan; zekler to avoye ti ekler lemond; later ti gagn sok e li ti tranble.
77.19: To fer to sime atraver lamer, to fer enn pasaz atraver profonder lamer, me okenn plas pa ti ena to tras.
77.20: To ti gid to pep kouma enn troupo atraver Moiz ek Aaron.

78.1: Ekoute mo pep, ekout mo lansegnman. Ekout bien seki mo ena pou dir!
78.2: Mo pou servi parabol pou mo koze, mo pou explik bann parol ki ena sekre, ki sorti bien lontan,
78.3: ki nou finn tande, ki ti kone, ki nou gran-dimounn ti rakont nou.
78.4: Nou pa pou kasiet sa nou bann zanfan; nou pou koz sa ar zenerasion ki pe vini, tou bann mervey LESEGNER, e so pouvwar, e bann aksion extraordiner ki li finn akonpli.
78.5: Li finn donn so instriksion desandan Zakob, li finn etabli lalwa pou lepep Izrael. Li ti dir nou bann anset ansegn so lalwa ar zot bann zanfan
78.6: afin ki konesans la li transmet depi enn zenerasion ziska enn lot zenerasion ki pa finn ankor ne.
78.7: Koumsa nouvo zenerasion pou met zot lespwar dan Bondie, touletan rapel so travay e obeir so komannman.
78.8: Fode pa zot vinn kouma zot gran dimounn lontan ki ti teti ek dezobeisan, parski zot leker pa ti ferm, e zot lwayote ti mins anver Bondie.
78.9: Tribi Efraim, arme ar zarm pwisan, zot sove ler lager eklate.
78.10: Zot bliye zot lalians ar Bondie; zot refiz obeir so lalwa.
78.11: Zot bliye tou seki li finn fer; zot bliye bann mirak ki zot ti trouve ar zot de lizie.
78.12: Divan lizie zot bann zanset Bondie ti fer bann gran mirak dan Zoan dan Lezip.
78.13: Li ti ouver enn pasaz dan lamer e fer zot pase; dilo ti diboute lor de kote, kouma de miray.
78.14: An plin zour li ti servi enn niaz pou gid zot; aswar li ti servi enn lalimier dife.
78.15: Li ti fann ros an de dan dezer e li ti fer dilo sourse depi profonder later.
78.16: Enn rwiso ti sorti dan ros e dilo ti koule kouma larivier.
78.17: Zot pa ti aret fer pese kont Bondie e dan dezer zot ti revolte kont seki Pli Lao.
78.18: Zot ti rod teste so lafors. Zot ti insiste gagn manze pou satisfer zot lanvi.
78.19: Zot koz kont Bondie ler zot dir, “Eski Bondie kapav donn nou manze dan dezer?
78.20: Vremem li ti tir dilo dan ros, me eski li kapav donn nou dipin? Eski li kapav donn nou laviann pou manze?”
78.21: LESEGNER ti amer ler li ti tann zot rabase. So lakoler ti anflame kont Zakob, so lakoler ti monte kont Izrael,
78.22: parski zot pa ti ena konfians dan li e zot ti nepli krwar ki li pou sov zot.
78.23: Pourtan li ti komann niaz lao, li ti ouver laport lesiel
78.24: pou les lamann tom lor zot, plin zot vant ar lagrin dible ki sorti dan lesiel.
78.25: Bann imin ti manz nouritir ki anz manze e Bondie ti donn zot tou an abondans.
78.26: Li ti fer divan Les leve dan lesiel; par so pwisans li ti fer divan Lesid soufle;
78.27: li ti avoy laviann, osi abondan ki lapousier, e otan zwazo kouma disab lor laplaz,
78.28: ki ti tom omilie kot zot ti kanpe, partou otour zot lakaz.
78.29: Tou dimounn ti rasazie ar manze; zot ti satisfe. Bondie ti donn zot seki zot ti oule.
78.30: Me avan ki zot reisi satisfer zot dezir, manze ti ankor dan zot lagorz,
78.31: lakoler Bondie lev kont zot, li ti touy bann zom pli for, bann meyer zenn Izrael tonbe.
78.32: Pa krwar sa ti sanz zot! Zot ti kontinie zot pese. Zot ti kontinie pa krwar dan so aksion manifik.
78.33: Enn kout soufle, Bondie ti tengn zot lavi e zot lavi ti fini dan lafreyer.
78.34: Sak fwa li ti touy de-trwa, leres ti vinn ver li; zot ti repanti e zot ti priye Bondie.
78.35: Lerla zot ti koumans rapel ki Bondie ti zot protekter; ki Bondie Pli Lao ti touletan delivre zot.
78.36: Zot ti flat Bondie ar zot labous, zot lalang ti koz manti ar li.
78.37: Zot pa ti lwayal ar Bondie; zot ti fini bliye zot lalians ar li.
78.38: Me Bondie ti ena konpasion pou so pep; li ti pardonn zot pese e li pa ti avoy lamor lor zot. Plizier fwa li ti tini so lakoler e li ti kontrol so laraz.
78.39: Li ti rapel zot febles parski zot ti zis bann imin mortel ki ti kouma enn ti labriz ki soufle avan li tengn net.
78.40: Komie fwa dan dezer zot ti met so lotorite odefi; komie fwa zot ti ranpli so leker ar sagrin.
78.41: Tanzantan zot ti teste Bondie, zot ti provok Bondie ki Sin, ki Izrael adore.
78.42: Zot ti bliye so gran pwisans, zot bliye zour ki li ti delivre zot depi zot lennmi;
78.43: e li ti fer so bann aksion etonan dan Zoan dan Lezip.
78.44: Larivier dilo ti vinn larivier disan, akoz sa bann Ezipsien pa ti kapav bwar;
78.45: enn niaz mous ti desann lor zot ar maladi; enn larme krapo ti rann zot lavi bien difisil.
78.46: Sotrel ti detrir plantasion; prodwi zot travay ti fini ar sotrel.
78.47: Lagrel ti touy karo rezin; pie fig sovaz ti griye ar freser.
78.48: Lagrel ti touy zanimo; bann troupo ti viktim lafoud.
78.49: Bondie larg enn koler intans lor bann-la, detres, laraz, ek ostilite, enn gran group anz avek enn mision destriksion.
78.50: Li pa ti kontrol ditou so laraz; li pa ti epargn personn lamor, me li ti les lapes fer so travay destriksion.
78.51: Li ti touy premie garson dan sak fami dan Lezip.
78.52: Apre sa, li ti diriz so pep pou sorti laba kouma enn troupo, kouma enn bon berze li gid zot atraver dezer.
78.53: Li ti amenn zot ver sekirite e zot lafreyer ti disparet. Parkont bann vag lamer ti monte, al kraz lor lennmi lepep.
78.54: Li ti amenn zot dan so domenn sakre, lor montagn ki li ti konkerir.
78.55: Li ti sas bann nasion divan zot, li ti partaz later-la ar bann tribi Izrael sakenn so par, pou konstrir zot lakaz.
78.56: Me zot ti teste Bondie Pli Lao, zot rebel kont li e pa obeir so komannman.
78.57: Zot pran move sime parey kouma zot bann anset. Zot ti parey kouma enn zarm kase ki kapav fer tret.
78.58: Zot ti provok li letan zot servi landrwa sakre bann payin. Zot fer li ankoler letan zot al apre bann idol.
78.59: Bondie ti nepli kapav tini; li ti rezet so pep net.
78.60: Li ti abandonn so tabernak dan Silo ki limem ti swazir pou li kapav viv parmi nou bann imin.
78.61: Li ti les lennmi pran kof sign so pwisans, so laglwar e so mazeste ti al an kaptivite.
78.62: Li ti sitan ankoler ki li ti les lennmi touy so pep.
78.63: Zennzan ti mor dan lager; zennfi pa ti reisi konn sante maryaz.
78.64: Bann pret ti sibir lamor violan e zot vev pa ti mem kapav fer dey.
78.65: Finalman Lesegner leve, kouma kikenn ki sorti dan somey, kouma enn dimounn ki sort dan soulezon.
78.66: Li bat so lennmi ki oblize sove, li imilie zot; zot tom dan laont pou touzour.
78.67: Me li ti rezet desandan Zozef; Li pa ti swazir tribi Efraim.
78.68: Li ti prefer tribi Zide e Montagn Sion ki li ti extra kontan.
78.69: Se dan sa plas la ki li ti konstrir so Tanp parey kouma so lakaz dan lesiel. Anplis li ti fer li telman solid ki li ti pou reziste ravaz letan.
78.70: Answit li ti swazir David kouma so serviter; li ti tir li dan patiraz
78.71: kot li ti pe vey so troupo e ti fer li vinn lerwa Izrael, berze lepep Bondie.
78.72: David ti okip zot avek enn leker san repros, e li ti diriz so pep ar boukou talan ek sazes.

79.1: Ayo Bondie, bann nasion lennmi finn anvayir to patrimwann; zot finn viol pirte to Tanp sakre e zot finn detrir Zerizalem.
79.2: Zot ti ofer kadav to bann serviter kouma manze pou votour; kadav to bann fidel ti nouri zanimo feros.
79.3: Zot ti fer disan to pep koule kouma dilo; partou otour Zerizalem, e personn pa ti la pou anter lemor.
79.4: Nou enn size insilt pou bann vwazin, zot mok nou, zot sikann nou.
79.5: O SEGNER, ziska kan? To pou ankoler pou touletan? To lakoler zame li pa pou tengn?
79.6: Diriz to lakoler kont bann tribi ki pa krwar dan twa; bann rwayom ki pa rekonet to nom.
79.7: Pa bliye! Zot ki finn devor to pep, Zakob; zot ki finn detrir so pei.
79.8: Pa pini nou pou pese ki nou anset ti komet; ena konpasion pou nou, nou lespwar finn tom bien ba.
79.9: Ed nou, Bondie, twa ki nou Sover, pou laglwar to nom; liber nou e pardonn nou pou laglwar to nom.
79.10: Pa les bann lezot nasion dir, “Kot zot Bondie ete?” Fer bann nasion kone, divan nou lizie, kouma to vanz disan to bann serviter fidel.
79.11: Ekout bann prizonie kriye-plore; ar to gran lafors liber bann ki dan koulwar lamor.
79.12: O Segner, fer to lennmi pey set fwa pli ser bann insilt ek kalomni ki zot ti devers lor twa.
79.13: Lerla, nou, to pep, mouton dan to troupo pou remersie twa eternelman e pou sant to louanz depi isi ziska leternite

80.1: Ekout nou, Berze Izrael, twa ki gid bann desandan Zozef kouma enn troupo. Lor to tronn, lao bann seribin, revel twa
80.2: devan bann tribi Efraim, Benzamin ek Manase. Servi to lafors e vinn sov nou.
80.3: Re-donn nou nou lafors lontan, O Bondie! Fer lalimier to prezans ekler nou pou nou gagn delivrans.
80.4: SEGNER Bondie Toupwisan, komie letan ankor to pou refiz ekout lapriyer to pep?
80.5: To finn met sagrin dan nou lasiet manze e to finn ranpli nou goble ar larm.
80.6: To les nou vinn lasours dispit ar bann nasion vwazin; to pe les nou lennmi insilte nou.
80.7: O Bondie Toupwisan, re-donn nou nou lafors lontan! Fer lalimier to prezans ekler nou pou nou gagn delivrans.
80.8: To ti amenn enn boutir rezin depi Lezip; to ti farous bann lezot tribi pou plant li dan zot later.
80.9: To ti netway enn bout terin pou permet li pouse. So rasinn ti rant dan profonder later e li ti fane partou.
80.10: So lonbraz ti tale partou lor kolinn; so bann brans ti depas mem bann gran pie sed.
80.11: Li ti kontinie peple ziska Mediterane, ale mem ziska larivier Efrat.
80.12: Kifer to finn kraz so miray protekter? Aster ninport kisann-la ki pase kapav kokin rezin;
80.13: koson maron vinn fer ravaz ladan, e toutsort zanimo sovaz manz so bourzon.
80.14: Get nou kote, O Bondie Toupwisan! Depi lao, get ki pe ariv nou; vinn sov sa lavign la.
80.15: Vinn sov to pie rezin ki to ti plante; zenn pie rezin ki zordi finn vinn sitan for gras-a to swin.
80.16: Bann lennmi finn met dife ar li, zot finn koup li. Diriz to lakoler kont zot e detrir zot.
80.17: Prezerv ek protez lepep ki to finn swazir; nasion ki to finn fortifie pou grandi.
80.18: Alor nou pa pou kit twa ankor, re-donn nou lavi e nou pou invok to nom.
80.19: Re-donn nou nou lafors lontan, O SEGNER Bondie Toupwisan! Fer lalimier to prezans ekler nou pou nou gagn delivrans.

81.1: Anou sant nou lazwa pou Bondie, nou lafors; avek lazwa anou loue Bondie ki Zakob ti adore.
81.2: Larg lamizik, tap nou tanbour; fer lagitar ek sitar sant zoli melodi.
81.3: Soufle tronpet, soufle bigoul pou demar festival nouvel-linn, e letan plennlinn, e pou festival.
81.4: Sa enn lalwa dan Izrael; enn instriksion Bondie ki Zakob ti adore.
81.5: Li ti donn sa lalwa la lepep Izrael kan li ti atak Lezip. Enn lavwa, ki zame mo finn tande avan, dir,
81.6: “Mo finn tir fardo lor zot zepol; mo finn tir pwa lour dan zot lame, finn depoz li anba.
81.7: Kan zot ti dan difikilte, zot ti dimann mo led mo ti reponn depi dan berso loraz. Mo ti teste zot kan mo ti fer lasours Meriba sek.
81.8: Ayo mo pep, ekout mo avertisman; Izrael, si selman to ti kapav ekout mwa!
81.9: Fode pena bondie etranze parmi zot. Pa ador enn lot ki mwa.
81.10: Mwa mo LESEGNER to Bondie; Mwa ki ti tir zot depi Lezip. Ouver zot labous e mo pou plin zot vant.
81.11: Me mo pep ti aret ekoute; Izrael ti refiz obeir mwa.
81.12: Akoz sa mo ti les zot fer zot teti e debrouy zot difil kouma zot ti oule.
81.13: Si selman mo pep ti ekout mwa; si selman zot ti obeir mo instriksion.
81.14: Vit-vit mo ti pou detrir zot lennmi; lor vites mo aneanti bann ki rod fer zot ditor.
81.15: Bann ki ayir LESEGNER pou kourbe ar lafreyer divan li, zot pinision pa pou ena finision.
81.16: Me mo pep ti pou manz meyer dible; e ti pou bwar meyer dimiel sovaz.”

82.1: Gran lasanble dan lesiel an renion e Bondie pe prezide; dan lasanble Segner lesiel li donn so zizman.
82.2: “Ziska kan zot pou kontign donn zizman bankal, e kontign pran par bann ki lor move sime?
82.3: Defann drwa bann pov ek bann orfelin; donn lazistis bann ti-dimounn ek bann ki pena nanye.
82.4: Vinn osekour bann feb ek bann pov. Tir zot dan lame bann move dimounn.”
82.5: Zot pa konn nanye, zot pa konpran nanye, zot pe mars ataton dan lobskirite koripsion, e fondasion later pe sakouye.
82.6: Mo finn dir zot, “Zot bann ti bondie dan lesiel. Zot dan fami Bondie Pli Lao, zot tou;
82.7: e pourtan, zot pou fini kouma bann mortel; zot lavi pou fini kouma ninport ki sinp sef lor later.”
82.8: Vini Bondie, vinn ziz nou liniver, tou bann nasion pou twa, anba to lotorite.

83.1: Bondie, pa res dan silans koumsa, Pa res trankil, san fer nanye, O Bondie!
83.2: Get laba! To lennmi pe azite, e bann ki ena laenn pou twa pe organiz revolt.
83.3: Zot pe konplote kont to pep; zot pe prepare an sekre kont bann zanfan ki to bien kontan.
83.4: Zot pe dir, “Anou detrir zot kouma enn nasion; anou efas Izrael lor map.”
83.5: Zot tom dakor e zot marye-pike kont twa.
83.6: Bann Edomit, bann Ismaelit, bann Moabit, bann zanfan Agar,
83.7: bann pep Gebal, Amon, Amalek, Filisi ek bann abitan Tir finn fer koalision.
83.8: Bann Asirien, enn alie for bann Amon ek bann Moab, desandan Lot, finn vinn donn enn koudme li osi.
83.9: Tret zot kouma to ti tret bann Madianit, bann Sisera ek bann Zabin kot larivier Kison.
83.10: To ti dezarm zot dan Enndor e to ti les zot kadav vinn fimie lor later.
83.11: Fini zot bann sef kouma to ti fini Oreb ek Zeeb; exterminn zot dirizan kouma to ti exterminn
83.12: Zeba ek Zalmouna ki ti dir, “Nou pou akapar later Bondie pou nou.”
83.13: Bondie, fer zot fane kouma lapousier, kouma lapay ki divan sarye.
83.14: Parey kouma dife detrir lafore; kouma laflam alim flan montagn
83.15: fer zot sove, ale ar to ravaz Tanpet; terifie zot ar to rafal siklonn.
83.16: Kouver zot ar laont, O SEGNER ziska zot oblize rekonet to grander.
83.17: Fini zot dan imiliasion ek lafreyer pou touletan e fer ki zot mor dan dezoner.
83.18: Fer zot realize ki se twa ki SEGNER e zis twa ki Pli Lao lor liniver.

84.1: SEGNER Toupwisan, komie mo kontan to Tanp merveye!
84.2: Mo pli gran dezir se viv ladan; viv ansam ar twa dan to Tanp, SEGNER. Mo lekor ek mo lespri ki dan lazwa sant ver Bondie vivan.
84.3: Get kouma mwano finn gagn enn ti plas, ek irondel finn ranz zot nik dan to Tanp pou ki zot ti-baba grandi pre kot twa, SEGNER Toupwisan, mo Lerwa, mo Bondie.
84.4: Bienere bann dimounn ki viv dan to lakaz; ki kontign sant to louanz lanwit-lizour.
84.5: Zot bienere bann ki tir zot lafors dan lasours to lafors; bann ki fite pou fer pelerinaz ziska Montagn Sion.
84.6: Ler zot travers vale Baka ki touletan konn lasesres, dilo koumans sourse partou e premie gro lapli plin bann basin.
84.7: Amizir zot marse, zot lafors grandi, pou prezant devan Bondie ki pli pwisan ki tou lezot segner lor Montagn Sion.
84.8: Ekout mo lapriyer SEGNER Bondie Toupwisan! Ekoute, Bondie ki Zakob ti adore!
84.9: Beni nou lerwa, nou boukliye, beni lerwa ki to finn konsakre.
84.10: Enn zourne dan to Tanp li vo plis ki mil zourne dan enn lot landrwa; preferab mo enn portie divan lakaz Bondie ki viv dan lakaz bann move dimounn.
84.11: Wi, LESEGNER Bondie, li nou lalimier, nou boukliye protekter ki beni nou ar bonte ek loner. Zame li refiz donn nou seki meyer si nou viv enn lavi san repros.
84.12: SEGNER Toupwisan, nou leker ranpli ar lazwa parski nou finn met nou konfians an twa.

85.1: SEGNER, to finn deza montre to zenerozite anver nou later; To finn deza donn Izrael so prosperite;
85.2: To finn deza pardonn pese to pep, to finn efas tou zot bann fot.
85.3: To finn met dekote to mekontantman e tini to lakoler intans.
85.4: O Bondie nou Sover, fer nou for ankor enn fwa, e aret get nou ar lizie traver!
85.5: Eski to pou touletan mekontan ar nou? Eski to lakoler zame pa pou tengn?
85.6: To pa pou re-donn nou lavi, pou ki to pep retrouv so lazwa an twa?
85.7: Montre nou to lamour infini, O SEGNER, sov nou!
85.8: Mo pe ekout seki LESEGNER Bondie pe dir; li pe promet nou, so pep, lape si nou pa retom dan nou vilin manier.
85.9: Nou kone ki li pou sov bann ki onor li e so laglwar pou touletan la dan nou pei.
85.10: Lamour infini ek fidelite pou mars lame dan lame; Drwatir ek lape pou existe kotakot.
85.11: Lwayote imin pou monte depi later e drwatir Bondie pou desann depi lesiel.
85.12: LESEGNER pou donn nou prosperite e nou later so rannman pou extra bon.
85.13: Drwatir pou mars divan LESEGNER pou prepar sime pou li.

86.1: SEGNER, ekout mwa e exos mo lapriyer. Mo pov, mo feb e mo san resours.
86.2: Prezerv mo lavi parski mo to serviter lwayal. Protez ek sov to serviter ki finn met so konfians dan twa.
86.3: Tomem mo Bondie! Pitie mwa, Segner. Mo priye twa lanwit-lizour.
86.4: Donn to serviter lazwa, Segner, parski mo tourn ver twa dan mo lapriyer.
86.5: Segner, to ranpli ar bonte ek pardon; to lamour infini pena born pou dimounn ki kriye twa.
86.6: Ekout mo lapriyer, SEGNER; ekout mwa ki pe sipliye twa.
86.7: Kan maler tom lor mwa, mo kriye twa parski mo kone to reponn mwa.
86.8: Pena lot bondie ki twa, Segner; pena lot ki kapav fer seki to finn fer.
86.9: Tou bann nasion ki to finn kree pou vinn ver twa pou prezant zot respe; zot pou glorifie to nom.
86.10: Tomem pli gran e to finn fer bann mervey; Pena lot bondie ki twa, to tousel Bondie.
86.11: SEGNER, aprann mwa ki bizin fer e mo pou swiv to laverite, montre mwa kouma servi twa ar devouman e mo pou ena gran respe pou to nom.
86.12: Mo pou sant to grander ar sinserite, O Segner mo Bondie; mo pou glorifie to nom pou touzour.
86.13: To lamour infini pou mwa li depas tou! To finn tir mwa dan trou lamor.
86.14: O Bondie, enn larme vantar pe fons lor mwa; enn bann vwayou pe rod mwa pou touye. Sa bann-la pa pran Bondie kont.
86.15: Me twa, Segner, to enn Bondie konpatisan e bienveyan, To ena gran pasians, to ranpli ar lamour infini ek fidelite.
86.16: Tourn ver mwa. Ena pitie pou mwa. Donn to serviter to lafors; sov mwa, zanfan to servant.
86.17: Montre enn sign ki to kontan mwa; koumsa mo lennmi pou gagn laont ler zot trouv sa, parski twa, SEGNER, to finn sekour mwa, to finn konsol mwa.

87.1: LESEGNER ti konstrir so lavil lor montagn sakre;
87.2: plis ki ninport ki lot plas dan Izrael li kontan so lavil Zerizalem.
87.3: Bann parol ranpli ar laglwar pe koze lor twa, lavil Bondie.
87.4: “Mo pou mansionn Lezip ek Babilonn kan mo fer lalis bann nasion ki obeir mwa; Mo pou azout Filisi, Tir, ek Etiopi.”
87.5: Lor Sion li pou dir, “Sa enn la, sa lot la, zot tou finn ne laba” parski Bondie Pli Lao ki konsolid li.
87.6: LESEGNER pou fer enn lalis tou bann pep, e pou dekrete ki zot tou finn ne laba.
87.7: Tou dimounn danse ek sante, “Sion limem lasours tou benediksion.”

88.1: SEGNER Bondie, mo Sover, tout lazourne mo kriy osekour; tou lanwit mo priye twa.
88.2: Ekout mo lapriyer ki devan twa, tann mwa kriye osekour.
88.3: Traka pe ranpli mo lavi; lamor pe koste kot mwa.
88.4: Mo lor lalis bann ki ena enn lipie dan tom, mo parey enn dimounn ki nepli ena lafors.
88.5: Mo koumadir kikenn ki finn abandone dan rwayom lamor; mo kouma bann solda mor ki finn zet dan fose, kouma kikenn ki to finn bliye net, ki to finn koupe net ar zot.
88.6: To finn rezet mwa dan fon trou lamor, dan finfon marenwar.
88.7: To lakoler pez lour lor mwa, kouma gro-gro vag li kraz mwa.
88.8: To finn fer mo bann kamwad abandonn mwa; aster zot get mwa ar degou. Miray otour mwa, mo pena sime sorti;
88.9: soufrans ek larm finn febli mo lizie. SEGNER, toulezour mo sipliy twa; mo lev lame ver twa pou dimann led.
88.10: Eski to fer mirak pou dimounn mor? Eski dimounn mor leve pou sant to louanz?
88.11: Eski dan tom, kadav koz lor to lamour infini? Eski dan landrwa destriksion, lamor koz lor to fidelite?
88.12: Eski dan nik marenwar to mirak vizib? Eski dan lemond san memwar to bonte reyone?
88.13: SEGNER, mo pe dimann twa ed mwa; toule gramatin mo sipliy twa.
88.14: Kifer to bous to zorey? Kifer to get lot kote?
88.15: Depi mo zanfan mo pe soufer; souvan mo pas pre ar lamor; mo finn sibir terer ki to inpoze, mo dan dezespwar.
88.16: Dife to lakoler kraz mwa; to violans fini mwa.
88.17: Tout lazourne zot bar mwa partou kouma debordman; lor tou kote zot fons lor mwa san pitie.
88.18: Mo bann meyer kamwad finn fini abandonn mwa; zis marenwar epe ki koste ar mwa.

89.1: SEGNER, mo pou touzour sant to lamour infini; mo pou servi mo lavwa pou proklam to fidelite ar zenerasion fitir.
89.2: Mo kone ki to lamour infini li etabli pou touletan; ki to fidelite li eternel ek permanan kouma lesiel.
89.3: To ti dir, “Mo finn fer enn lalians ar enn dimounn ki mo finn swazir. Ala ki mo finn promet mo serviter David:
89.4: "Lor tronn pou ena touletan to desandan; dinasti David pou dire eternelman.”
89.5: Bann kreatir dan lesiel sant bann mervey ki to fer; bann anz dan zot lasanble sant to fidelite, O SEGNER.
89.6: Pena personn dan lesiel ki kouma twa; parmi bann kreatir dan lesiel pena ki konparab ar twa.
89.7: Tou kreatir lesiel per Bondie; zot tou respe Bondie ki redoutab.
89.8: SEGNER Bondie Toupwisan, personn pena lafors kouma twa; to fidelite li touletan prezan, O SEGNER.
89.9: Se twa ki kontrol losean pwisan e zis twa ki kapav kalme lakoler bann vag.
89.10: Se twa ki ti kraz latet Raab # 89:10 Dapre vie zistwar babilonien Raab enn mons losean ki reprezant dezord ek lemal kouma enn karkas; se to lafors san born ki ti fer to lennmi manz lapousier.
89.11: Lesiel pou twa, later osi li pou twa; lemond e tou seki ena ladan, twa ki finn kree zot.
89.12: To finn kree lenor, to finn kree Lesid; Montagn Tabor ek Ermon sant to grander dan lazwa.
89.13: To pouvwar li bien gran, to lafors li san limit.
89.14: To rwayom finn konstrir lor drwatir ek lazistis; lamour ek fidelite prezan dan tou seki to fer.
89.15: Bienere bann ki priye twa ar zoli sante; bann ki viv dan lalimier to prezans, SEGNER.
89.16: Gras-a twa zot viv lazwa tout lazourne, e zot redrese dan louanz akoz to lazistis.
89.17: Tomem ki donn zot laglwar par to pwisans; gras-a to bonte ek to lamour nou finn gagn laviktwar.
89.18: O SEGNER, to finn swazir nou protekter; Bondie ki Sin ki Izrael adore, nou lerwa depann lor twa.
89.19: Dan enn vizion to ti dir bann profet “Mo finn donn pouvwar enn zom for; parmi lepep mo finn swazir enn lerwa.
89.20: Mo finn met mo serviter David lor tronn e mo finn beni so latet ar delwil sakre.
89.21: Lafors mo lame pou touletan akonpagn li, pouvwar mo lebra pou rann li bien for.
89.22: So lennmi pa pou ena viktwar lor li; move dimounn pa pou kapav imilie li.
89.23: Mo pou kraz so lennmi e detrir bann ki deteste li.
89.24: Mo fidelite ek mo lamour infini pou avek li, me plis ki sa, li pou touletan sorti vinker akoz mo nom.
89.25: Lotorite so lame pou lor bann lamer, lotorite so lame drwat pou lor tou larivier.
89.26: Li pou dir mwa, ‘Tomem mo Papa, mo Bondie, mo protekter ek mo Sover.’
89.27: Mo pou fer li vinn mo premie garson, pli gran parmi bann pli gran lerwa.
89.28: Mo pou touletan fidel anver li; mo pou respekte mo lalians ar li.
89.29: So dinasti pou dire osi lontan ki ena lesiel; so desandan pou touletan asiz lor tronn.
89.30: Me si so desandan dezobeir mo lalwa; si zot abandonn mo instriksion;
89.31: si zot bliye mo lansegnman e pa respe mo bann komannman,
89.32: lerla mo pou fer zot peye pou zot pese. Mo pou fer zot soufer pou ditor ki zot finn fer.
89.33: Pa krwar ki mo pou aret kontan David; ki mo pou kas promes mo fidelite.
89.34: Non! Mo pa pou renie mo lalians ar li; Mo pa pou rezet okenn promes ki mo finn fer ar li.
89.35: Promes ki mo finn fer li, lor mo nom sakre, zame mo pou fer fos ar David.
89.36: So tronn pou touletan ena eritie; mo pou vey so rwayom tanki soley briye;
89.37: tanki ena lalinn, touzour la, solid, enn temwin permanan dan lesiel.”
89.38: Me to ankoler ar lerwa ki to finn swazir; to finn abandonn li, to finn les li tonbe.
89.39: To finn kas lalians ar to serviter lwayal e to finn zet so kouronn dan labou.
89.40: Miray so lavil finn grene; sitadel ek fortres an-rwinn.
89.41: Bann pasan pe depouy li; so bann vwazin pe sikann li.
89.42: So lennmi pe triyonfe; bann adverser dan lazwa.
89.43: Zarm nou lerwa konpletman initil; to pe les li perdi lager.
89.44: To finn ras sinbol so pouvwar e so tronn finn devir anba-lao lor later.
89.45: To finn fer li vinn vie avan so ler e to finn kouver li ar laont.
89.46: SEGNER, to pou kontinie get lot kote? Pou touzour? To pou les to lakoler kontinie flanbe mem?
89.47: Rapel ki mo lavi bien kourt; To finn kree nou mortel pou nanye ditou.
89.48: Ki dimounn kapav viv san ki li trouv lamor? Ki dimounn kapav sap dan grif lamor?
89.49: Segner, kot to finn met lamour infini ki to ti ena? Kot to finn met bann promes to ti fer David?
89.50: Rapel, Segner, mwa to serviter fidel, mo gagn bann insilt; tou bann lezot nasion modi mwa.
89.51: To lennmi insilte lerwa ki twa to finn swazir, SEGNER. Partou kot li pase li gagn zot insilt.
89.52: Anou loue LESEGNER pou touletan! Amen! Amen!

90.1: Segner, se twa ki finn touletan donn nou sekirite.
90.2: Avan kreasion montagn, avan ki to ti fasonn later ek lemond, depi touzour e pou touzour twa ki Bondie.
90.3: To fer dimounn retourn lapousier, to dir, “Imin, retourn kot to sorti!”
90.4: Mil an pou twa li pa pli long ki enn zour ki finn fonn; oubien parey de-trwa ler-tan dan lanwit.
90.5: To balie tousala, parey enn rev ki pase, parey kouma lerb ki ne gramatin,
90.6: li fleri gramatin, grandi pandan lazourne e deperi ek mor aswar.
90.7: To lakoler griye nou; To laraz terifie nou.
90.8: To plas nou bann fot devan twa, dan lalimier to prezans okenn sekre pa sape.
90.9: To lakoler koup-koup longer nou lavi ki tengn kouma enn soupir.
90.10: Nou kapav viv swasanndis-an, katrovin si lasante bon, me se traka ek sagrin ki plin nou lexistans; bann lane pas vit e nou anvole ale.
90.11: Kisann-la finn fer fas lafors to lakoler? To lakoler osi gran ki nou respe pou twa.
90.12: Fer nou konpran kouma lavi kourt; sa kapav ranpli nou leker ar sazes.
90.13: Eski to pou kontinie ankoler ar nou? Pitie nou, SEGNER, montre konpasion.
90.14: Toule gramatin ranpli nou ar to lamour infini; koumsa nou pou kapav sante e konn lazwa toulezour.
90.15: Zordi, Segner, donn nou aster otan lazwa ki sagrin ki nou ti kone yer dan moman douler ek penitans.
90.16: Permet nou dekouver to bann gran aksion; permet nou desandan trouv to pwisans triyonfan.
90.17: O Segner nou Bondie, devers to benediksion lor nou, beni travay nou lame avek prosperite, wi, beni travay nou lame avek prosperite!

91.1: Ninport kisann-la ki ena proteksion Bondie Pli Lao, ninport kisann-la ki res dan lonbraz Bondie Toupwisan,
91.2: li kapav dir LESEGNER, “Tomem mo labri ek mo fortres. Tomem mo Bondie ki mo fer konfians.”
91.3: Li pou protez twa kont latrap bann saser, kont ninport ki lepidemi mortel.
91.4: Ar so lezel li pou kasiet twa; anba so lezel to pou an sekirite; so fidelite parey enn boukliye ek enn zarm protekter.
91.5: To nepli pou bizin per danze aswar ouswa bann latak antret dan lazourne
91.6: ouswa bann lepidemi ki atake dan nwar ouswa lemal ki tom lor nou anplin zour.
91.7: Enn milie kapav tom sek koste ar twa, dis mil lor to drwat me twa to pou sape.
91.8: To pou temwin ar to prop lizie ki manier pinision tom lor bann ki ranpli ar pese.
91.9: Wi, SEGNER, tomem mo refiz ek mo proteksion. Twa ki finn fer Bondie Pli Lao vinn to sitadel
91.10: maler pa pou vinn pre ar twa; destriksion pa pou koste ar to lakaz.
91.11: Bondie pou donn lord bann anz pou bar danze e protez twa partou kote.
91.12: Zot pou tini twa lao-lao pou anpes to lipie kogn ar ros.
91.13: San danze to pou mars lor lion ek serpan; kraz latet lion feros e serpan danzere.
91.14: Bondie dir, “Mo pou sov bann ki kontan mwa; Mo pou protez bann ki rekonet mo nom.
91.15: Kan zot dimann led, zot pou gagne; kan zot dan detres, mo pou soutenir zot. Mo pou sov zot, mo pou onor zot.
91.16: Mo pou fer zot viv lontan; e donn zot garanti ki momem zot sover.”

92.1: Li vremem bon dir LESEGNER mersi, pou sant louanz pou to nom, Bondie Pli Lao;
92.2: ler toule gramatin mo proklam to lamour infini; mo deklar to fidelite touleswar,
92.3: akonpagne par lamizik mandolinn ek sitar, ar melodi lagitar.
92.4: Twa SEGNER, to ranpli mo leker ar to bann gran explwa. Akoz tou seki to finn fer, mo sante avek lazwa dan leker.
92.5: SEGNER, to bann explwa zot extra gran; to lespri li extra profon.
92.6: Sa, enn dimounn bet pa kapav sezi, ti-lespri zame pou konpran sa:
92.7: bann ki viv dan pese zot pouse kouma move lerb; bann ki finn swazir move sime zot kapav prospere me enn zour zot pou fini net.
92.8: Me twa, SEGNER, tomem pli gran pou touzour.
92.9: Nou kone ki to bann lennmi, SEGNER, to bann lennmi pou mor, e bann dimounn ki pratik lemal pou disperse.
92.10: To finn donn mwa lafors enn elefan; To finn kouronn mwa ar delwil parfime.
92.11: Mo finn trouv defet mo bann lennmi; mo finn tann bann agreser plengne ar douler.
92.12: Dimounn ki obeir pou prospere kouma palmie; zot pou grandi kouma pie lafours.
92.13: Zot pou kouma bann pie dan verze LESEGNER ki raport zoli fri dan lakour Tanp nou Bondie,
92.14: ki kontign port fri dan zot vieyes e ki touletan ver ek for.
92.15: Tousala montre ki pena linzistis dan LESEGNER, “li mo ranpar e dan li pena linzistis.”

93.1: LESEGNER, limem lerwa, li anvlope par mazeste divinn, LESEGNER ena mazeste ek pwisans kouma enn tinik rwayal. Li finn etabli lemond bien ferm, pena li bouze.
93.2: To tronn pa konn koumansman kouma twa to ti la avan koumansman letan.
93.3: Bann vag leve dan losean, O SEGNER, zot leve, zot kriye for-for, zot leve, zot kime ar laraz feros.
93.4: Me LESEGNER so pouvwar pli for ki tapaz lamer, pli pwisan ki vag feros.
93.5: To lalwa li eternel, SEGNER! To Tanp li sakre pou leternite!

94.1: SEGNER, to enn Bondie ki pini; twa, Bondie ki pini, revel tomem!
94.2: Twa ki ziz lemond, lev twa, donn bann vantar seki zot merite.
94.3: O SEGNER, komie letan ankor bann azan lemal, komie letan ankor bann azan lemal pou fer zot fanor?
94.4: Zot devers enn ta parol ar arogans, bann kriminel koz zot krim ar fierte.
94.5: Zot dominn lepep, SEGNER, zot kraz to pep ki to patrimwann.
94.6: Zot touy vev ek bann etranze, zot asasinn bann orfelin.
94.7: Zot dir for-for, “Bondie kaylous; Bondie Izrael pa remarke seki pe pase.”
94.8: Kouma zot bet koumsa? Bann inbesil, kan zot pou konpran?
94.9: Dapre zot, Bondie finn kree zorey me li pa tande? Li finn kree lizie me li pa trouv kler?
94.10: Li kriye ar bann nasion me li pa pou pini zot? Limem pli gran profeser me li pa konn nanye?
94.11: LESEGNER kone ki plan ena dan zot latet; li bien okouran ki zot pa vo nanye.
94.12: SEGNER, zot bienere bann ki resevwar to disiplinn; zot bien saz bann ki aprann to lalwa.
94.13: Zot viv dan lape mem kan difikilte partou ziska ki to prepar enn piez pou may bann ki viv par lemal.
94.14: LESEGNER zame pou abandonn so pep; zame li pa pou fer tret ar so dimounn.
94.15: Lazistis pou regne dan lakour e dimounn drwat pou soutenir drwatir.
94.16: Kisann-la ti defann mwa kont bann azan lemal? Kisann-la ti dibout ar mwa kont bann ki fer lemal?
94.17: Si LESEGNER pa ti soutenir mwa zordi mo ti pou dan lemond gran silans.
94.18: Ler mo ti dir, “Ayo, mo pe tonbe” To lamour infini, SEGNER, ti anpes mwa koule.
94.19: Sak fwa mo ena traka ek problem To konsol mwa pou mo regagn lazwa.
94.20: To pa toler bann ziz koronpi ki fer inzistis vinn legal,
94.21: ki konplote kont dimounn ki viv drwat e avoy inosan dan koulwar lamor.
94.22: Me LESEGNER defann mwa kouma enn fortres; mo Bondie abrit mwa kouma enn rok protekter.
94.23: Li pou pini bann ki viv dan lemal; Li pou detrir zot parski zot viv dan pese. LESEGNER nou Bondie pou detrir lemal.

95.1: Vini tou dimounn, anou sant louanz LESEGNER; Anou kriye for nou lazwa dan Bondie ki nou Sover.
95.2: Anou al divan li ar remersiman ek rekonesans; anou kriye nou lazwa ar kantik louanz!
95.3: LESEGNER li Bondie ki pwisan; limem pli gran Lerwa ki lao tou ti-bondie.
95.4: Li tini profonder later dan so lame, ek some bann montagn, sa ousi pou li.
95.5: Li regne lor lamer ki so prop kreasion; Li regne lor later osi, so lot kreasion.
95.6: Vini! Anou ador li, anou prostern devan li, anou azenou divan LESEGNER, nou kreater!
95.7: Limem nou Bondie; nou, nou so pep ki li okipe; so troupo ki li pran kont. Ekoute zordi ki li pe dir zot.
95.8: “Pa andirsi zot leker kouma zot anset dan Meriba; pa fer seki bann-la ti fer dan dezer Masa.
95.9: Zot ti desid pou teste mo pouvwar malgre ki zot ti kone tou seki mo ti fer pou zot.
95.10: Pandan karant an mo ti degoute ar zot. Mo ti dir, "Get kouma zot ena lespri egare; Zot refiz obeir mo instriksion.”
95.11: Mo ti bien ankoler e mo ti fer serman, "Zame zot pou rant dan landrwa kot mo ti pou donn zot mo repo.”

96.1: Anou sant enn nouvo sante pou LESEGNER! Tou kreatir dan liniver, sant laglwar LESEGNER!
96.2: Nou sant pou LESEGNER; anou sant so louanz. Toulezour nou anonse ki limem nou Sover.
96.3: Anou anons so laglwar ar tou bann nasion; anons so bann explwa ar tou bann pep.
96.4: LESEGNER li bien gran, li merit ki nou louanz aklam li. Li pli for e pli redoutab ki tou lezot ti-bondie.
96.5: Bann bondie ki lezot pep venere zot zis bann idol me LESEGNER limem kreater liniver.
96.6: Li antoure ar laglwar ek mazeste; pouvwar ek bote ranpli so Tanp.
96.7: Donn LESEGNER, zot tou bann pep lor later; donn LESEGNER so laglwar ek so pouvwar.
96.8: Donn LESEGNER laglwar ki so nom merite; amenn zot ofrand e rant dan so Tanp.
96.9: Ador LESEGNER ki sin, ler li paret dan so mazeste; liniver ki li finn kree, tranble devan li.
96.10: Dir tou bann tribi, “LESEGNER limem lerwa. Lemond finn etabli bien ferm, pena li bouze. Li pou ziz tou dimounn ar drwatir.”
96.11: Lesiel montre to lazwa! Later exprim to boner! Ki lamer gronde, avek tou seki viv ladan;
96.12: bann karo ek tou seki pouse ladan, les zot boner exploze. Bann pie dan lafore pou sante ar lazwa
96.13: zot pou sant devan LESEGNER akoz li pe vini, li vini pou regn lor later. Li pou regn lor lemond avek lazistis lor bann pep selon laverite.

97.1: LESEGNER, limem lerwa! Later dans ar lazwa! Tou bann lil atraver losean, montre zot kontantman!
97.2: Niaz ek marenwar epe anvlop li; so regn gouverne par drwatir ek lazistis.
97.3: Enn laflam mars divan li, e bril bann lennmi otour li.
97.4: Zekler ekler lemond e kan later trouv sa, li tranble.
97.5: Montagn fonn kouma lasir dan prezans LESEGNER, devan Lesegner, lerwa liniver.
97.6: Lesiel anons so drwatir e tou bann pep trouv so laglwar.
97.7: Bann ki ador idol gagn onte; bann ki fer vantar ar zot idol initil; tou bann divinite, prostern zot devan li.
97.8: Lepep Sion tann sa e li dan lazwa e bann lavil dan Zide pe selebre akoz to zizman, O Bondie.
97.9: SEGNER, tomem ki Pli Lao lor later antie; tomem pli eleve ki tou bann ti-bondie.
97.10: LESEGNER kontan bann ki deteste lemal; li protez lavi so bann fidel; li aras zot dan lame bann ki pratik lemal.
97.11: Lalimier ekler lavi dimounn drwat; lazwa aroz bann leker drwat.
97.12: Zot tou ki viv drwat, montre zot lazwa dan LESEGNER. Glorifie so nom ki sin.

98.1: Anou sant enn nouvo sante pou LESEGNER ki finn fer bann explwa merveye! Zis ar so pouvwar ek so lafors sakre li finn sorti vinker.
98.2: LESEGNER ti anons so laviktwar e li ti revel so lazistis devan tou bann nasion.
98.3: Li ti rapel so lamour infini e so fidelite anver lepep Izrael. Lemond antie temwin laviktwar nou Bondie.
98.4: Later, larg lavwa pou dir zot lazwa dan LESEGNER; kriye zot lazwa ar bann sante ek lamizik.
98.5: Sant grander LESEGNER ar lagitar; zwe sitar ek bann zoli melodi.
98.6: Servi tronpet e servi son kor pou selebre lazwa devan Lerwa, LESEGNER.
98.7: Ki lamer gronde, avek tou seki viv ladan; lemond avek tou so abitan.
98.8: Tap zot lame, bann larivier imans; bann montagn, sant zot lazwa ansam
98.9: dan prezans LESEGNER ki pe vini pou gouvern lemond. Li pou gouvern lemond dan lazistis, e bann pep avek drwatir.

99.1: LESEGNER, limem lerwa; lepep partou tranble. Li asiz lor so tronn pli lao ki bann seribin; e liniver antie emerveye.
99.2: LESEGNER li gran dan Sion; li lao tou bann pep.
99.3: Tou dimounn selebre to nom ki gran e formidab. Lesegner li sin!
99.4: O Lerwa Toupwisan, to kontan seki drwat; to finn etabli lord, drwa e zistis dan Izrael.
99.5: Anou exalte LESEGNER nou Bondie; anou azenou devan so marspie pou ador li. Vremem li sin!
99.6: Moiz ek Aaron ti parmi so bann pret, e Samiel ti parmi bann ki ti priye li. Zot ti dimann sekour LESEGNER e li ti reponn.
99.7: Depi niaz ki ti drese kouma enn kolonn, li ti koz ar zot; zot ti ekout so konsey ek instriksion.
99.8: O SEGNER nou Bondie, to ti ekout lapriyer to pep. To ti enn Bondie ki pardone, mem si to donn pinision ler zot fer fot.
99.9: Anou exalte LESEGNER nou Bondie; e ador li lor so montagn sakre. LESEGNER nou Bondie, li sin.

100.1: Liniver antie, sant for zot lazwa pou LESEGNER!
100.2: Ador LESEGNER dan lazwa; vinn dan so prezans avek zoli kantik.
100.3: Rekonet ki LESEGNER, limem Bondie. Li finn kree nou e nou pou li; nou so pep, so troupo dan so patiraz.
100.4: Rant dan lale tanp ar rekonesans ek remersiman; rant dan lakour so Tanp ar kontantman. Dir li mersi e loue so nom.
100.5: LESEGNER li vremem bon; so lamour infini ek eternel; so fidelite kontigne pou touzour.

101.1: Mo pou sant lwayote ek lazistis, e mo pou sant li pou twa O SEGNER.
101.2: Mo pou viv enn lavi san fot. Kan to pou vinn ver mwa? Mo pou viv enn lavi prop san repros dan lakaz kot mo gouverne.
101.3: Mo pa pou toler ki lemal vinn dan mo prezans. Mo deteste aksion bann ki renie Bondie; mo pa pou frekant zot, ni aksepte zot aksion.
101.4: Mo pa pou fer nanye malonet e mo pou refiz tou tranzaksion ar lemal.
101.5: Mo pou detrir ninport kisann-la ki an sekre fer plan mesanste kont so prosin; mo pa pou toler bann vantar ek arogan.
101.6: Mo pou dan faver bann ki res fidel ar Bondie e pou ena plas pou zot kot mwa. Zis bann ki onet dan zot manier viv pou gagn drwa servi mwa.
101.7: Bann ki pratik tronpri pa pou ena plas dan mo lakaz; ipokrit ki servi mansonz pa pou ena plas dan mo prezans.
101.8: Zour apre zour boner gramatin mo pou detrir move dimounn dan pei; move dimounn pa pou ena plas dan lavil LESEGNER.

102.1: SEGNER, ekout mo lapriyer; ekout mwa kriye mo detres.
102.2: Kan mo bizin led, pa vir to ledo kan mo dan detres; ekout mo lapriyer, pa tarde pou reponn mwa.
102.3: Parski lafime mo lavi pe disparet e mo lekor pe konsome dan dife.
102.4: Mo kouma lerb sek ki kraze dan later e manze mo nepli anvi manze.
102.5: Mo plengne for-for; mo finn vinn lapo-lezo.
102.6: Mo kouma enn zwazo sovaz dan dezer; enn ibou dan rwinn abandone.
102.7: Dormi mo pa dormi; mo kouma enn zwazo soliter tousel lor enn twa lakaz.
102.8: Toulezour mo lennmi provok mwa; pe servi mo nom pou zet malediksion.
102.9: Akoz to mekontan ek ankoler ar mwa lasann finn ranplas mo dipin,
102.10: e larm plin mo goble. To finn balie mwa, zet mwa dan kwin.
102.11: Mo lavi pase kouma lonbraz aswar, mo kouma lerb sek.
102.12: Me twa SEGNER, tomem lerwa eternel; sa, enn lasenn zenerasion zame pou bliye.
102.13: To pou drese e montre pitie pou Sion; ler finn vini pou montre li to faver; wi, vremem so ler finn vini aster.
102.14: Bann ki kontan twa zot osi kontan li mem si li finn konn destriksion; zot ena boukou sagrin pou li mem si zordi Sion li an-rwinn.
102.15: Bann nasion zot respe LESEGNER; bann lerwa lor later ena reverans pou li.
102.16: LESEGNER pou rekonstrir Sion e li pou montre so laglwar.
102.17: Li pou tann soufrans so pep abandone e li pou exos zot lapriyer.
102.18: Dan lintere zenerasion fitir, anou ekrir sa, koumsa bann ki pa ankor ne kapav enn zour sant so louanz:
102.19: depi lao dan so sanktier LESEGNER ti get anba; depi lesiel lao li ti get later,
102.20: pou li tann bann prizonie pe kriye zot soufrans, pou li liber bann ki ti dan koulwar lamor.
102.21: Akoz sa nou pou onor so nom dan Sion; nou pou loue li dan Zerizalem
102.22: kan dimounn partou kote zwenn e bann rwayom osi, pou ador LESEGNER.
102.23: LESEGNER finn afebli mwa, mem mo ankor zenn; li finn tay longer mo lavi.
102.24: Lerla mo dir, “Bondie, pa pran mo lavi aster-la, mo ankor zenn; Twa, ki viv depi touzour e pou touzour!”
102.25: Ena lontan to ti kree fondasion later e ar to prop lame to ti fer lesiel.
102.26: Kan to kreasion disparet, twa to pou touzour la; kouma vie latwal zot pou defile ek desire. To sanz zot kouma linz, zot zistwar pou fini lamem.
102.27: Me twa to pa sanze, to lavi pa konn finision.
102.28: Nou to serviter, e nou zanfan pou viv an sekirite, zanfan nou zanfan pou viv anpe dan to proteksion.

103.1: Ar tou seki mo ete mo remersie LESEGNER! Ar tou mo leker mo remersie so sin nom!
103.2: Ar tou seki mo ete mo remersie LESEGNER! Pa bliye okenn gran bonte ki li finn montre!
103.3: Li pardonn tou to pese; geri to maladi.
103.4: Li ras to lavi dan tom, anpes lamor koste, e li kouronn twa ar lamour ek tandres.
103.5: Li ranpli to lavi ar tou seki bon pou to res for ek zenn kouma enn leg.
103.6: LESEGNER zize dan lintere bann ki soufer dominasion e li donn zot zot drwa.
103.7: Li ti revel so bann plan ar Moiz e lepep Izrael ti trouv so gran explwa.
103.8: Leker LESEGNER li ranpli ar konpasion ek pitie; difisil pou li fer koler parski so lamour infini deborde partou.
103.9: Li pa fer akizasion lor akizasion, e so koler osi tengn bien vit.
103.10: Li pa tret nou dapre nou pese, li pa pini nou dapre nou bann fot.
103.11: So lamour infini pou dimounn ki onor li, li osi ot ek gran ki lesiel ete konpare ar later.
103.12: Li separ nou ar nou pese parey distans ki ant soley leve ek soley kouse.
103.13: Parey kouma enn papa ena konpasion anver so zanfan LESEGNER ena konpasion anver bann ki onor li.
103.14: Li bien kone kouma ti form nou; li kone ki nou sorti dan lapousier.
103.15: Bann imin zot lavi kouma lerb. Zot grandi ek fleri kouma fler sovaz;
103.16: ler labriz soufle, tou petal fane, personn pa rapel kot so plas ti ete.
103.17: Depi touzour ziska touzour LESEGNER ena enn lamour infini pou bann ki onor li; e so fidelite pou dire pou zanfan zot zanfan;
103.18: so bonte beni dimounn ki respe so lalians e ki obeir so bann komannman.
103.19: LESEGNER finn plas so tronn dan lesiel; li enn lerwa siprem ki regne lor tou.
103.20: Zot tou bann anz ki for ek ena kouraz, ki akonplir so instriksion e ki obeir parol ki li dir, remersie LESEGNER.
103.21: Tou so bann larme dan lesiel, bann serviter ki exekit so volonte, remersie LESEGNER.
103.22: Tou bann kreatir partou dan liniver ki li dirize remersie LESEGNER. Ar tou seki mo ete mo remersie LESEGNER.

104.1: Ar tou seki mo ete mo dir mersi LESEGNER! SEGNER mo Bondie tomem pli gran. To abiye ar mazeste ek laglwar,
104.2: lalimier anvlop twa kouma enn manto. To finn kree lesiel kouma enn latant zean
104.3: e to finn ranz to lakaz lor losean seles. To fer bann niaz vinn to kales, e to vwayaz lor lezel divan.
104.4: Divan delivre to mesaz, dife ek zekler exekit to lord.
104.5: To finn kree later lor soubasman solid ki nanye pa pou bouze.
104.6: Lor later to finn met enn tapi dilo ki mont ziska some montagn.
104.7: Kan to ti reprimann dilo, li ti retir li; li ti sove ler li ti tann to instriksion kouma loraz.
104.8: Lor vites li mont lor montagn e redesann, al dan vale, dan landrwa ki to ti fer pou li.
104.9: To ti tras frontier ki li pa ti gagn drwa depase; sa ti pou anpes li deborde pou kouver later.
104.10: To finn fer lasours koule dan vale; to finn fer larivier koule ant montagn ek kolinn.
104.11: Koumsa ena ase dilo pou tou zanimo, bann bourik sovaz ti vinn kalme zot laswaf.
104.12: Akote bor dilo, lor bann pie bann zwazo fer zot nik e kapav tann zot sante.
104.13: Depi lesiel lapli tonbe, aroz kolinn ek montagn e later li rasazie ar bienfe to louvraz.
104.14: To fer lerb pouse dan patiraz; to fer plant pouse pou dimounn servi; pou li prodir manze pou li viv,
104.15: divin pou fer leker kontan, delwil zoliv pou so lasante e dipin pou li gagn lafors.
104.16: Bann pie dan lafore gagn bien dilo, sirtou bann pie zean ki LESEGNER limem ti plante.
104.17: Laba bann zwazo fer zot nik; bann sigongn fer zot lakaz lor pie sipre.
104.18: Kabri sovaz gagn lavi lor montagn, bann liev kasiet parmi bann ros.
104.19: To finn kree lalinn pou nou kapav kont bann mwa; soley kone ki ler bizin kouse.
104.20: To finn kree lanwit ek lobskirite, pou ki zanimo kapav lasas dan nwar;
104.21: bann zenn lion kriye for zot lafin ler zot rod manze ki Bondie finn prepare pou zot.
104.22: Kan soley leve zot retourn dan zot lakav pou repoze.
104.23: Lerla dimounn al okip zot lokipasion ziska ki soley kouse.
104.24: SEGNER, to finn fer otan kiksoz extra! Sak kiksoz finn kree par to sazes. Later ranpli ar enn trale kreatir ki to finn kree.
104.25: Get lamer laba, li gran, li profon e li plin ar kreatir, so gran kouma so piti.
104.26: Lao dilo, bann bato navige, anba, Leviatan, mons marin ki to finn kree pou zwe ar li.
104.27: Zot tou depann lor twa pou gagn zot nouritir kan zot bizin.
104.28: To donn zot manze ki nouri zot; kan to ouver to lame, nouritir-la plin zot vant.
104.29: Kan to vir ledo ar zot, zot gagn per; kan to koup zot souf, zot mor e zot retourn dan lapousier kot zot ti sorti.
104.30: Kan to soufle to souf to kree zot e later gagn nouvo lavi.
104.31: SEGNER, to laglwar li eternel! SEGNER, trouv to lazwa dan to louvraz.
104.32: Li zet enn regar lor later e later tranble; li tous montagn e volkan eklate.
104.33: Mo pou sant louanz LESEGNER touletan; tanki mo ena lavi mo pou sant so grander.
104.34: Mo espere ki mo meditasion fer li plezir, parski mo dan lazwa akoz li.
104.35: Ki bann ki dan lemal zot disparet depi later; bann ki nouri pese fini net dan lemond. Ar tou seki mo ete mo dir mersi LESEGNER! Alelouya, nou sant louanz LESEGNER!

105.1: Nou dir mersi LESEGNER, nou proklam so nom! Nou bizin fer tou bann nasion kone tou seki li finn fer.
105.2: Sant pou li, zwe lamizik pou li, rakont tou so bann explwa.
105.3: Rann glwar so sin nom! Bann ki rod LESEGNER pou dan lazwa.
105.4: Tourn ver LESEGNER e rod so pwisans; zame pa aret rod so prezans.
105.5: Rapel bann mervey ki li finn fer, so bann mirak ek bann zizman li finn prononse,
105.6: zot tou bann desandan Abraam, zot tou bann desandan Zakob, ki li finn swazire.
105.7: LESEGNER, limem nou Bondie; li gouvern lemond antie.
105.8: Zame li pa finn bliye so lalians ki pou dire pou touzour; so promes tini zenerasion apre zenerasion.
105.9: Li pou onor aranzman ki li ti fer ar Abraam; promes li ti fer ar Izaak.
105.10: Li ti konfirm sa ar Zakob kouma enn dekre, ar Izrael kouma enn lalians ki pou tini ziska lafin.
105.11: “Mo pou donn twa pei Kanaan,” li ti dir. “Sa li pou zot; zot par sa.”
105.12: Sa lepok-la serviter Bondie ti bien tigit e zot ti bann imigran dan pei Kanaan.
105.13: Zot ale-vini, sorti dan enn rezion al dan lot; sorti dan enn rwayom al dan lot.
105.14: Me Bondie pa ti les personn fer dominer ar zot; li ti donn avertisman bann lerwa:
105.15: “Pa fer ditor mo bann serviter ki mo finn swazire; pa tous mo bann profet.”
105.16: LESEGNER ti avoy lafaminn dan zot pei e ti detrir zot nouritir.
105.17: Li ti avoy kikenn divan-divan; Zozef ti so nom, ti vann li kouma esklav.
105.18: Li ti ena lasenn dan lipie, serk lasie otour so likou
105.19: ziska ki so prediksion vinn vre, ziska ki parol LESEGNER prouve li ena rezon.
105.20: Lerwa Lezip ti fer larg li; lerwa ki ti pe diriz plizier tribi ti rann li so liberte.
105.21: Li ti fer Zozef vinn sef gouvernman ki ti gouvern pei-la net;
105.22: li ti gagn drwa donn lord bann ofisie lerwa; li ti ena pouvwar dir bann konseye ki bizin fer.
105.23: Lerla Izrael ti al Lezip Zakob ti viv dan pei Lezip kouma imigran.
