105.24: LESEGNER ti donn so bann serviter boukou zanfan; ti fer zot vinn pli for ki zot lennmi.
105.25: Me li ti fer bann Ezipsien ayir so prop pep e zot fer konplo kont so bann serviter.
105.26: Lerla li ti avoy so serviter Moiz ek Aaron ki limem ti swazir.
105.27: Zot ti fer bann sign extraordiner, bann veritab mirak dan Lezip.
105.28: Li avoy marenwar lor pei Lezip me bann Ezipsien refiz ekout so parol.
105.29: Li fer larivier dilo vinn disan e touy tou pwason.
105.30: Ti ena enn invazion krapo; zot ti rant partou, mem dan sato.
105.31: Bondie koze, enn larme mous ki pike, ek moustik anvayir pei-la.
105.32: Li avoy lagrel olie avoy lapli ek zekler ti eklate partou;
105.33: li detrir plantasion, potaze ek verze; li met bann pie partou plat.
105.34: Kouma li koze, ala enn gran niaz sotrel, sotrel par milion, desann lor pei;
105.35: zot balie tou bann plant prop, pa les nanye deryer zot dan pei.
105.36: Li touy tou bann premie garson dan sak fami Ezipsien, premie prodwi zot lafors.
105.37: Lerla li gid bann Izraelit lor sime liberte, ranpli ar lor ek larzan, parski zot ti for ek an bonn sante personn pa ti res deryer.
105.38: Bann Ezipsien ti per zot e bann-la ti kontan ler bann Izraelit ti ale.
105.39: Bondie ti plas enn niaz lor so pep pou protez zot; enn dife pou donn zot lalimier aswar.
105.40: Ler zot rod manze li ti avoy zot bann kay, manze pou plin zot vant ti sorti direk dan lesiel.
105.41: Li ti ouver enn ros e dilo kler ti koumans koule e bien vit enn larivier ti pe travers dezer.
105.42: Li ti rapel so promes sakre ki li ti fer ar Abraam, so serviter.
105.43: Alor li ti fer zot sorti Lezip dan lazwa, pep ki li ti swazir ti sante for-for dan lalegres.
105.44: Li ti partaz ar zot later lezot tribi; zot ti pran posesion larises bann lezot pep.
105.45: Koumsa li ti sir ki so pep ti pou gard so komannman, e pou rapel so bann lalwa. Alelouya, nou sant louanz LESEGNER!

106.1: Loue LESEGNER! Nou dir mersi LESEGNER parski li bon e so lamour infini li eternel.
106.2: Kisann-la kapav rakont tou bann explwa LESEGNER? Kisann-la kapav exprim tou so louanz partou?
106.3: Bienere dimounn ki obzerv lazistis, ki pratik drwatir touletan.
106.4: Pa bliye mwa SEGNER, ler to montre faver to pep; pa bliye mwa ler to pe sov to pep.
106.5: Mo ti'a kontan trouv prosperite to pep e partaz lazwa ek boner lepep Bondie, e partaz fierte lepep ki apartenir a twa.
106.6: Parey kouma nou bann anset nou osi nou finn fer pese; nou finn partisip dan lemal ek dan pese.
106.7: Nou bann anset dan Lezip pa ti bien konpran to bann explwa extraordiner; zot ti souvan bliye to gran lamour infini e kot Lamer Rouz zot ti revolte kont twa.
106.8: Me li ti sov zot pou loner so nom, pou fer zot rapel so gran pouvwar.
106.9: Li ti donn lord Lamer Rouz e toutswit dilo ti sek; li ti gid so pep ki travers lamer lor later ferm;
106.10: Li ti protez so pep kont bann ki ti ayir zot; li ti sap zot lavi ler lennmi ti atake.
106.11: Ler lamer retourne lennmi ti mor nwaye; pena enn ki ti sape.
106.12: Lerla lepep rapel promes Bondie e zot sant so louanz.
106.13: Me zot memwar kourt; zot bliye vit tou seki li ti fer; zot azir san atann so konsey.
106.14: Dan dezer zot ti an mank e zot ti teste Bondie, zot ti provok li dan sa later arid la;
106.15: e li ti donn zot seki zot ti pe rode me anplis li ti donn zot enn maladi ki fer deperi.
106.16: Dan dezer kot ti kanpe, zot koumans zalou Moiz ek Aaron, serviter lwayal LESEGNER.
106.17: Lerla later ouver e aval Datan e li anter Abiram ek so bann konplis;
106.18: dife desann depi lesiel e bril bann dimounn ki pratik lemal.
106.19: Lor montagn Oreb zot fer enn vodor e koumans ador enn idol;
106.20: zot ranplas laglwar ki Bondie ti donn zot, par zimaz enn ti toro, enn manzer lerb.
106.21: Zot nepli rapel Bondie, zot Sover, ki ti fer bann gran mirak dan Lezip,
106.22: bann aksion etonan lor later Ezipsien, bann mervey terib pre ar Lamer Rouz.
106.23: Kan Bondie menas pou detrir so pep so prop serviter ki li ti swazire, Moiz, ti plas li devan Bondie pou detourn so koler e pa detrir zot.
106.24: Lerla zot rezet enn pei merveye parski zot nepli fer konfians promes Bondie.
106.25: Zot ti mirmire anba latant, e zot ti refiz ekout LESEGNER.
106.26: LESEGNER lev so lame pou fer enn serman ki li pou les zot mor dan dezer;
106.27: li pou fann zot desandan parmi bann infidel e les zot mor dan bann pei etranze.
106.28: Dan Peor, lepep Bondie angaz zot dan adorasion Baal; zot manz lofrand ki ti ofer bondie mor.
106.29: Sa manier-la ti anflam lakoler LESEGNER e li avoy enn maladi mortel lor zot.
106.30: Me Fineas ti leve pou intervenir, e fleo-la ti arete.
106.31: Sa aksion-la ti rekonet dan so faver kouma drwatir, ti res dan memwar bann zenerasion pou touzour.
106.32: Kot lasours Meriba dimounn ti fer LESEGNER ankoler e akoz zot, Moiz ti gagn bien traka,
106.33: parski zot ti fer li exaspere e li ti pe koze san panse.
106.34: Zot pa ti eliminn bann infidel kouma LESEGNER ti dimann zot
106.35: me zot ti marye ar bann nasion ki pa konn Bondie e ti adopte zot koutim ek zot pratik.
106.36: Lepep Bondie ti ador idol bann-la e samem ki ti amenn zot ver destriksion.
106.37: Zot ofer bann idol Kanaan zot prop tifi ek garson kouma sakrifis;
106.38: zot ti touy zanfan inosan e disan inosan ti polie later.
106.39: Zot konportman ti fer zot vinn inpir, zot pratik ti infidel parey kouma prostitision.
106.40: LESEGNER ti bien ankoler ar so pep e li ti degoute ar zot, so prop pep.
106.41: Li ti les zot dan lame infidel e zot ti pe dirize par zot lennmi.
106.42: Zot lennmi ti kontrol zot; zot ti kouma esklav.
106.43: Boukou fwa LESEGNER ti sov so pep me sak fwa zot ti revolte kont li e zot koul dan fon pese.
106.44: Malgre sa, li tann zot ler zot kriy osekour e li pran kont zot detres.
106.45: Akoz li kontan zot li rapel so lalians; akoz so lamour infini li ti montre konpasion.
106.46: Li ti adousi leker bann ki ti pe tini zot an kaptivite, e bann-la ti ena pitie pou zot.
106.47: Sov nou O SEGNER, nou Bondie, tir nou parmi bann nasion e rasanble nou, pou ki nou kapav remersie twa e loue to gran nom sakre.
106.48: Nou loue LESEGNER, Bondie Izrael; Nou loue li aster ek touletan! Nou tou, anou dir “Amen!” Alelouya, nou loue LESEGNER!

107.1: “Nou dir mersi LESEGNER parski li bon e so lamour infini li eternel!”
107.2: Zot tou ki LESEGNER finn libere, repet sa, zot ki finn libere dan lame adverser,
107.3: e li finn gid zot lor sime retour depi exil ki zot ti dan les, dan lwes, dan lenor ouswa dan Lesid.
107.4: Ena ti perdi sime dan dezer e pa ti kone kot pou pase pou rant dan sivilizasion.
107.5: Zot ti konn lafin ek laswaf e zot ti pe perdi lespwar.
107.6: Dan zot detres zot ti rapel LESEGNER e dan so bonte li ti konsol zot.
107.7: Li ti tras enn sime drwat ki ti amenn zot direk anvil.
107.8: Zot tou zot bizin dir mersi LESEGNER pou so lamour infini; pou bann mirak an faver limanite.
107.9: Kan gagn swaf li donn dilo; kan gagn fin li donn bon manze.
107.10: Ena ki ti plonze dan marenwar; zot ti ansene dan lamizer
107.11: parski zot ti revolte kont Parol Bondie e zot ti rezet lansegnman Bondie Pli Lao.
107.12: Travo forse ti minn zot; zot pa ti kapav tini dibout e ler zot ti tonbe pa ti ena personn pou ed zot.
107.13: Dan zot detres zot ti rapel LESEGNER e dan so bonte li ti konsol zot.
107.14: Li ti tir zot dan marenwar, kas zot lasenn.
107.15: Zot tou zot bizin dir mersi LESEGNER pou so lamour infini; pou bann mirak an faver limanite.
107.16: Li defons laport metal bronz, e fer baro feray anvole.
107.17: Ena inbesil ki ti pe soufer parski zot pese ti pe pez lour e osi parski zot ti pe patoz dan lemal;
107.18: zot pa ti pe kapav get manze zot ti ena enn lipie dan tom.
107.19: Dan zot detres zot ti rapel LESEGNER e dan so bonte li ti konsol zot.
107.20: Par so parol li ti geri zot, li ti anpes zot rant dan trou lamor.
107.21: Zot tou zot bizin dir mersi LESEGNER pou so lamour infini; pou bann mirak an faver limanite.
107.22: Zot bizin ofer sakrifis remersiman; ar sante lazwa dir lemond antie grander Bondie.
107.23: Ena ki ti travay marin ki ti gagn zot lavi ar travay abor.
107.24: Zot ti konsian pouvwar LESEGNER e zot ti temwin so bann explwa lor dilo.
107.25: Kouma li donn lord bann rafal koumans soufle e bann vag lor dilo koumans leve.
107.26: Bann bato mont lao lor latet vag e apre desann net anba dan profonder bann vag. Dan sa kalite siklonn-la bann marin ti perdi kouraz;
107.27: zot ti balote kouma soular. Tou zot konesans ek lexperyans ti anglouti.
107.28: Dan zot detres zot ti kriye LESEGNER e dan so bonte li ti tir zot dan zot langwas.
107.29: Li ti kalme koler siklonn e bann vag ti koumans kalme.
107.30: Zot ti ere ki move-tan ti pase e LESEGNER ti ramenn zot dan por.
107.31: Zot tou zot bizin dir mersi LESEGNER pou so lamour infini; pou bann mirak an faver limanite.
107.32: Zot bizin deklar so grander dan lasanble lepep e sant so louanz divan konsey dirizan.
107.33: LESEGNER fer bann larivier sek e bann lasours nepli larg enn sel gout dilo.
107.34: Li fer later fertil vinn laplenn disel akoz mesanste bann move dimounn ki abit laba.
107.35: LESEGNER plant bann oazis dan dezer; e later desese ranpli ar lasours dilo.
107.36: Li amenn dimounn afame vinn viv la e konstrir sivilizasion pou viv ere.
107.37: Zot sem lagrin, zot plant pie rezin e zot gagn lakoup rekor.
107.38: Li ti beni so pep e ti fer zot gagn boukou zanfan; anplis li ti anpes zot troupo zanimo diminie.
107.39: Kan lepep Bondie ti konn defet e ti sibir imiliasion, dominasion ek soufrans,
107.40: li ti montre bann dimounn nob so mepri. Li ti fer zot perdi sime dan dezer.
107.41: Me li ti sov bann ki bizin led e fer zot fami peple lor vites.
107.42: Kan bann dimounn drwat ti trouv sa, zot ti santi enn gran lazwa me bann dan lemal ti oblize ferm labous.
107.43: Tou bann dimounn saz, zame bliye sa! Zame bliye lamour infini nou SEGNER!

108.1: Mo leker ferm ar konfians, O Bondie! Mo pou sante, mo pou fer melodi ar tou mo leker!
108.2: Leve, twa mo lagitar ek mo sitar! Mo pou fer soley leve.
108.3: Mo pou dir twa mersi, O SEGNER, divan tou bann pep. Mo pou sant to louanz parmi bann nasion.
108.4: To lamour infini depas oter lesiel; to fidelite travers tou bann domenn seles.
108.5: O Bondie, montre to grander dan lesiel; montre to laglwar partou lor later.
108.6: Sov nou ar to lafors; ekout mo lapriyer pou ki lepep ki to kontan gagn so liberasion.
108.7: Depi dan so sanktier Bondie finn dir, “Pou montre mo pouvwar, mo pou diviz Sikem e mo pou donn mo pep Vale Soukot.
108.8: Mo pou gard pou mwa Galaad ek Manase; Efraim vinn mo kask e Zide vinn mo sinbol rwayote.
108.9: Mo pou servi Moab kouma mo kivet e mo pou lans mo savat lor Edom pou montre ki mwa ki so proprieter. Mo pou kriye for-for mo viktwar lor bann Filistin.”
108.10: Kisann-la pou amenn mwa dan lavil fortifie? Kisann-la pou amenn mwa Edom?
108.11: Eski vremem to finn rezet nou, O Bondie? Vremem to pa pou mars ar nou larme?
108.12: Ed nou, O Bondie, kont nou lennmi; koudme dimounn pena gran valer.
108.13: Avek Bondie nou pou ranport laviktwar. Li pou kraz nou lennmi.

109.1: Bondie, twa ki mo loue, pa gard silans.
109.2: Move dimounn, ipokrit ek manter, pe atak mwa ar zot lalang mansonz.
109.3: Zot invant zistwar lor mwa e fer mwa ditor san okenn rezon.
109.4: Zot akiz mwa malgre mo kontan zot e mo finn priye pou zot.
109.5: Pou dibien ki mo fer, zot rann mwa par lemal; pou lamour ki mo done, zot rann mwa laenn.
109.6: Swazir enn akizater kont li, swazir enn move dimounn pou debout dan so kote drwat.
109.7: Fer ziz-la deklar li koupab lafin so prose; fer ki mem so lapriyer enn ofans kont Bondie.
109.8: Fer lamor zwenn li vit; fer enn lot dimounn gagn so travay!
109.9: Fer so fam vinn vev ek so zanfan orfelin!
109.10: Fer so zanfan vinn mandian e viv dan lari; ki zot al mandie lwin ar zot lakaz an-rwinn!
109.11: Fer bann kaser sezi so dibien; fer bann etranze profit so travay!
109.12: Pa les personn montre li zantiyes; pa les personn okip so zanfan kan li mor!
109.13: Pran lavi tou so desandan! Koumsa so nom pou disparet pou touletan.
109.14: Rapel LESEGNER pese so bann anset; zame bliye pese so mama!
109.15: SEGNER, rapel bien tou zot pese me bliye vit zot lexistans!
109.16: Sa move dimounn-la zame li ti fer dibien pou lezot; li ti zis konn fer mizer bann pov ek seki pena nanye, kraz enn malere ziska fini li net.
109.17: Li ti kontan modi lezot. Aster fer li sarye malediksion. Zame li ti demann Bondie beni lezot. Aster les li viv san benediksion!
109.18: Li ti modi lezot koumadir malediksion enn zafer normal; aster fer so prop malediksion tranp so lapo e kouma delwil, rant partou ziska so dan so lezo!
109.19: Fer so prop malediksion kouver so lekor kouma linz e ser so lerin toulezour kouma sang.
109.20: SEGNER, koumsa ki to bizin pini mo lennmi; koumsa to bizin pini bann ki fer mwa ditor.
109.21: SEGNER, mo Segner, ed mwa pou loner to nom; parski to lamour infini telman bon, sov mwa.
109.22: Mo pov; mo enn malere; mo blese dan profonder mo leker.
109.23: Mo lavi pase, kouma lonbraz letan aswar aprose; kouma sotrel ki divan siklonn soufle kot li anvi.
109.24: Telman mo pa finn manze, mo zenou pe tranble; mo finn vinn lapo-lezo.
109.25: Kan dimounn trouv mwa zot sikane; zot sakouy latet pou montre zot mepriz mwa.
109.26: Ed mwa, SEGNER, mo Bondie! Parski to lamour li infini, sov mwa!
109.27: Fer mo lennmi kone ki twa ki finn azir ki twa, SEGNER, to mars ar mwa.
109.28: Mem si bann-la modi mwa, twa to beni mwa. Fer bann ki martiriz mwa konn defet e fer mwa, to serviter, gagn enn gran boner.
109.29: Anvlop mo lennmi dan disgras; fer zot met kostim laont.
109.30: Mo pou dir LESEGNER mersi for-for; mo pou koz so grander dan lasanble lepep
109.31: parski li defann bann pov e sov zot kont dominer ki rod kondann zot amor.

110.1: LESEGNER Bondie dir mo segner lerwa, “Asiz la, dan mo kote drwat e atann ziska ki mo fer to lennmi azenou divan to lipie.”
110.2: LESEGNER pou fer ou pouvwar rwayal grandi depi Zerizalem ziska lezot landrwa. Inpoz to lalwa ek to pouvwar lor to lennmi.
110.3: Kan ou desid pou dres kont ou lennmi ou pep pou dibout pou soutenir ou konba. Parey kouma laroze gramatin bann zenes pou vinn ver ou lor montagn sakre.
110.4: LESEGNER ti fer enn serman e li pa pou renie so promes: “Ou pou res so pret pou touletan parey kouma pret Melkisedek.” # 110:4 Zenez 14:18. Ebre 5:6,10; 6:20; 7:3,17,21.
110.5: LESEGNER pe asiz dan ou kote drwat; kan so koler pran li, li rakle bann lerwa.
110.6: Li pou ziz bann nasion, e kadav bann lennmi pou tale partou; li kraz bann dirizan partou lor later.
110.7: Nou lerwa pou bwar dilo ki sorti dan lasours; li pou vinn for e li pou relev so latet.

111.1: Alelouya, nou sant louanz LESEGNER! Depi profonder mo leker mo pou dir LESEGNER mersi dan lasanble bann fidel, divan tou dimounn.
111.2: LESEGNER finn fer bann aksion extraordiner; tou dimounn ki admir so bann explwa reflesi lor la.
111.3: Tou seki Lesegner fer, reyone ar loner ek mazeste. So drwatir li eternel.
111.4: Li pa les nou bliye so bann explwa extraordiner. LESEGNER ranpli ar bonte ek konpasion.
111.5: Li nouri bann ki rekonet so grander; zame li pa renie so lalians.
111.6: Li finn montre so pep ki kalite pwisan so pouvwar ete ler li konfiske later bann infidel pou donn so prop pep.
111.7: Tou seki li fer, gouverne par fidelite ek lazistis; kapav fer konfians so bann instriksion.
111.8: Zot eternel parski zot baze lor laverite ek drwatir.
111.9: Li ti donn so pep liberasion e ti fer enn lalians eternel ar zot. Li vre Bondie, li sin, li redoutab.
111.10: Rekonet lotorite LESEGNER samem koumansman lasazes; tou seki pratik sa, montre zot ena bon zizman. Louanz LESEGNER li pou eternel.

112.1: Alelouya, nou sant louanz LESEGNER! Bienere dimounn ki onor LESEGNER, ki obeir so lansegnman ar plezir.
112.2: Zanfan bon dimounn pou pwisan dan pei, desandan dimounn ki drwat pou resevwar benediksion.
112.3: So fami pou posed dibien ek la rises, e zot drwatir pou res pou touzour.
112.4: Dan marenwar lalimier briye pou dimounn ki drwat, pou dimounn ki zenere, bon ek zis.
112.5: Dimounn ki zenere e ki prete, li pou dan bien, si roul so komers dan enn manier drwat, li pou fer bien.
112.6: Bon dimounn pa konn defet e touletan dimounn pou rapel li.
112.7: Li pa per kan li tann move nouvel; so lafwa li ferm ek solid, li met so konfians dan LESEGNER.
112.8: So leker ferm, li pa per pou nanye; li sir ki li pou get so lennmi dan defet.
112.9: Li bien zenere, li ed bann malere, e so drwatir res pou touzour; li pou ena pouvwar e dimounn pou respekte li.
112.10: Kan bann azan lemal trouv sa, zot ankoler; zot grinse, lor vites zot disparet; zot lespwar disparet pou touletan.

113.1: Alelouya, nou sant louanz LESEGNER! Zot tou, serviter LESEGNER, loue, loue nom LESEGNER.
113.2: Ki nom LESEGNER gagn tou louanz, depi aster ek pou touletan.
113.3: Depi soley leve ziska soley kouse loue nom LESEGNER.
113.4: LESEGNER gouvern lor tou bann nasion, e so laglwar depas lesiel.
113.5: Kisann-la parey kouma LESEGNER nou Bondie ki lor so tronn bien lao,
113.6: verse pou get lesiel ek later?
113.7: Li tir bann pov dan lapousier; li tir bann malere dan salte.
113.8: Li fer zot vinn konpagnon bann prins, bann prins ki gouvern so pep.
113.9: Li donn enn lakaz bann madam ki pa kapav gagn zanfan e li beni zot ar nesans zanfan. Alelouya, nou sant louanz LESEGNER!

114.1: Kan pep Izrael ti kit Lezip, kan desandan Zakob ti kit sa pei etranze la
114.2: Zide ti vinn sanktier Bondie e Izrael ti vinn Bondie so prop propriete.
114.3: Ler lamer trouv sa, ala li sove! Larivier Zourdin rekile.
114.4: Montagn sot-sote kouma kabri, kolinn sot-sote kouma mouton.
114.5: Ki ti ariv twa lamer pou to sove koumsa? Ki ti ariv twa Zourdin pou to rekile?
114.6: Twa montagn, kifer to ti sot-sote kouma kabri? Twa kolinn, kifer to ti sot-sote kouma mouton?
114.7: Tranble, twa later, dan prezans LESEGNER, dan prezans Bondie ki Zakob adore,
114.8: ki fer ros vinn basin dilo, ki fer granit koule kouma lafontenn.

115.1: SEGNER, zis twa ki merit laglwar; zis twa, pa nou, parski twa ki lasours lamour infini ek fidelite.
115.2: Kifer bann nasion dimande, “Kot zot Bondie, zot?”
115.3: Nou Bondie, limem viv dan lesiel e li fer tou seki li anvi fer.
115.4: Bann-la zot bondie fabrike ar metal kouma lor ek larzan par lame imin.
115.5: Zot ena labous me zot pa kapav koze; zot ena lizie me zot pa trouv kler.
115.6: Zot ena zorey me zot pa tande; zot ena nene me zot pa santi loder.
115.7: Zot ena lame me zot pa tous nanye; zot ena lipie me zot pa kapav marse; okenn son pa sorti dan zot lagorz.
115.8: Bann artizan ki fabrik idol e met zot konfians dan metal, pou vinn parey kouma zot idol ki zot finn fabrike.
115.9: Twa pep Izrael, met to konfians dan LESEGNER. Limem to protekter ek to sekour.
115.10: Zot, bann pret dan tanp Lesegner, met zot konfians dan lame LESEGNER. Limem zot protekter ek zot sekour.
115.11: Zot tou ki respekte LESEGNER, met zot konfians dan LESEGNER. Limem zot protekter ek zot sekour.
115.12: LESEGNER rapel ki nou ete e li beni nou; li pou beni pep Izrael, li pou beni bann desandan Aaron.
115.13: Li pou beni tou dimounn ki respekte li, ti-dimounn kouma gran-dimounn.
115.14: SEGNER donn zot boukou zanfan; parey pou zot desandan!
115.15: Ki LESEGNER beni zot, LESEGNER ki finn kree later ek lesiel.
115.16: Lesiel, sa li lesiel LESEGNER me li finn donn limanite later pou li viv.
115.17: Dimounn mor pa loue LESEGNER; ni bann ki desann dan lemond gran silans.
115.18: Me nou, nou remersie LESEGNER aster, pli divan ek touletan. Alelouya, nou sant louanz LESEGNER!

116.1: Mo kontan LESEGNER parski li finn tann mo lapriyer ek mo siplikasion.
116.2: Li ekout mwa avek atansion mo pou invok li osi lontan ki mo viv.
116.3: Lamor ti pe fer mo letour pou anvlop mwa; tom ti pe ouver an gran pou aval mwa. Traka ek lafreyer ti pe sezi mwa par lagorz.
116.4: Alor mo kriye LESEGNER par so nom, “SEGNER, sov mwa, SEGNER!”
116.5: LESEGNER li bon ek zenere; Bondie ranpli ar konpasion.
116.6: LESEGNER protez dimounn feb; kan mo ti tom bien ba, li ti sov mwa.
116.7: Mo lespri trankil, mo retrouv mo repo, parski LESEGNER finn fer dibien pou mwa.
116.8: To ti sov mwa, anpes lamor kokin mwa ale; to ti souy mo larm, to ti anpes mo lipie kogne,
116.9: pou ki mo mars dan prezans LESEGNER dan lemond bann vivan.
116.10: Mo lafwa ti res ferm mem kan mo ti dir, “Mo finn fini net, aster!”
116.11: Mo ti telman boulverse mo ti dir, “Bann imin, zot tou manter.”
116.12: Ki bon kiksoz mo kapav donn LESEGNER pou remersie li pou tou so bienfe?
116.13: Mo pou prezant enn lofrand divin, dan koup delivrans e mo apel LESEGNER par so nom pou dir mersi.
116.14: Dan lasanble kot so pep reini mo pou onor tou mo bann promes anver LESEGNER.
116.15: LESEGNER resanti douler, kan so bann fidel mor.
116.16: Mwa mo to serviter, SEGNER; mo servi twa parey kouma mo mama ti fer. To finn kas lasenn ki ti atas mwa.
116.17: Mo pou ofer enn sakrifis remersiman, mo apel LESEGNER par so nom pou dir li mersi.
116.18: Dan lasanble kot so pep reini mo pou onor tou mo bann promes anver LESEGNER,
116.19: dan lakour Tanp LESEGNER omilie Zerizalem. Alelouya, nou sant louanz LESEGNER!

117.1: Tou bann nasion, anou sant louanz LESEGNER! Tou bann pep, anou sant so grander!
117.2: So lamour infini li bien gran pou nou e fidelite LESEGNER li eternel. Alelouya, nou sant louanz LESEGNER!

118.1: Nou remersie LESEGNER parski li vremem bon, so lamour infini li eternel.
118.2: Twa pep Izrael, dir for-for, “So lamour infini li eternel.”
118.3: Bann desandan Aaron dir, “So lamour infini li eternel.”
118.4: Nou tou ki ador li, anou dir, “So lamour infini li eternel.”
118.5: Kan mo ti dan detres, mo ti kriye LESEGNER e li ti tann mo lapriyer e li ti liber mwa.
118.6: LESEGNER li ar mwa mo pa per nanye; kisann-la kapav tous mwa?
118.7: Gras-a led ki LESEGNER donn mwa mo trouv defet mo bann lennmi.
118.8: Preferab met nou lavi dan lame LESEGNER, ki fer konfians enn imin.
118.9: Preferab met nou lavi dan lame LESEGNER, ki fer konfians bann dirizan imin.
118.10: Tou bann nasion ti fini antour mwa; gras-a pwisans LESEGNER mo ti detrir zot.
118.11: Zot ti fons lor mwa partou kote; gras-a pwisans LESEGNER mo ti detrir zot.
118.12: Zot ti desann lor mwa kouma enn niaz mous zonn me lor vites zot tengn kouma dife dan pikan; gras-a pwisans LESEGNER mo ti detrir zot.
118.13: Enn latak feros ti bouskil mwa, pou sey zet mwa anba, me LESEGNER ti ed mwa.
118.14: LESEGNER ti fer mwa vinn for ek pwisan, limem mo Sover.
118.15: Ekout bann sante laviktwar ek delivrans sorti depi dan latant lepep Bondie: “Lafors LESEGNER finn triyonfe!
118.16: Se so pwisans ki finn donn nou laviktwar, Lafors LESEGNER finn triyonfe!”
118.17: Non, mo pa pou mor; okontrer mo pou viv mo lavi pou mo rakont bann mervey ki LESEGNER finn realize.
118.18: Li finn pini mwa severman pou mo erer me li pa finn detrir mwa.
118.19: Ouver laport Tanp ki rezerve pou bann fidel; mo pou al andan pou dir mersi LESEGNER.
118.20: Samem laport LESEGNER; bann dimounn drwat kapav rant andan.
118.21: Mo dir twa mersi parski to finn reponn mwa, tomem mo Sover.
118.22: Ros ki mason ti rezete, zordi li ros prinsipal ki pe tini soubasman.
118.23: Sa li plan LESEGNER; pli merveye ki sa pena!
118.24: Zordi se zour ki LESEGNER finn fer; nou tou ere; anou selebre lazwa sa gran zour-la.
118.25: Delivre nou, SEGNER, delivre nou! O SEGNER, nou sipliy twa, donn nou sikse!
118.26: Ki Bondie beni seki rant isi dan nom LESEGNER. Depi dan so Tanp, nou partaz so benediksion ar zot.
118.27: LESEGNER, limem Bondie; li finn donn nou so lalimier. Trap bann ramo dan zot lame, koumans prosesion festival, e fer letour lotel.
118.28: Tomem mo Bondie, mo sant to louanz. Tomem mo Bondie, mo pou proklam to grander.
118.29: Nou remersie LESEGNER parski vremem li bon, so lamour infini li eternel.

119.1: Bienere bann ki amenn enn lavi san repros, ki viv dapre lalwa LESEGNER.
119.2: Bienere bann ki swiv so instriksion, ki obeir li ar sinserite profon dan zot leker.
119.3: Zame zot pa fote; zot swiv sime ki li finn trase.
119.4: To finn donn nou to instriksion, nou bizin obeir zot san fot.
119.5: Mo priye ki mo kondir mwa dan enn manier ferm pou ki mo reisi swiv to bann regleman.
119.6: Si mo swiv tou to komannman lerla mo pa pou gagn laont.
119.7: Ler mo konn apresie valer to regleman ki zis, mo pou rann glwar to grander ar sinserite.
119.8: Mo pou obeir to lalwa; zame pa abandonn mwa.
119.9: Ki manier enn zennom kapav res prop dan lavi? Li bizin obeir to lansegnman.
119.10: Ar tou mo leker mo rod twa; anpes mwa dezobeir to komannman.
119.11: Mo prezerv to parol dan mo leker pou mo pa fer pese kont twa.
119.12: Mo sant to louanz O SEGNER; montre mwa to regleman.
119.13: Mwa mo pou repete for-for tou bann desizion ki to finn donn nou.
119.14: Mo ena boukou lazwa kan mo obeir to komannman plis ki lazwa ki enn dimounn ena ki posed enn rises enorm.
119.15: Mo etidie to bann instriksion e fixe mo regar lor sime ki to montre mwa.
119.16: To bann lalwa donn mwa satisfaksion; to parol finn grave dan mo memwar.
119.17: Pran mwa, to serviter, bien kont pou ed mwa viv enn lavi ki obeir to parol.
119.18: Ouver mo lizie pou ki mo dekouver bann laverite merveye ki kasiet dan to bann lalwa.
119.19: Mo sezour lor later li kourt; pa kasiet mwa to bann komannman.
119.20: Sak moman mo leker brile ar inpasians pou to bann instriksion.
119.21: To repros bann ki fer zot fanor, bann modi ki dezobeir to instriksion.
119.22: Protez mwa kont zot mepri ek zot insilt parski mwa mo respekte to lord.
119.23: Bann dirizan zwenn pou konplote kont mwa me mwa mo prefer etidie to lansegnman.
119.24: To leson donn mwa plezir; zot bann konseye ki ouver mo lespri.
119.25: Mo mo anba dan lapousier; selon to parol, fer mwa reviv.
119.26: Mo ti konfes seki mo finn fer, mo bann erer e to ti reponn mwa; montre mwa to regleman.
119.27: Ed mwa pou konpran to bann exizans, e mo pou medit lor to bann aksion manifik.
119.28: Sagrin pe pins mo leker; donn mwa lafors dapre to parol.
119.29: Anpes mwa pran move sime e dan to bonte, ansegn mwa to lalwa.
119.30: Mo swazir pou swiv twa avek fidelite; mo pran bien kont sazes to zizman.
119.31: Mo finn aprann to lansegnman O SEGNER, pa fer mwa gagn laont.
119.32: Mo swiv sime to komannman ar boukou lazwa parski to fer mo konesans grandi.
119.33: SEGNER, montre mwa lespri to regleman e mo promet mo pou obeir zot touletan.
119.34: Fer mwa konpran to lalwa e mo pou swiv li; mo pou grav li dan mo leker.
119.35: Gard mwa dan lobeisans to bann instriksion parski zot donn mwa boukou boner.
119.36: Olie fer mwa anvi vinn ris, ranpli mo leker ar dezir pou obeir to lalwa.
119.37: Pa les mwa tante par zafer san valer; fer mwa viv dan to sime.
119.38: Onor promes ki to ti fer mwa, to serviter, samem promes ki to fer ar dimounn ki obeir twa.
119.39: Protez mwa kont insilt ki teroriz mwa; parski sazes to zizman li bon.
119.40: Mo dezir ekout to lord; par to drwatir fer mwa reviv.
119.41: SEGNER, montre mwa ki kantite to kontan mwa e sov mwa kouma to ti promet.
119.42: Koumsa mo pou kapav fer fas bann ki insilte mwa parski mo met mo konfians dan to parol.
119.43: Ed mwa pou koz laverite touletan parski mo lespwar li dan to zizman.
119.44: Mo pou touletan obeir to lalwa aster, pli tar, pou leternite.
119.45: Mo pou viv enn lavi dan parfe liberte parski mo fer tou pou ekout to konsey.
119.46: Mo pou dir bann lerwa ki to instriksion ete e mo pa pou onte pou fer sa.
119.47: Mo santi mwa dan bien kan mo pe obeir to komannman parski mo telman kontan to parol.
119.48: Mo respekte ek kontan to lansegnman e mo pou medit lor to bann exizans.
119.49: Rapel promes ki to ti fer mwa, to serviter; sa ti ranpli mwa ar lespwar.
119.50: Malgre mo soufrans mo ti gagn soulazman parski to promes ti re-donn mwa lavi.
119.51: Bann vantar finn bien fer foutan ar mwa me mo pa finn abandonn bann prinsip to lalwa.
119.52: Mo rapel klerman to bann zizman dan lepase parski zot donn mwa kouraz ek lape, O SEGNER.
119.53: Kan bann ki fer lemal viol to lalwa, lakoler bwi dan mwa.
119.54: Ninport ki kote mo viv kouma enn etranze lor later mo konpoz kantik pou sant to bann lansegnman.
119.55: Mem dan lanwit mo pans twa, SEGNER, e mo pou obeir to lalwa.
119.56: Kan mo pran kont to mesaz lerla ki mo gout veritab boner.
119.57: Mo pa bizin nanye apart twa, O SEGNER; mo fer serman mo pou obeir to parol.
119.58: Mo sipliy twa ar sinserite, montre mwa to bonte kouma to ti promet.
119.59: Mo finn examinn mo konportman e mo pe retourn ver to bann exizans.
119.60: San perdi letan mo swiv to instriksion lor vites.
119.61: Malgre bann azan lemal finn instal piez lor mo sime mo pa pou bliye to lalwa.
119.62: Omilie lanwit mo leve pou selebre twa pou to zizman ki drwat.
119.63: Mo solider ar bann ki ador twa e ki obeir to instriksion.
119.64: SEGNER, liniver ranpli ar to lamour infini; gid mwa atraver to lansegnman.
119.65: To finn onor to parol, SEGNER, e to finn fer dibien pou to serviter.
119.66: Donn mwa sazes ek konesans parski mo fer konfians to komannman.
119.67: Avan to ti imilie mwa, mo ti egare me aster mo gard to parol.
119.68: To bon e to leker li gran! Ansegn mwa to regleman.
119.69: Malgre ki ena dimounn fezer ki finn rakont zistwar lor mwa, mwa ar leker kler mo swiv to instriksion.
119.70: Sa bann-la zot pa konpran nanye; me mwa, mo trouv boukou plezir dan to lalwa.
119.71: To pinision finn fer mwa boukou dibien; li finn fer mwa konpran to leson.
119.72: Lalwa ki to prononse, samem meyer pou mwa, li vo plis ki tou bann trezor dan lemond.
119.73: To ti kree mwa, to finn fasonn mwa; nouri mo lespri pou mo konpran to bann komannman.
119.74: Bann ki respekte twa pou kontan ler zot trouv mwa parski mo finn met mo lesperans dan to parol.
119.75: Mo kone ki to bann zizman zot baze lor drwatir, SEGNER, e to ti ena rezon pou imilie mwa dan to fidelite.
119.76: Konsol mwa ar to lamour infini, kouma to finn promet mwa, to serviter.
119.77: Ena pitie pou mwa e mo pou kontigne viv parski mo kontan to lalwa.
119.78: Fer bann gran-nwar dekonserte pou zot bann fos akizasion lor mwa; dan mo kote, mo pou medit lor to bann instriksion.
119.79: Fer bann ki respekte twa vinn ver mwa pou ki zot konn to bann lord.
119.80: Ed mwa pou respekte to lansegnman kouma bizin pou anpes mwa sibir imiliasion dan defet.
119.81: Mo epwize telman mo atann to delivrans, mo finn met mo lespwar dan to parol.
119.82: Mo lizie pe trouv som telman mo atann to promes; mo dir momem, “Kan to pou konsol mwa?”
119.83: Mo santi mwa initil koumadir mo enn touk perse; pourtan zame mo pa finn bliye to bann lansegnman.
119.84: Komie letan mo pou bizin atann? Kan to pou pini bann ki persekit mwa?
119.85: Bann gran-nwar ki pa respekte to lalwa finn plas bann piez partou lor mo sime.
119.86: To bann instriksion ranpli ar laverite. Mo lennmi pe persekit mwa san okenn rezon; ed mwa!
119.87: Bann-la ti pre pou fini mwa, mo manke trouv lamor, me mo pa finn abandonn to lansegnman.
119.88: Ar to lamour infini, prezerv mo lavi, pou ki mo kapav obeir lord ki to done.
119.89: To parol, O SEGNER, li eternel li fixe pou touletan dan lesiel.
119.90: To fidelite li dire zenerasion apre zenerasion; to finn met later dan so plas e li res stab.
119.91: Par to lord tou kiksoz finn tini ziska zordi, e kouma bon serviter, zot ekout twa.
119.92: Si to lalwa pa ti lasours mo lazwa depi lontan mo douler ti pou fini touy mwa.
119.93: Zame mo pou inior to bann instriksion parski gras-a zot mo ankor vivan.
119.94: Mo lavi dan to lame! Sov mwa! Mo finn touletan fer tou pou respekte to instriksion.
119.95: Bann ki pratik lemal pe veye pou touy mwa me mwa mo pou kontigne medit lor to ansegnman.
119.96: Mo kone ki mem kiksoz parfe ena so limit me to komannman li pena limit.
119.97: O komie mo kontan to lalwa! Lanwit-lizour mo medit lor to lalwa.
119.98: To komannman grave dan mo latet; akoz sa mo ena plis sazes ki mo lennmi.
119.99: Parfwa mo konpran plis ki profeser parski mo touletan pe medit lor to lansegnman.
119.100: Mo lespri pli for ki lespri bann gran-dimounn parski mwa mo obeir to instriksion.
119.101: Mo finn evit konportman malsin parski mo krwar dan to parol.
119.102: Mo pa finn bliye okenn to bann regleman parski twa ki mo profeser.
119.103: To parol zot extra dou, pli dou ki dimiel.
119.104: To instriksion fer mwa vinn saz akoz sa mo deteste move konportman.
119.105: To lalwa li enn lalanp ki ekler mo sime; enn far ki diriz mwa dan marenwar.
119.106: Mo fer serman mo pou onor mo promes pou obeir to bann instriksion ki baze lor drwatir.
119.107: Mo douler, SEGNER, li atros; re-donn mwa lavi selon to parol.
119.108: Aksepte mo lapriyer aksiondegras, SEGNER, e ansegn mwa to bann leson.
119.109: Mo touletan pe pran risk ar mo lavi me zame mo pa finn bliye to lalwa.
119.110: Bann ki pratik lemal ti met piez partou lor mo larout; malgre sa mo ti refiz dezobeir to lansegnman.
119.111: To bann exizans finn grave dan mo lespri pou leternite; zotmem ki met lazwa dan mo leker.
119.112: Mo pou kontigne obeir to volonte pou touzour, ziska lafin net.
119.113: Mo deteste bann ki ezite pou swiv twa me mwa, mo kontan to lalwa.
119.114: Tomem mo protekter, mo sover; mo fer konfians to parol.
119.115: Sort divan mwa ale, zot tou serviter lemal! Mwa mo respekte komannman mo Bondie.
119.116: Donn mwa lafors kouma to ti promet pou ki mo viv; pa desevwar mo lesperans.
119.117: Ar to soutien mo pou an sekirite e mo pou kontigne met to bann instriksion an pratik.
119.118: To kondann bann ki dezobeir to instriksion parski bann plan fos ki zot fer pa servi nanye.
119.119: To tret bann move dimounn lor later kouma salte akoz sa mo kontan to bann regleman.
119.120: Mo rekonet ki mo per twa, mo mem gagn frison; e mo gagn per to bann zizman.
119.121: Mo finn fer tou seki mo krwar bon ek korek; pa abandonn mwa dan grif bann opreser.
119.122: Promet mwa ki to pou ed to serviter; pa les bann gran-nwar fer dominer ar mwa.
119.123: Mo lizie ki res ouver, zot fatige rod to sekour; zot kontign rod delivrans ki to promet.
119.124: Donn mwa zis seki to lamour infini komande e ansegn mwa to bann regleman.
119.125: Mwa mo zis to serviter; ekler mo lespri pou mo aprann ek konpran to lansegnman.
119.126: SEGNER, finn ler pou to azir, parski dimounn pe dezobeir to lalwa.
119.127: Mo vreman kontan to komannman plis ki lor, plis ki lor pli fin ki ena.
119.128: Alor san ezite mo swiv tou to bann instriksion e mo deteste larout mansonz.
119.129: Tou to bann lansegnman zot merveye; alor ar tou mo leker mo met zot an pratik.
119.130: Kan dimounn dekouver to parol sa li ekler zot lavi e bann inioran trouv lizour.
119.131: Telman mo anvi bwar to bann komannman ki mo labous res gran ouver.
119.132: Vinn ed mwa, akord mwa to lagras, kouma to fer ar tou dimounn ki kontan twa.
119.133: Dapre to parol, diriz mo pa pou mo pa tonbe; pa les lemal devir mo lavi.
119.134: Tir mwa dan latrap opreser pou ki mo lib pou obeir to instriksion.
119.135: Fer lalimier to prezans briy lor mwa, to serviter, e ansegn mwa to regleman.
119.136: Mo larm koule kouma robine kan mo trouv dimounn dezobeir to lalwa.
119.137: SEGNER, tomem lasours drwatir e to lalwa li zis.
119.138: To bann instriksion zot baze lor drwatir ek lazistis, zot ranpli ar fidelite.
119.139: Lakoler anflam mo lespri akoz mo lennmi bliye to parol.
119.140: To promes finn pas tou leprev. Sa mo lavi sa, mo pli gran trezor!
119.141: Mem si mo pa inportan e lezot mepriz mwa zame mo tourn ledo ar to lansegnman.
119.142: To drwatir li eternel e to lalwa li laverite pou touletan.
119.143: Traka ek tourman trangle mo lexistans me to lalwa ranpli mo leker ar lazwa.
119.144: To bann instriksion zot drwat pou leternite; ekler mo lespri, koumsa mo kapav viv.
119.145: Ar sinserite mo dimann to led; reponn mwa SEGNER e mo pou fer tou seki to regleman dir.
119.146: Mo sipliy twa: sov mwa, e mo pou respekte to bann lord.
119.147: Avan soley leve, mo priye twa pou dimann to led; mo lespwar repoz lor to parol.
119.148: Aswar mo pa dormi pou mo kapav medite, mo medit lor tou to bann lansegnman.
119.149: O SEGNER, akoz to lamour infini, ekout mo lapriyer; e protez mo lavi, dapre to desizion.
119.150: Bann ki persekit mwa avek kriote, zot pe raprose, sa bann-la zot bien lwin ar to lalwa.
119.151: Me twa SEGNER, to la koste ar mwa e to komannman li vre pou touletan.
119.152: Bien-bien lontan, mo ti aprann ki to bann instriksion to finn etablir zot pou leternite.
119.153: Pran kont mo douler e sov mwa parski zame mo finn bliye to lalwa.
119.154: Pran mo par e liber mwa; sov mwa kouma to finn promet.
119.155: Bann ki pratik lemal pa pou gagn delivrans parski zot pa rod to bann regleman.
119.156: Me twa, SEGNER, to konpasion li infini; atraver to zizman prezerv mo lavi.
119.157: Mo ena boukou lennmi e boukou persekiter, me zame mo finn abandonn to regleman.
119.158: Kan mo get sa bann tret-la mo gagn maloker parski zot pa respekte to instriksion.
119.159: Get mwa kouma mo kontan to lansegnman. Parski to lamour li infini, prezerv mo lavi.
119.160: Laverite samem leker to parol, e to bann zizman ki drwat, zot pou reste pou leternite.
119.161: Bann dimounn pwisan pe atak mwa pou nanye, mwa mo ena gran respe pou to parol.
119.162: To parol donn mwa gran lazwa kouma kikenn ki finn dekouver enn gran trezor.
119.163: Mo ayir ek deteste mansonz, me mo kontan to lalwa.
119.164: Set fwa par zour mo loue twa pou to bann bon zizman baze lor lazistis.
119.165: Bann ki kontan to lalwa zot viv dan lape e nanye pa kapav fer zot tonbe.
119.166: Mo pe atann ki to sov mwa SEGNER, e mo akonplir to bann komannman.
119.167: Mo obeir to lansegnman ki mo kontan ar enn lamour sinser.
119.168: Mo obeir to leson ek to instriksion; to lizie trouv tou seki mo fer.
119.169: SEGNER, les mo lapriyer rant dan to prezans; ekler mo lespri dapre to parol.
119.170: Aksepte mo siplikasion vinn dan to prezans e sov mwa kouma to ti promet.
119.171: Mo pou sant to louanz parski to ansegn mwa to regleman.
119.172: Mo pou sant to promes parski to bann komannman li vre ek drwat.
119.173: Res touletan la pou ed mwa parski mwa mo touletan pe swiv to lord.
119.174: Mo gran dezir se ki to sov mwa, O SEGNER, e se to lalwa ki lasours mo boner.
119.175: Protez mo lavi pou ki mo kapav kontigne sant to grander e ed mwa ar to bann instriksion.
119.176: Mo finn egare kouma enn brebi ki finn perdi sime; vinn sers mwa, to serviter; zame mo finn bliye to bann komannman.

120.1: Dan mo detres, mo ti dimann led LESEGNER e li ti ekout mo lapriyer.
120.2: Sov mwa SEGNER kont lalev manter, kont labous tronper.
120.3: E bann manter! Ki Bondie pou fer ar zot? Ki kalite pinision li finn rezerve pou zot?
120.4: Pers zot ar fles fite. Bril zot ar labrez.
120.5: Li vreman malere ki mo viv parmi bann sovaz Mesek, ki mo bizin viv omilie bann barbar Kedar.
120.6: Mo finn viv tro lontan ar dimounn ki kont lape!
120.7: Mwa mo kontan lape, me kan mo koz lape, zot, zot swazir lager.

121.1: Mo get lao lor montagn; kot mo sekour pou sorti?
121.2: Sekour pou vinn depi LESEGNER, ki finn kree later ek lesiel.
121.3: Li pa pou les twa glise, tonbe; to protekter pa pou dormi.
121.4: Protekter Izrael pa kas kou, pa ferm lizie.
121.5: LESEGNER pou vey lor twa; LESEGNER koste ar twa, kouma enn lonbraz ki protez twa.
121.6: Soley pa pou fer twa ditor dan lazourne, ni lalinn pa pou fer twa dimal aswar.
121.7: LESEGNER pou protez twa kont tou danze; li pou prezerv to lavi.
121.8: LESEGNER pou protez twa ler to sorti ek ler to retourne, aster, pli divan ek touletan.

122.1: Mo ti ere ler zot ti dir mwa, “Anou al dan lakaz LESEGNER.”
122.2: Aster ala nou la devan to laport Zerizalem!
122.3: Lavil Zerizalem finn bien konstrir, li form enn linite parfe.
122.4: Isi mem bann tribi viv, bann tribi LESEGNER, isi mem zot monte pou remersie LESEGNER dan fason li ti dir bizin fer.
122.5: Isi mem ki bann lerwa Izrael asize pou fer lazistis, lor tronn desandan David.
122.6: Anou priye pou lape dan Zerizalem: “Ki zot konn prosperite, bann ki kontan twa.
122.7: Lape regn dan lavil ek sekirite dan bann pale.”
122.8: Pou bienet mo fami ek konesans mo dir Zerizalem, “Lape beni twa!”
122.9: Pou boner lakaz LESEGNER nou Bondie mo priye pou to prosperite.

123.1: Segner, mo lev mo lizie ver twa, lao ver lesiel kot to diriz tou depi to tronn.
123.2: Kouma enn serviter depann lor so patron e enn servant depann lor so patronn, nou, nou pou kontigne rod to faver, SEGNER nou Bondie, ziska ki to grasie nou.
123.3: Pitie, SEGNER, pitie, nou finn ase gagn maltrete.
123.4: Nou fatige, nou plin, ar bann ris ki mepriz nou, ar bann arogan ki imilie nou.

124.1: Si LESEGNER pa ti mars ar nou - ale, repete O Izrael -
124.2: Si LESEGNER pa ti mars ar nou ler nou lennmi ti pe atak nou
124.3: zot ti pou aval nou vivan dan zot koler ki ti pe sofe kont nou;
124.4: debordman ti pou sarye nou ale, toran ti pou kouver nou partou;
124.5: e nou ti pou nwaye par kouran delo inondasion.
124.6: Anou remersie LESEGNER ki finn anpes lennmi desir nou ar zot ledan.
124.7: Kouma ti zwazo nou finn reisi sap dan latrap saser; latrap-la finn deklinke e aster nou lib.
124.8: Nou sekour sorti depi LESEGNER limem, kreater lesiel ek later.

125.1: Bann ki met zot konfians dan LESEGNER zot kouma Montagn Sion ki personn pa kapav sakouye, li res la pou touzour.
125.2: Parey kouma montagn ankadre Zerizalem LESEGNER ankadre so pep aster, pli divan ek touletan.
125.3: Bann dirizan ki swiv lemal pa pou ena pouvwar touletan dan pei ki apartenir ar bann ki viv ladrwatir, sinon dimounn ki drwat pou tranp so lame dan lemal, dan krim.
125.4: SEGNER, montre to bonte ar dimounn ki bon; beni bann ki ena lazistis dan zot leker.
125.5: Kan to sas bann azan lemal, pini osi bann ki finn abandonn bon sime. Ki Izrael beni ar lape!

126.1: Kan LESEGNER ti ramenn nou dan Zerizalem, nou ti krwar nou pe reve.
126.2: Nou labous ti ranpli ar gran riye, nou lalang ti kriye ar lazwa. Ala nou riye la! Nou tann bann lezot nasion dir, “LESEGNER finn fer vremem boukou pou zot.”
126.3: Wi, LESEGNER ti vremem fer boukou pou nou. Akoz samem nou ti ere koumsa.
126.4: SEGNER, re-donn nou laglwar ki nou ti ena, parey kouma lapli ranpli larivier sek dan Negev.
126.5: Bann ki sem lagrin dan plantasion ar zot larm, pou fer lakoup dan lazwa.
126.6: Bann ki al dan plantasion avek larm, gro sak semans lor ledo, pou retourne lazwa dan leker, pou sante, bon rekolt dan zot panie.

127.1: Si LESEGNER pa konstrir enn lakaz, travay artizan tourn dan vid; si LESEGNER pa okip sekirite so lavil, bann santinel pou fer senntri dan vid.
127.2: Perdi letan rint nou lekor pou zwenn de bout, leve boner, al dormi tar, parski LESEGNER finn fini okip bienet dimounn ki li kontan letan zot pe dormi.
127.3: Enn zanfan li enn kado LESEGNER; bann zanfan zot enn benediksion.
127.4: Sak garson ki enn zom ena dan so zenes li kouma enn zarm dan lame enn solda.
127.5: Bienere zom ki so artilri ranpli ar zarm, plis li ena, plis li bon pou so defans. Li pa pou konn defet kan li zwenn so lennmi dan zizman.

128.1: Bienere tou dimounn ki ena respe pou LESEGNER, bann ki swiv sime li finn trase.
128.2: To travay pou ranpli to gard-manze; li donn twa boner ek prosperite.
128.3: To madam dan lakaz pou grandi to fami, li pou kouma enn pie rezin; e to bann zanfan pou parey bann brans zoliv otour to latab.
128.4: Samem benediksion ki pe atann enn dimounn ki obeir LESEGNER.
128.5: LESEGNER beni twa depi Montagn Sion! Osi lontan to viv to pou temwin prosperite Zerizalem.
128.6: Mo priye ki to viv ase lontan pou get to ti-zanfan grandi. Ki Izrael beni ar lape!

129.1: Depi mo zenes mo bann lennmi persekit mwa - ale, repete O Izrael -
129.2: “Depi mo zenes mo bann lennmi persekit mwa me zot pa finn gagn laviktwar lor mwa.”
129.3: Zot ti fouy sion profon lor mo ledo koumadir pe labour later.
129.4: Me LESEGNER, limem vre drwatir, li finn kas lasenn bann ki pratik lemal.
129.5: Mo priye ki tou dimounn ki ayir Sion zot zwenn defet dan laont ek konfizion.
129.6: Ki zot vinn kouma lerb ki pous lor twatir me ki mor avan ki rasinn devlope.
129.7: Move lerb pa ranpli lame enn kouper lerb; li pa ranpli lebra enn ramaser lerb.
129.8: Akoz samem bann pasan ki pase, zame zot pou arete pou dir bann mwasoner, “LESEGNER beni twa; Nou beni twa dan nom LESEGNER!”

130.1: Depi profonder mo dezespwar mo kriye twa, SEGNER.
130.2: O Segner, tann mo lavwa! Ekout mo lapriyer, mo sipliy twa ed mwa!
130.3: SEGNER, si to ti gard enn lalis tou nou pese, kisann-la ti pou kapav res dan to prezans?
130.4: Akoz to aksepte pardonn nou, nou dwa twa respe ek reverans.
130.5: Avek inpasians mo atann led LESEGNER e mo lesperans li dan so parol.
130.6: Avek inpasians mo pou atann larive Lesegner plis ki gardien-aswar esper gramatin vini. Wi! Plis ki gardien-aswar esper gramatin vini.
130.7: Izrael, met to lesperans dan LESEGNER! Lamour LESEGNER li infini e li ena gran pouvwar pou sov nou.
130.8: Limem ki pou liber so pep Izrael depi tou so bann pese.

131.1: SEGNER, mo leker pa vantar, mo regar pa reflet larogans; Mo pa galoup deryer bel-bel zafer ki tro gran pou mwa.
131.2: Okontrer, mo gard mwa kalm, mo rod trankilite, ki enn zanfan rode dan lebra so mama. Mo parey sa zanfan-la, kalm e lespri anpe.
131.3: Izrael, met to lespwar dan LESEGNER aster, taler, pli divan ek touletan!

132.1: SEGNER, pa bliye David; pa bliye komie li ti soufer.
132.2: Li ti fer enn serman devan LESEGNER, li ti fer enn promes Bondie Toupwisan ki Zakob adore,
132.3: “Mo pa pou retourn mo lakaz mo pa pou al dormi lor mo lili;
132.4: mo pa pou les mo lizie ferme ar somey, ni mo popier repoze pou dormi,
132.5: tanki mo pa finn gagn enn plas pou LESEGNER, enn lakaz pou Bondie Toupwisan ki Zakob adore.”
132.6: Dan Betleem nou tann koz Kof ki ti gard Lalians, nou ti retrouv li dan laplenn Yaar.
132.7: Nou ti dir, “Anou al dan lakaz LESEGNER; laba anou fer servis adorasion devan so tronn.”
132.8: Lev twa SEGNER, al dan landrwa ki destine pou to repo, amenn ar twa Kof Lalians, ki montre to gran pouvwar.
132.9: Anvlop to bann pret dan manto lazistis, e ki to pep fidel kriye ar lazwa.
132.10: SEGNER, akoz to serviter David, pa abandonn lerwa ki twa to ti swazir.
132.11: LESEGNER ti fer enn promes ar David, promes ki li pa pou renie: “Enn to bann garson pou vinn lerwa e li pou regne apre twa.
132.12: Si to bann garson res fidel ar nou lalians e swiv bann instriksion ki mo done, zot zanfan ek zanfan zot zanfan pou vinn lerwa osi lontan ki lavi existe.”
132.13: LESEGNER finn swazir Sion; samem pou vinn so lakaz:
132.14: “Isi ki mo pou viv pou touletan e depi isi mo pou regne; samem mo dezir.
132.15: Mo pou beni Sion avek bann resours an abondans; so bann pov pou gagn manze.
132.16: Mo pou anvlop so bann pret dan manto delivrans, e so pep fidel pou kriye ek sante dan lazwa.
132.17: Enn parmi desandan David pou vinn enn gran lerwa isi; isi mo pou prezerv regn lerwa ki mo finn swazir kouma enn lalanp alime.
132.18: Lor so lennmi mo pou poz enn linz laont, me lor so latet pou ena enn kouronn ki briye.”

133.1: Ala li zoli la! Sa ki enn plezir sa! Lepep Bondie viv dan larmoni ek lakorite!
133.2: Li parey kouma delwil parfime ki finn verse lor latet, ki koule lor labarb, lor labarb Aaron, ki desann lor kol so manto.
133.3: Li osi parey kouma laroze Montagn Ermon ki desann lor kolinn Sion. Laba mem LESEGNER finn promet so benediksion: lavi pou touzour.

134.1: Loue LESEGNER, zot tou, serviter LESEGNER, zot tou ki ofisie aswar dan Tanp LESEGNER.
134.2: Lev lame lao ver sanktier ler zot priye dan Tanp; sant louanz LESEGNER.
134.3: Ki LESEGNER ki finn kree later ek lesiel, beni twa depi Sion.

135.1: Alelouya! Loue nom LESEGNER! Zot tou, serviter LESEGNER, sant so louanz,
135.2: zot ki debout dan lakaz LESEGNER, dan lakour Tanp nou Bondie.
135.3: Nou selebre LESEGNER parski li bon; nou sant louanz LESEGNER parski li zenere.
135.4: Li ti swazir Zakob pou limem; pep Izrael kouma so prop trezor.
135.5: Mo kone ki LESEGNER li gran; pli gran ki tou lezot bondie.
135.6: Li kapav fer tou seki li anvi dan lesiel ek lor later, lor lamer ek dan profonder losean.
135.7: Li ris niaz siklonn depi finfon later; li lans zekler pou alim tanpet lapli; li larg rafal depi so prop rezerv.
135.8: Dan Lezip li ti touy bann premie ne, premie ne dimounn kouma zanimo.
135.9: Laba li ti fer mirak ek prodiz kont Faraon ek so bann minis.
135.10: Li ti detrir plizier nasion e li ti touy plizier lerwa pwisan:
135.11: Sihon, lerwa Amorit, Og, lerwa Basann, e tou bann lerwa dan Kanaan.
135.12: Li ti pran zot later pou li donn so pep, ti donn posesion zot later lepep Izrael.
135.13: SEGNER, to pou renome pou touletan; zenerasion apre zenerasion nou pou rapel sa.
135.14: LESEGNER pou fer lazistis pou so pep; li pou ena konpasion pou so bann serviter.
135.15: Bann tribi priye bann idol fabrike ar lor ek larzan; lame imin ki donn zot form.
135.16: Zot ena labous me zot pa kapav koze; zot ena lizie me zot pa trouv kler.
135.17: Zot ena zorey me zot pa tande; zot mem pa ena lesouf ki sorti dan zot labous.
135.18: Bann artizan ki fabrik idol, bann ki finn met zot konfians dan idol, pou vinn parey kouma zot.
135.19: Anou loue LESEGNER, pep Izrael! Loue li, zot ki bann pret Bondie!
135.20: Zot bann Levit, loue LESEGNER; zot ki ador li, sant so grander!
135.21: Loue LESEGNER ki lor montagn Sion, lamem kot li reste, dan Zerizalem. Alelouya, nou sant louanz LESEGNER!

136.1: Nou remersie LESEGNER parski li bon; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.2: Nou remersie Bondie ki pli gran ki tou bondie; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.3: Nou remersie Lesegner, pli pwisan ki tou segner; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.4: Zis li tousel ki kapav fer bann gran mirak; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.5: Ar so sazes li ti konstrir lesiel; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.6: Li ti kree later lor losean profon; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.7: Li ti kree soley ek lalinn; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.8: Soley pou gouverne lizour; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.9: Lalinn ek zetwal pou gouverne aswar; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.10: Dan Lezip li ti touy tou bann garson premie ne; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.11: Li ti gid pep Izrael pou zot sorti depi Lezip; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.12: So lame pwisan, so lebra solid; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.13: Li fer dilo Lamer Rouz separ an de; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.14: Li ti gid so pep pou travers lamer; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.15: Li ti nway lerwa Lezip ek so larme; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.16: Li ti gid so pep atraver dezer; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.17: Li ti detrir bann lerwa pwisan; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.18: Li ti ranvers bann gran-gran lerwa; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.19: Sihon, lerwa Amorit; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.20: Og, lerwa Basann; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.21: Li ti pran zot later e li donn sa so pep; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.22: Li ti donn tousala Izrael, so serviter; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.23: Kan nou ti imilie, li pa ti abandonn nou; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.24: Li ti tir nou dan prizon nou lennmi; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.25: Li donn manze tou bann kreatir vivan; so lamour infini li eternel.
136.26: Nou remersie Bondie ki Souvrin dan lesiel, so lamour infini li eternel.

137.1: Dan bor bann larivier Babilonn nou ti asize; nou larm ti koule ler nou ti rapel Sion.
137.2: Lor pie pepliye dan bor dilo nou ti anpandan nou linstriman lamizik.
137.3: Nou lennmi konkeran demann nou sante. Nou persekiter demann enn kantik zwaye. Zot dir, “Sant enn sante ki sorti Sion.”
137.4: Kouma kapav sant enn sante pou LESEGNER kan nou dan pei etranze?
137.5: Si zame mo bliye twa Zerizalem, prefer mo lame bliye kouma zwe lamizik.
137.6: Si ena pou bliye twa, si mo nepli konsider twa lasours mo boner, prefer mo lalang amare e mo aret sante.
137.7: Rapel, SEGNER, ki bann Edomit ti fer zour ki Babilonien ti kaptir Zerizalem. Pa bliye ki zot ti pe dir, “Kraz partou! Met tou plat!”
137.8: Zour destriksion Babilonn pou vini. Bienere sa dimounn ki pou fer ar zot seki zot ti fer ar nou:
137.9: trap ti-baba pou kraz zot lor ros.

138.1: Mo remersie twa SEGNER ar tou mo leker; mo sant to louanz divan lezot bondie.
138.2: Mo fer fas to Tanp sakre, mo azenou e mo loue to nom pou to lamour infini e to fidelite parski to finn prouve ki to nom ek to lalwa zot pli ot e pli gran ki tou.
138.3: Kan mo finn dimann to led, to finn reponn; to finn ranpli mwa ar kouraz ek lafors.
138.4: SEGNER, tou bann lerwa dan lemond loue twa parski zot tann parol to labous.
138.5: Zot tou pou sant to bann explwa parski to laglwar li bien-bien gran.
138.6: Mem to lao laba dan lesiel, to okip bann ti-dimounn anba e bann vantar to rekonet zot depi lwin.
138.7: Si mo mars dan ladetres, to fer mwa reviv. To protez mwa kont lennmi redoutab e to pouvwar sov mwa.
138.8: LESEGNER pou onor tou promes li finn fer pou mwa; SEGNER, to lamour infini li eternel. Kontign zoli travay ki to finn koumanse.

139.1: Segner, to finn examinn mwa net e to kone ki mo ete.
139.2: To okouran kan mo asize, kan mo diboute; depi lwin laba to kone ki pase dan mo latet.
139.3: To kone sipa mo pe travay ou si mo pe kas poz; to ena tou konesans lor seki mo pe fer.
139.4: Avan mem mo ouver mo labous, SEGNER, to kone ki mo pou dir.
139.5: To la partou otour mwa e to lame protez mwa.
139.6: To konn mwa dan enn fason parfe, sitan bien, ki li difisil pou konpran tousala.
139.7: Kot mo kapav kasiet pou res lwin ar twa? Kot mo kapav sove pou pa tom dan to prezans?
139.8: Si mo mont dan lesiel to pou laba; si mo tom dan trou lamor, laba osi to pou prezan.
139.9: Si mo anvole, mo al lot kote, kot soley leve, si mo travers lamer pou al dan enn finfon, kot soley kouse,
139.10: to lame pou la pou gid mo pa, to lame drwat pou tini mwa ferm.
139.11: Si mo dir, “Mo sir marenwar pou kasiet mwa, ki lalimier otour mwa pou vinn obskirite,”
139.12: mo sir marenwar pa pou ase nwar pou kasiet mwa e lanwit pa pou ase som. Pou twa lalimier ek marenwar pa fer okenn diferans.
139.13: Se twa kreater sak parti mo lekor; se twa ki finn fasonn mwa dan vant mo mama.
139.14: Mo loue twa parski to finn kree mwa enn vre mervey, tou seki to fer li enn mervey, sa mo bizin rekonet.
139.15: To ti kone letan ti pe form mo bann lezo dan sekre, letan ti pe fasonn mwa dan profonder later.
139.16: To lizie ti trouv mo lekor ki pa ti ankor ena form. To ti fini tras tou mo bann zour avan mem ki mo lizie ti ouver pou trouv premie zour-la.
139.17: O Bondie, kouma li difisil pou konn to panse; zot inpozan, telman ena boukou!
139.18: To ena plis plan dan to latet ki lagrin disab lor laplaz; mo pa kapav konte; mo leve, mo touzour avek twa.
139.19: O Bondie, si selman to ti kapav fer move dimounn mor, e pous bann dimounn violan lwin ar mwa!
139.20: Zot dir bann kalomni ek mesanste lor twa; zot zet labou lor to nom.
139.21: O SEGNER, mo deteste bann ki ayir twa, zot degoutan bann ki revolte kont twa.
139.22: Mo vremem ayir zot, mo konsider zot kouma mo lennmi personel.
139.23: Examinn mwa, O Bondie pou to dekouver mo leker; teste mwa pou to konn mo panse.
139.24: Gete tomem si ena lemal dan mwa e gid mwa lor sime leternite.

140.1: SEGNER, protez mwa kont bann azan lemal; anpes bann dimounn violan fer mwa ditor.
140.2: Zot nek konplote pou fer lemal e zot touzour pe lev lager.
140.3: Zot lalang ena venin kouma serpan; zot parol sarye pwazon koumadir kobra.
140.4: Protez mwa, SEGNER, kont pouvwar lemal; anpes dimounn violan detrir mwa, bann ki rod met mwa lak.
140.5: Bann dimounn fezer finn instal latrap pou mwa; ar lakord zot finn tal enn file pou may mwa; zot finn met piez partou lor mo sime.
140.6: Mo dir LESEGNER, “Tomem mo Bondie!” Ekout mo lapriyer, SEGNER, mo pe sipliye!
140.7: Twa SEGNER, mo Segner, lafors ki sov mwa, to finn protez mo latet pandan konba.
140.8: SEGNER, pa sede devan dezir bann azan lemal; pa les zot reisi zot proze, sinon zot pou drese dan larogans.
140.9: Pa les mo bann lennmi gagn laviktwar; fer zot move lespri detrir zot prop lavi.
140.10: Fer labrez tom lor zot; fer zot tom dan trou nwar kot pena sime sorti.
140.11: Anpes bann foser ek manter etabli zotmem dan pei; fer ki maler pourswiv zot san arete.
140.12: Mo kone ki LESEGNER pran par bann pov; li defann drwa bann ki bizin so led.
140.13: Bann ki viv dan ladrwatir pou sant to laglwar; zot pou touletan viv dan to prezans.

141.1: Mo sipliy twa, SEGNER; mo bien bizin to led. Pran mwa kont ler mo rod to led.
141.2: Aksepte mo lapriyer kouma lafime lansan; aksepte mo lame ki leve ver twa parey lofrand aswar.
141.3: SEGNER, met enn gard kot mo labous, enn santinel ant mo de lalev.
141.4: Ed mwa pou reziste tantasion lemal, pou pa pran par dan move pratik ansam ar move dimounn; alor mo pa pou partisip dan zot fet.
141.5: Enn bon dimounn kapav pini mwa, fer mwa repros pou mo prop dibien me mo refiz aksepte faver ar move dimounn parski gramatin-tanto mo fer lapriyer kont zot pese.
141.6: Kan zot bann dirizan pe tom piktet dan presipis, dimounn pou rapel laverite ki mo ti pe dir.
141.7: Parey kouma bisron koup dibwa, fann li, tay-tay li; koumsa mem zot lezo pou fane bout par bout toutotour zot tom vid. # 141:5-7 Tex Ebre pa kler ditou lor sa group verse la.
141.8: Me mwa mo lizie fixe lor twa, SEGNER. Donn mwa to proteksion e pa les mwa san defans.
141.9: Protez mwa kont bann latrap zot finn poz lor mo sime; anpes mwa rant dan piez bann ki pratik lemal.
141.10: Fer zot rant dan zot prop latrap letan ki mwa mo travers an liberte.

142.1: Avek tou mo lafors mo dimann LESEGNER ed mwa; avek tou mo lafors mo sipliy LESEGNER.
142.2: Mo rakont li tou mo problem; mo dir li tou mo traka.
142.3: Kan mo nepli ena kouraz, to kone ki mo bizin fer. Lor mo larout, mo lennmi finn instal piez partou.
142.4: Ler mo get otour mwa, mo pa trouv personn pou protez mwa, personn pou donn mwa enn koudme pou kasiet. Personn pa pran kont mo lavi.
142.5: SEGNER, mo sipliy twa vinn ed mwa. Mo dir twa, “Tomem mo protekter; tomem mo trezor lor later bann vivan.”
142.6: Ekout mo lapriyer dezespwar, akoz mo finn afebli. Protez mwa kont mo lennmi; zot tro for pou mwa.
142.7: Tir mwa dan mo prizon pou mo loue to grander. Bann ki obeir Bondie pou rasanble otour mwa parski to finn azir avek bonte anver mwa.

143.1: SEGNER, ekout mo lapriyer! Dan to fidelite ekout mo siplikasion; dan to drwatir reponn mwa.
143.2: Pa fer enn prose kont mwa, to serviter, parski okenn dimounn lor later san repros devan twa.
143.3: Mo lennmi finn pourswiv mwa, finn zet mwa anba, finn kraz mwa. Mo lennmi finn anfons mwa dan lobskirite parey dimounn ki finn mor lontan.
143.4: Mo pe bes lebra; dezespwar pe touf mwa net.
143.5: Mo rapel bien lepase; mo rapel bien to bann explwa extraordiner; mo medit lor louvraz to lame.
143.6: Mo lev lame lao ver twa, dan lapriyer, mo lekor ek mo lespri swaf to prezans parey kouma later desese swaf dilo lapli.
143.7: Exos mo lapriyer, SEGNER! Mo finn perdi lespwar. Pa get lot kote, SEGNER; si to pa pran mwa kont, mo pou fini dan trou lamor.
143.8: Toule gramatin fer mwa konn to lamour infini parski mo finn met mo konfians dan twa. Montre mwa sime ki mo bizin swiv parski mo finn tourn mwa ver twa.
143.9: SEGNER, mo vinn ver twa pou gagn to proteksion; protez mwa kont mo lennmi.
143.10: Montre mwa sime to volonte parski tomem mo Bondie. Ki to lespri gid mwa avek bonte lor sime ki pena obstak.
143.11: Prezerv mo lavi, SEGNER, pou loner to nom; par to lazistis tir mwa dan mo tourman.
143.12: Parski to kontan mwa, detrir mo lennmi e detrir mo bann adverser, akoz mo to serviter.

144.1: Mo loue LESEGNER, mo protekter! Limem ki prepar mwa pou bann batay, antrenn mwa pou gagn lager.
144.2: Limem mo protekter ek mo boukliye, mo sitadel ek mo liberater, mo boukliye, mo abrit mwa deryer li. Limem ki soumet bann pep sou mo kontrol.
144.3: SEGNER, kifer to pran kont bann imin? Kifer to donn dimounn ordiner enn plas inportan?
144.4: Enn dimounn ordiner li kouma enn ti labriz; bann zour so lavi nek enn lonbraz ki pase.
144.5: O SEGNER, desir kannva lesiel e vinn kot nou; tous bann montagn e fer zot larg lafime.
144.6: Avoy zekler partou e dispers to lennmi; avoy to bann fles e fer zot al kasiet.
144.7: Depi lao avoy to lame pou sekour mwa, delivre mwa dan toran ki bwi ar koler, tir mwa dan grif bann anvaiser,
144.8: ki zame pa koz laverite, ki lev lame fer serman, me koz manti mem.
144.9: Mo pou sant enn nouvo sante pou twa, O Bondie; mo pou akonpagn mo sante ar sitar pou zwe pou twa,
144.10: twa ki donn laviktwar bann lerwa, twa ki sov David, to serviter.
144.11: Protez mwa kont mo bann lennmi san pitie; tir mwa dan grif bann pep etranze, ki zame pa koz laverite, ki lev lame fer serman, me koz manti mem.
144.12: Fer nou bann garson dan zot zenes grandi kouma bann pie solid; fer nou bann tifi vinn bann kolonn ki ar elegans tini nou sato.
144.13: Ranpli nou grenie ar tou sort kalite manze; fer nou zanimo dan patiraz peple par milie.
144.14: Fer nou vas met ba san problem, san pert, san foskous. Fer lape ek trankilite regne dan nou lavil.
144.15: Bienere pep ki gagn sa kalite benediksion-la; bienere pep ki ena LESEGNER pou Bondie.

145.1: Mo pou proklam to grander O Bondie, mo Lerwa; mo pou loue twa aster, pli divan, touletan.
145.2: Toulezour mo pou dir twa mersi; mo pou sant to louanz aster, pli divan, touletan.
145.3: LESEGNER li gran, li merit tou louanz; nou pa kapav konpran ni mezir so grander.
145.4: Zenerasion apre zenerasion limanite pou loue to bann aksion; partou zot pou koz lor to bann explwa,
145.5: lor splander to laglwar ek to mazeste. Mo pou medit lor bann gran mervey ki to fer.
145.6: Dimounn pou koz lor to pwisans redoutab, e mwa mo pou proklam to bann explwa.
145.7: Zot pou selebre grander to bonte; ar lazwa zot pou sant to lazistis.
145.8: Leker LESEGNER li ranpli ar tandres ek konpasion; difisil pou li fer koler parski so lamour infini deborde partou.
145.9: LESEGNER ena labonte pou tou dimounn, li ena konpasion pou tou kreatir ki li finn kree.
145.10: SEGNER, tou seki to finn kree pou dir twa mersi, e tou bann fidel pou loue twa.
145.11: Zot pou koz lor laglwar to rwayom, e zot pou rakont tou bann mirak ki to finn fer.
145.12: Koumsa lemond antie pou konn to explwa ek laglwar manifik ki to regn ena.
145.13: To regn pou enn regn eternel e to pouvwar rwayal pou dire pou touzour. LESEGNER fidel dan tou so parol, dan tou so aksion li montre so bonte.
145.14: LESEGNER soutenir bann ki pe tonbe e li relev bann ki kourbe.
145.15: Zot tou lev zot lizie ver twa pou gagn zot nouritir kan zot bizin.
145.16: To ouver to lame e tou kreatir rasazie e satisfe.
145.17: LESEGNER, li zis dan tou seki li fer; li zenere dan tou so aksion.
145.18: LESEGNER pre pou ed dimounn ki apel li e ki dimann so led ar sinserite.
145.19: Bann ki onor li gagn seki zot bizin; li tann zot soufrans e li sov zot.
145.20: Li vey lor bann ki kontan li me li detrir bann azan lemal.
145.21: Mo pou touletan loue LESEGNER; tou kreatir ki li finn kree pou loue so sin nom aster, taler, pli divan ek touletan.

146.2: Mo pou sant louanz LESEGNER tanki mo ena lavi; mo pou loue mo Bondie ziska lafin mo lavi.
146.3: Pa fer konfians bann dirizan imin; imin pa ena pouvwar pou sov nou.
146.4: Kan zot mor, zot vinn lapousier; sa zour-la tou zot plan mor ansam ar zot.
146.5: Bienere dimounn ki trouv sekour dan Bondie ki Zakob ti priye; ki met tou lespwar dan LESEGNER so Bondie,
146.6: ki finn kree lesiel ek later, lamer e tou seki zot kontenir, ki gard so promes avek fidelite,
146.7: ki fer lazistis an faver bann oprime e li nouri tou bann kreatir ki gagn fin. LESEGNER liber bann prizonie,
146.8: LESEGNER fer aveg trouv kler. LESEGNER ed seki finn tonbe pou re-diboute; LESEGNER kontan dimounn ki swiv bon sime.
146.9: LESEGNER protez bann imigran ki viv dan nou pei; li relev bann vev ek orfelin me li fer plan bann azan lemal fini an-rwinn.
146.10: LESEGNER pou regne pou touzour, O Sion, to Bondie pou regne eternelman. Alelouya, nou loue nou SEGNER!

147.1: Alelouya! Ala li zoli la kan nou sant louanz nou Bondie; li pa zis zoli, li merite ki nou sant enn kantik louanz.
147.2: LESEGNER pe donn Zerizalem enn nouvo lavi; bann exile Izrael pe retourn zot lakaz.
147.3: Li geri zot leker brize, li met pansman lor zot blesir.
147.4: Li finn deside komie zetwal pou ena dan lesiel, e anplis, li finn donn sak zetwal enn nom.
147.5: LESEGNER li gran ek pwisan; so sazes pena limit.
147.6: Li relev bann feb ki finn kraze; me li zet bann move dimounn anba dan lapousier.
147.7: Anou sant kantik pou loue LESEGNER; nou akonpagn nou sante ar sitar klasik.
147.8: Li fann niaz partou dan lesiel; li prepar lapli pou aroz later e li fer lerb pouse partou.
147.9: Li donn tou zanimo manze; li fer parey pou ti korbo kan zot reklam nouritir.
147.10: Li pa donn gran valer lafors enn seval, e li pena okenn lintere dan vites enn atlet.
147.11: Li prefer bann ki onor li, bann ki fer konfians so lamour infini.
147.12: Glorifie LESEGNER, O Zerizalem! Loue to Bondie, O Sion!
147.13: Li ranforsi sekirite bann laport lantouraz lavil; li beni pep ki viv dan lavil-la.
147.14: Li vey sekirite frontier pei pou ki ena lape, e li donn lasirans enn bon rekolt.
147.15: Li avoy so lord lor later e so parol toutswit galoup ver so destinasion.
147.16: Limem ki fann lanez kouma enn tapi e aroz glason rape partou parey kouma lasann.
147.17: Li fer lagrel grene kouma gravie; kisann-la kapav tini kont sa freser-la?
147.18: Li donn lord e lanez fonn; li avoy divan e dilo koule partou.
147.19: Li fer Zakob konn so parol, li dikte so regleman e donn so komannman lepep Izrael.
147.20: Li pa finn azir parey koumsa anver lezot nasion; bann-la pa konn lalwa Bondie. Alelouya, nou loue LESEGNER!

148.1: Alelouya! Loue LESEGNER depi lesiel, loue li, depi lao laba dan oter.
148.2: Loue li, zot ki so bann anz; loue li, so larme divinn.
148.3: Soley ek lalinn, zot bizin loue li! Bann zetwal ki briye, zot bizin loue li!
148.4: Bann lesiel pli lao ki lesiel, bann dilo pli lao ki lesiel, zot bizin loue li!
148.5: Zot tou ansam, sant laglwar LESEGNER, parski li ti koz enn parol e li ti kree zot;
148.6: dapre so volonte zot ena zot plas permanan dan lespas e zot pa kapav al andeor lalwa ki li finn fixe.
148.7: Loue LESEGNER depi lor later, zot bann mons dan lamer, tou seki dan profonder losean,
148.8: mem zekler ek lagrel, lanez ek brouyar, divan siklonn ki exekit so lord, loue li!
148.9: Kolinn ek montagn, pie verze ek pie lafore,
148.10: zanimo domestik ek zanimo sovaz, reptil ek zwazo, zot bizin loue li!
148.11: Bann lerwa lor later ek tou bann pep, prins ek dirizan, zot bizin loue li!
148.12: E zot ousi, bann zennfi ek zennzan, gran-dimounn ansam ek zanfan.
148.13: Zot tou zot bizin sant grander LESEGNER! So nom tousel pli gran ki tou; so laglwar pli gran ki tou, li dominn later ek lesiel.
148.14: Li finn fer so pep vinn for; aster so bann fidel sant so laglwar; lepep Izrael, zotmem ki pre ar so leker. Alelouya, nou loue LESEGNER!

149.1: Alelouya! Sant enn nouvo sante pou selebre LESEGNER; Sant so laglwar dan lasanble so pep fidel.
149.2: Izrael, exprim to boner akoz to Kreater; pep Sion, montre zot lazwa, selebre zot Lerwa.
149.3: Selebre so laglwar avek bann danse, selebre so grander ar lamizik tanbourin ek laarp.
149.4: LESEGNER trouv so boner omilie so pep e li kouronn bann feb ar laviktwar.
149.5: Fer fet pou rann glwar Bondie, zot ki fidel, e pas lanwit dan rezwisans.
149.6: Sant louanz Bondie for-for, e dan zot lame zot tini lepe ki bien fite de kote,
149.7: pou konbat bann nasion, pou pini bann pep,
149.8: pou ansenn zot lerwa, pou atas bann dirizan ar boul feray,
149.9: pou exekit santans ki finn prononse lor zot. Samem loner tou bann fidel. Alelouya, nou loue LESEGNER!

150.1: Alelouya! Loue Bondie dan so Tanp! Loue li dan lesiel, rwayom so pwisans!
150.2: Loue li pou so bann explwa; loue li dapre so grander siprem.
150.3: Loue li avek son tronpet, loue li avek lagitar ek sitar.
150.4: Loue li ar ravann ek danse, loue li avek laarp ek laflit!
150.5: Loue li ar triyang ek ti sinbal! Loue li avek sinbal sonor.
150.6: Tou bann ki ena souf lavi, loue LESEGNER! Alelouya, anou loue LESEGNER!
